meta.name: 1943 : The Battle of Midway
meta.desc: 1943: The Battle of Midway es un juego de disparos para Atari ST que sigue al gran éxito de Capcom denominado 1942. Aquí estás en el corazón de la Segunda Guerra Mundial. Esta vez se trata de recrear la intensa batalla frente a la costa de las Islas Midway. En comparación con su predecesor, 1943 muestra una barra de salud que se agota cuando recibes daño del enemigo. La barra de salud se puede recargar con ciertas bonificaciones.

meta.name: 5th Gear
meta.desc: The aim is to drive from the beginning of the track to the end while avoiding obstacles and eliminating (with your machine gun) other vehicles. The tracks are not roads, but maze-like obstacle courses in the wilderness. It is part maze solving, part combat, part racing against the clock.

meta.name: 9 Lives
meta.desc:
Claudette the cat has been kidnapped by scientists aiming to use her for experiments. Bob Cat can't allow this, and sets off to save her.
9 Lives is a platform game taking in four levels. The lengths of jumps are variable, depending on how long the joystick is pushed down for. Bonus items to be collected include rotor blades, to allow flight. 
Bob cannot kill his enemies, but can temporarily stun them, by hurling his ball of string at them. Contact with enemies or hazards causes an energy bar to decrease - a life is lost once it reaches zero. As the title suggests, this can happen eight times before a ninth death ends the game.

meta.name: Aaargh!
meta.desc: Lucha con un enorme Ogro de un solo ojo o con un terrible Tiranosaurio en tu camino por encontrar los poderosos Huevos de Oro. Destruye ciudades enteras, aldeas, y todo lo que se interponga en tu camino. Grandes Abejorros intentaran detenerte, así como los aldeanos con sus catapultas, pero tu eres inmensamente mas grande y fuerte, ademas son tu plato preferido. Una vez conseguido el Huevo de Oro, tendrás que luchar para conservarlo y proclamarte el Rey de los Monstruos.

meta.name: Action Fighter
meta.desc:
Empiezas el juego con una moto. Al principio, eres bastante vulnerable a los ataques, pero se te ofrecerán varias bonificaciones cuando te acoples a una furgoneta. 
Destruyendo los coches y motos que aparecen en tu camino, puedes recoger las letras A a F. Las letras A a D te transforman en un coche deportivo, menos vulnerable a los ataques pero menos ágil. Recoge todas las letras para transformarte en un avión de alta tecnología. Sólo este avión puede llevarte a tu destino final, donde se esconde tu enemigo.
También hay un límite de tiempo dentro del cual debes completar la misión.

meta.name: ADS : Advanced Destroyer Simulator
meta.desc:
Advanced Destroyer Simulator (ADS) es un simulador de combate naval ambientado en la Segunda Guerra Mundial. Es la primera simulación naval que utiliza gráficos 3D en tiempo real.
No hay campaña, el juego se basa en misiones y se desarrolla en tres escenarios (dos en la versión para CPC) con cinco misiones cada uno: el Mediterráneo alrededor de Sicilia, el Canal de la Mancha entre el Reino Unido y Francia, y la costa noruega del Mar del Norte. Los objetivos incluyen misiones de búsqueda y destrucción, patrullas, escolta de convoyes, caza de submarinos y operaciones de bloqueo. Cada escenario ofrece también una opción en la que se puede navegar y cazar sin objetivos específicos.

meta.name: After Burner
meta.desc:
After Burner es un shooter de aviones. El objetivo es simple: súbete y controla un jet de combate F-14 Tomcat y avanza a máxima velocidad derribando aviones enemigos y evadiendo sus ataques en 18 etapas. Para lograrlo, estarás equipado con una ametralladora y un conjunto limitado de misiles. Estas armas se reponen por otro avión después de ganar unas pocas etapas.
 El juego se ve en 3ra persona, es decir, desde detrás del avión, y controlando el jet de combate, debemos ir destruyendo a los enemigos que nos salgan al encuentro.

meta.name: After Burner
meta.desc:
After Burner es un shooter de aviones. El objetivo es simple: súbete y controla un jet de combate F-14 Tomcat y avanza a máxima velocidad derribando aviones enemigos y evadiendo sus ataques en 18 etapas. Para lograrlo, estarás equipado con una ametralladora y un conjunto limitado de misiles. Estas armas se reponen por otro avión después de ganar unas pocas etapas.
 El juego se ve en 3ra persona, es decir, desde detrás del avión, y controlando el jet de combate, debemos ir destruyendo a los enemigos que nos salgan al encuentro.

meta.name: Airball
meta.desc:
You have been turned into a ball of air with a slow leak by an evil wizard. You must find the Spellbook and the ingredients for the spell. Without these, you will never turn back into a human again.
These items have to be collected in the maze which consists of 150 isometric rooms. These can be explored freely but sometimes you need to have special objects to proceed, e.g. a candle in dark rooms. The dangers consist mostly of sharp objects which can cause your ball to burst. Additionally you are on a timer because your balloon loses air constantly. But it can be refilled by using pumps which can be found in the maze - but you have to leave them in time or you explode because of overpressure.

meta.name: Alcatraz
meta.desc: As a U.S. Navy SEAL you must break into Alcatraz prison and free all of the hostages. Alcatraz is a one or two player platform game that changes perspective to a first-person view once you're inside a building. With many different weapons such as flamethrowers, machine guns, bombs, and other destructive, close combat weapons, you will be able to defeat the wild horde of terrorists. If you play with the two player option, the screen splits horizontally.

meta.name: Slap Fight
meta.desc:
En el año 2059 la Alien League Of Cosmic Nations (ALCON) te ha designado como el piloto que conducirá el Slap Fighter y derrotará a los alienígenas que ocuparon el planeta Orac. 
La característica principal del juego es su sistema de recogida. Recoges estrellas de los restos humeantes de los enemigos y luego eliges qué potenciador quieres: con una estrella obtienes un escudo, con dos estrellas eliges disparo, con tres estrellas obtienes disparo lateral, con cuatro mejoras las alas, con cinco dispara una bomba, con seis disparas láser, con siete consigues misiles guiados y con ocho mejoras el escudo. El misil guiado es probablemente el arma más poderosa.

meta.name: Alien Storm
meta.desc: The aliens are invading Earth, and it's up to the "Alien Busters" to wipe them out and destroy their creator. The Busters consist of Karla, Gordon, and Scooter. Each one of them have their own weapons and special attacks. When you start the game, you can select any one of these characters to play as. There are six missions to complete (eight in the Genesis version) with several stages, and each mission has you blasting aliens all the way to the end, from the streets to the mother ship where you'll meet the mother of all aliens. Unfortunately, blasting these aliens will not be an easy task, as they get tougher in every mission, and are capable of hiding into objects such as plants, postboxes, trashcans, drums, and several others. Each mission has an objective such as rescuing people destroying an UFO. When you deal with a few aliens, flying heads will appear, which you can shoot to collect life or energy (by the way, life is important to you, since if yours get empty, you're dead). However, rather than using your ordinary weapons, you can use the special attacks that are enough to kill aliens you currently see. These types of attack vary depending on the character you choose at the start of the game. For instance, Gordon summons a U.S. Air Force Jet that drop bombs across the street, while Scooter is able to teleport out of his present location, and leave a series of bombs that will blow up aliens on sight, he will then re-appear. However, using your character's special attack uses up a lot of energy, and if you have little or no energy, you can't use it. At the end of some missions is an alien boss, which you must destroy in order to complete the mission. Also, at the end of every one, you have to enter buildings where you participate in a shooting gallery. The object is to kill aliens popping up from several locations with the building. You can play Alien Storm by yourself, or with another person.

meta.name: Alien World
meta.desc:
A wedding is going to be celebrated in the village of Mogroth. Kai and his beloved Medb are going to be united by the Grand Druid when suddenly Medb is kidnapped by the demonic cohorts of Slough Feg and taken to the distant Caves of Dreams, Feg's haunt.
Kai vowed to find and free Medb. But when he heard of this oath, Feg cast a spell on Kai, transfiguring him into a creature never seen before.
You control Kai's movements in his quest to join Medb. But the journey is not without risks ...

meta.name: Altered Beast
meta.desc: Eres un héroe resucitado de entre los muertos por el dios Zeus para rescatar a su hija Atenea. Con un escenario inspirado en la Antigua Grecia, debes luchar contra hordas de muertos vivientes y demonios, con un jefe al final de cada nivel hasta que te encuentres con el dios Neff, que tiene cautiva a la chica. El título Altered Beast se refiere a tus habilidades para cambiar de forma. En este juego de plataformas, puedes recolectar bolas espirituales al derrotar a los lobos de dos cabezas, lo que te permite mutar en diferentes bestias como un hombre lobo, un dragón, un tigre, un oso y otros dependiendo de la versión. Cada forma, ligada a un nivel, viene con habilidades especiales como vuelo y ataques poderosos, reemplazando fácilmente el conjunto básico de puñetazos y patadas en tu forma humana.

meta.name: The Amazing Spider-Man
meta.desc: In The Amazing Spider-Man, Spider Man has to rescue his girlfriend Mary Jane who was kidnapped by the super villain Mysterio. The whole game takes place on a film set studio.
meta.genre: Plataformas / Corre y Salta con desplazamiento

meta.name: Anarchy
meta.desc: Como clon de Defender, Anarchy es un shooter de parallax de desplazamiento lateral, en el que te enfrentas a los malvados Anarquistas y su comportamiento destructivo. Tu nave se mueve hacia la izquierda o hacia la derecha en un nivel en bucle, disparando a los enemigos y finalmente a los jefes. Tienes una sola vida con energía que se agota gradualmente. Se registran no menos de 50 puntuaciones más altas (High Scores). No hay sorpresas en la jugabilidad, excepto las mejoras habituales para tu nave.

meta.name: Antago
meta.desc:
Antago is a puzzle game played on a 5x5 square board. It can be played either against the computer, with a choice of up to 10 levels of difficulty or against a human player. You can play a match or start a training session, as well as select between plain (empty board) and prepared (pre-arranged balls on the board) game modes. A demo mode is also available, where the computer plays against itself.
An angel and a devil compete against each other, with the goal of aligning five balls in a row on the board, either horizontally, vertically or diagonally. They are moved around the board, pushing each other as their paths cross and strategically placing balls on the edge of the board to both disrupt their opponent's lines and try to create a line of 5 of their own balls.
Each level features different background and board graphics. There is no background music playing during the game and only sound effects when the 2 characters push each other, place a ball on the board and win.

meta.name: Archipelagos
meta.desc:
Archipelagos is a real-time puzzle and strategy game with an unconventional premise and equally unconventional gameplay.
In the future, man carelessly poisons the earth with nuclear waste. The polar ice caps have melted, turning the surface of the earth into many islands of decaying land masses, known as Archipelagos. Man then built systems to try to clean up the pollution, but these failed. The only life left were genetically-altered plants made in an effort to clean up the waste -- these also turned hostile. It is up to you to clean up the earth, island by island.  
Controlling a hoversphere, it is up to you to make Earth's many islands of land habitable. To do this, you need to knock out the radiation generators on each island, which can be done by knocking out each generator's power sources (there are several per island). Once these are knocked out, you have 90 seconds to get back to the generator and disable it before it melts down, taking you with it.
Obstacles, unfortunately for you, are plentiful: You can't knock out a power source unless it is connected by a "land bridge" to the generator. You have the ability to create land where needed, but this takes up energy, and you have a limited supply. Also a hindrance are the many genetically-altered entities left behind on the islands: Viral trees that poison the ground; necromancers (former hoverspheres) that now erode land instead of creating it; eco eggs that explode on touch; and aircleaners, who are ruthlessly efficient in cleaning up the air -- and everything else, including you.
The entire game plays from a 3D first-person viewpoint. A movable cursor selects where to move or what to manipulate.
There are 10,000 islands on Earth to purify. If you can make it past Archipelago #100, you are then free to select any of them.

meta.name: Archon
meta.desc: Archon es un videojuego de estrategia por turnos. Se basa en el principio del ajedrez, con la adición de fases de combate. Cada pieza se coloca en el tablero según su rango de movimiento y forma un ejército que representa la luz o la sombra. Cuando una unidad intenta tomar a otra, ambas son transportadas a una arena de combate para determinar el ganador. Una unidad puede permanecer herida incluso después de ganar su duelo, lo que reduce sus posibilidades de victoria en una batalla futura.  La partida se gana cuando todas las unidades contrarias son destruidas o cuando un jugador tiene cinco puntos de poder.

meta.name: Arcticfox
meta.desc:
En 2005, unos alienígenas han invadido la Antártida para desviar el suministro de oxígeno de la Tierra. Te envían a luchar contra ellos con un tanque altamente sofisticado, el Slye-Hicks MX-100, cuyo nombre en clave es Arcticfox.
Arcticfox es un juego futurista de simulación de tanques en 3D en el que tu objetivo es destruir la fortaleza principal de los alienígenas antes de que Arcticfox sea destruido.
Los objetivos enemigos vienen en todas las formas y tamaños: aviones, tanques, trineos de reconocimiento y otros objetivos importantes como torres de comunicación, convertidores de atmósfera, etc. Tu máquina de guerra está equipada con un cañón, misiles guiados, minas, así como un radar y pantallas de visión delantera y trasera para detectar el avance del enemigo.

meta.name: Arkanoid
meta.desc: Amplió los juegos Breakout de Atari de la década de 1970 añadiendo potenciadores, diferentes tipos de ladrillos, una variedad de niveles de tablero y profundidad visual. El título hace referencia a una "nave nodriza" condenada de la que escapa el barco del jugador, el Vaus. Arkanoid revivió el concepto de los juegos de romper ladrillos, generando numerosos clones y juegos similares para ordenadores personales incluso más de una década después.

meta.name: Armalyte
meta.desc:
In the Delta region of space, the remnants of a long forgotten war remain - far beyond what those in the Terran system were used to. This technology is potentially valuable, but retrieving it from the 8 sectors will involve a lot of blasting and dodging.
Viewed from the side and scrolling horizontally, the game is in a similar vein to R-Type and Life Force / Salamander. Extra weapons are gained by shooting crystals and then collecting the resultant pod.  Weapons on offer including lasers firing vertically and outwardly, as well as faster weaponry recharging.

meta.name: Armour-Geddon
meta.desc:
In Armour-Geddon, a power crazed entity is developing a devastating energy beam to wipe out all unprotected life on Earth. In a race against time you must choose and control up to six different vehicles, and use them to destroy enemy power lines and eventually the beam generator. And thus you save the Earth and all mankind.
Armour-Geddon is a nice blend of simulation and strategy, in which you get to play both the brass and the grunt. You designate your targets and choose which vehicle(s) you shall use to blow them up with.

meta.name: Artura
meta.desc:
Artura es un juego de acción de desplazamiento lateral. El juego se inspira en parte en la mitología del Rey Arturo, ya que juegas como Artura, hijo de los Pendragons. Tu objetivo es salvar a Nimue, la aprendiz de Merdyn, de tu malvada hermanastra Morgause.
Tendrás que luchar contra muchas criaturas horribles como arañas y murciélagos con tu hacha y evitar trampas mortales mientras intentas llegar al castillo de Morgause. También tendrás que buscar 6 runas, que contienen hechizos, para liberar a Nimue. Artura contiene 4 niveles laberínticos y extremadamente complicados.

meta.name: Astaroth
meta.desc: El objetivo del juego es recorrer las catacumbas del dominio de Astaroth hasta llegar al enfrentamiento final con la dama. Para destruir a Astaroth en la batalla final, tendrás que reunir los nueve poderes mentales que se encuentran repartidos por las cuevas. En el camino, necesitarás estos poderes para destruir a los secuaces de Astaroth y a sus tres Guardianes del Alma, que toman la forma de una Esfinge, una Hidra de tres cabezas y un Demonio Maralith (una criatura con múltiples brazos, mitad humana, mitad serpiente). Si no derrotas a estas criaturas, no tendrás suficiente poder ni siquiera para entrar en la cámara de Astaroth y, por lo tanto, no podrás completar el juego.

meta.name: Astate - La Malédiction Des Templiers
meta.desc: A complete new concept, concise -without useless text- this great computer game with stunning graphics and sound will amaze you!  Venture forth into a world of more than 50 different places such as traps, labyrinthes, dungeons, chapels, etc. And it will tug at your heartstrings, tantalizing your emotions! This top adventure game will also allow novices to participate, to the fullest extend, in this exciting archeological enigma!

p: Asterix und Operation Hinkelstein (1989)(Coktel Vision)(de)(Disk 1 of 2).st
n: Asterix und Operation Hinkelstein (1989)(Coktel Vision)(de)(Disk 1 of 2)

meta.name: Asterix : Operation Getafix
meta.desc: Asterix: Operation Getafix is an action and adventure game in which you control Asterix the hero of the Gauls and star of the Asterix & Obelix comics. In this game, you have to travel around collect items, and find a cure for Getafix, the druid of the Gauls. Getafix must be cured so that he can continue to make the potion that keeps Roman soldiers away from the tiny Gaul village.

meta.name: 10th Frame
meta.desc: 10th Frame es un juego de bolos al que se puede jugar solo o en equipos de hasta 8 jugadores (2 equipos de 4 jugadores). El jugador controla primero la colocación del jugador de bolos y la dirección del lanzamiento. Luego, durante el lanzamiento, tiene que demostrar destreza y precisión para determinar la mejor fuerza y los efectos que hay que dar a la bola. Estos últimos parámetros son más o menos difíciles de dominar en función del nivel elegido (infantil, aficionado, profesional).

meta.name: Grand Prix 500cc
meta.desc:
El juego ofrece un modo para dos jugadores simultáneamente y tres niveles de dificultad general. En un Gran Premio hay 12 pistas disponibles, inspirados en circuitos reales. Cada carrera tiene 9 vueltas, con seis corredores. En el modo de entrenamiento, hay dos vueltas y solo 2 corredores.
Las versiónes DOS y Atari ST incluyen un modo de guardado después de cada carrera.

meta.name: 5th Gear
meta.desc: The aim is to drive from the beginning of the track to the end while avoiding obstacles and eliminating (with your machine gun) other vehicles. The tracks are not roads, but maze-like obstacle courses in the wilderness. It is part maze solving, part combat, part racing against the clock.

meta.name: Academy
meta.desc: In Academy: Tau Ceti 2, the player take up the role of an student of an pilot academy. The player, seeking his graduation at the academy, will play through 20 missions. Unlike the previous title (Tau Ceti), the gameplay (the flight physics) changes based on the planet being played. The game also feature a number of customization options, like engines, weapons, equipments and even the on-screen panel.

meta.name: Action Fighter
meta.desc:
Empiezas el juego con una moto. Al principio, eres bastante vulnerable a los ataques, pero se te ofrecerán varias bonificaciones cuando te acoples a una furgoneta. 
Destruyendo los coches y motos que aparecen en tu camino, puedes recoger las letras A a F. Las letras A a D te transforman en un coche deportivo, menos vulnerable a los ataques pero menos ágil. Recoge todas las letras para transformarte en un avión de alta tecnología. Sólo este avión puede llevarte a tu destino final, donde se esconde tu enemigo.
También hay un límite de tiempo dentro del cual debes completar la misión.

meta.name: Action Service
meta.desc:
Ponte las botas, soldado, y prepárate para cinco niveles de acción desafiante en este simulador de campo de entrenamiento. A medida que avances por los niveles, recibirás puntos por hacer lo correcto y perderás puntos por cualquier paso en falso. Puedes grabar tus intentos y revisarlos, para detectar tus errores y aprender de ellos.
El primer nivel es el recorrido físico, que requiere saltar muros, saltar trincheras y arrastrarse bajo alambre de espino. El segundo nivel es el curso "Riesgo". En esta tendrás que plantar dinamita y lanzar granadas.
En el nivel tres, el jugador tendrá que luchar cuerpo a cuerpo en el campo de combate. El cuarto nivel combina los tres anteriores en uno y, por último, el quinto nivel es un recorrido "Cobra" personalizado que lanza al jugador elementos aleatorios de todos los recorridos.

meta.name: Addictaball
meta.desc: Addicta Ball is a Breakout clone with a twist. Players control a paddle to break down a wall of different block by bouncing a ball against them, but instead of removing them to clear a level, players need to make a path for the paddle to pass through. As time goes on, the bricks move lower down the screen so the path needs to be created as long as there is an opportunity. The game is over when the bricks hit the paddle.

meta.name: Adidas Championship Tie-Break
meta.desc:
This tennis simulation uses a top-down scrolling perspective. You are not in control of the player's motion, but once he gets close to the ball, shot selection is down to you. Standard shots plus topspin, lobs and stop volleys are available, by pushing the joystick in the right direction as you aim the shot.
The game supports up to 16 players in singles matches on a variety of court surfaces.  It includes all of the major world tournaments - the four Grand Slam events at Melbourne, Roland Garros, Wimbledon and New York, plus the Davis Cup and Masters events.  An early attempt at TV-style coverage is offered.

meta.name: Heroes Of The Lance
meta.desc:
Basado en las últimas partes del libro "Dragonlance Dragons of Autumn Twilight", los héroes descienden a una ciudad en ruinas en busca de los discos de Mishakal.
El juego consiste en un combate horizontal con un mapa laberíntico, utilizando puertas para cambiar la vista. El grupo está formado por los 8 Héroes de la Lanza, utilizando uno a la vez y el jugador puede cambiar entre ellos en cualquier momento. Cada personaje tiene diferentes tipos de ataques y hechizos, lo que los hace más adecuados para luchar contra diferentes enemigos y comportarse como personas reales.
Uno de los juegos de AD&D que se desmarca del RPG habitual.

meta.name: Advanced Fruit Machine Simulator
meta.desc: THE ULTIMATE FRUIT MACHINE SIMULATOR! Skill and repeat chances galore, shuffles, free spins, hyper-nudges, skill-nudges, hidden fortune, mega-trek, turbo-skill, double & treble fruiter, winner-spinner, 4 coin boxes with coin-box super scanner and skill-coins, and £100 jackpot race!

meta.name: Advanced Rugby Simulator
meta.desc: ADVANCED RUGBY SIMULATOR "The first real simulation of the world-famous game — it's all there ... conversions, touch backs, line outs, drop kicks, real tackling, scrum downs, throw-ins and all the rest!

p: atarist TORRENTS/Adventures of Robin Hood, The (Europe) (En,Fr,De,It).zip.torrent

meta.name: The Adventures Of Robin Hood
meta.desc: In Robin Hood you must perform many heroic deeds to change the public impression of you from "villain" to "hero." To he ultimate aim is to retake your castle, which is captured in the intro sequence. This involves bringing together your band of merry men, and killing the Sheriff and his guards. There are around 6 extra items you can find in the game, most of which aren't essential but make the game a lot easier. The whole interface is similar to Populous: you don't direct Robin directly but with icons which are placed around the screen.

meta.name: After Burner
meta.desc:
After Burner es un shooter de aviones. El objetivo es simple: súbete y controla un jet de combate F-14 Tomcat y avanza a máxima velocidad derribando aviones enemigos y evadiendo sus ataques en 18 etapas. Para lograrlo, estarás equipado con una ametralladora y un conjunto limitado de misiles. Estas armas se reponen por otro avión después de ganar unas pocas etapas.
 El juego se ve en 3ra persona, es decir, desde detrás del avión, y controlando el jet de combate, debemos ir destruyendo a los enemigos que nos salgan al encuentro.

meta.desc:

Kai vowed to find and free Medb. But when he heard of this oath, Feg cast a spell on Kai, transfiguring him into a creature never seen before.
You control Kai's movements in his quest to join Medb. But the journey is not without risks ...

meta.name: Alternate Reality : The City
meta.desc: In Alternate Reality: The City, you are one of many people who have been abducted from earth by aliens and transported to an alternate dimension where you are dumped in a strange, yet familiar city. Your quest is to explore the city, and find the clues that will lead you to your captors and help you get back home.

meta.name: Anarchy
meta.desc: Como clon de Defender, Anarchy es un shooter de parallax de desplazamiento lateral, en el que te enfrentas a los malvados Anarquistas y su comportamiento destructivo. Tu nave se mueve hacia la izquierda o hacia la derecha en un nivel en bucle, disparando a los enemigos y finalmente a los jefes. Tienes una sola vida con energía que se agota gradualmente. Se registran no menos de 50 puntuaciones más altas (High Scores). No hay sorpresas en la jugabilidad, excepto las mejoras habituales para tu nave.

meta.name: Another World
meta.desc:
San Francisco 2016. A series of earthquakes has damaged several nuclear power plants, and the subsequent nuclear contamination has forced the survivors to flee underground. Their only hope to get off the continent is to use newly developed matter transporters. However, these transporters require certain types of crystals to work. Since men cannot survive on the surface, the task of collecting the crystals is assigned to a cyborg.
You take control of the cyborg and must collect different types of crystals in a number of side-scrolling levels, while fighting off mutated animals. Your cyborg can jump, shoot and use smart bombs that damage everything on screen. From time to time, extras appear that replenish some of your health or improve your weapon. If your weapon is at maximum power, you can also collect additional smart bombs. 
The main task of each level is to collect crystals and use them in one of the teleporters that can be found at each end of a level.
There are three types of crystals that are used for different purposes. Green crystal teleport you to the other end of a level. Red crystals take you to another level and blue crystals are needed to get to another continent. Usage of the crystals is rather complicated as each crystal has a different charge and they have to be put into the right slot of the teleporters. Not paying attention to the charge may even cause the transporter to explode.

meta.name: Apprentice
meta.desc: If you can defeat the dragon Fumo, your status as a magician will be ensured. Many have tried to rid the world of his evil, but none have been strong enough. Gameplay scrolls sideways and is platform based, with a very cutesy and consolesque look, and 17 levels, each containing an extra hidden section. Each level has its own elemental setting, taking in the fires of Hell and the clouds and light of Heaven. The levels are full of boxes, which can be used as weapons by kicking them at enemies. As you go you can also collect money, which can be spent in shops to buy useful extras. Many collectibles and other items exist, such as leaves (which change the effects of gravity, allowing you to jump higher and stay hanging in the air for longer), extra lives, fruit for bonus points, and balloons allowing a degree of vertical movement.

meta.name: Archipelagos
meta.desc:
Archipelagos is a real-time puzzle and strategy game with an unconventional premise and equally unconventional gameplay.
In the future, man carelessly poisons the earth with nuclear waste. The polar ice caps have melted, turning the surface of the earth into many islands of decaying land masses, known as Archipelagos. Man then built systems to try to clean up the pollution, but these failed. The only life left were genetically-altered plants made in an effort to clean up the waste -- these also turned hostile. It is up to you to clean up the earth, island by island.  
Controlling a hoversphere, it is up to you to make Earth's many islands of land habitable. To do this, you need to knock out the radiation generators on each island, which can be done by knocking out each generator's power sources (there are several per island). Once these are knocked out, you have 90 seconds to get back to the generator and disable it before it melts down, taking you with it.
Obstacles, unfortunately for you, are plentiful: You can't knock out a power source unless it is connected by a "land bridge" to the generator. You have the ability to create land where needed, but this takes up energy, and you have a limited supply. Also a hindrance are the many genetically-altered entities left behind on the islands: Viral trees that poison the ground; necromancers (former hoverspheres) that now erode land instead of creating it; eco eggs that explode on touch; and aircleaners, who are ruthlessly efficient in cleaning up the air -- and everything else, including you.
The entire game plays from a 3D first-person viewpoint. A movable cursor selects where to move or what to manipulate.
There are 10,000 islands on Earth to purify. If you can make it past Archipelago #100, you are then free to select any of them.

meta.name: Arcticfox
meta.desc:
En 2005, unos alienígenas han invadido la Antártida para desviar el suministro de oxígeno de la Tierra. Te envían a luchar contra ellos con un tanque altamente sofisticado, el Slye-Hicks MX-100, cuyo nombre en clave es Arcticfox.
Arcticfox es un juego futurista de simulación de tanques en 3D en el que tu objetivo es destruir la fortaleza principal de los alienígenas antes de que Arcticfox sea destruido.
Los objetivos enemigos vienen en todas las formas y tamaños: aviones, tanques, trineos de reconocimiento y otros objetivos importantes como torres de comunicación, convertidores de atmósfera, etc. Tu máquina de guerra está equipada con un cañón, misiles guiados, minas, así como un radar y pantallas de visión delantera y trasera para detectar el avance del enemigo.

meta.name: Artificial Dreams
meta.desc:
This slow-paced methodical shoot 'em up is viewed from top down, with your ship flying up the screen. The game's levels have a clearly square design to them, with lots of barriers to negotiate as well as aliens (which generally stay in the same vertical plane as they fly towards you).
Many squares featuring a variety of power-up type effects, such as improved weaponry, extra lives, a level warp, a device to stop the landscape's (otherwise constant) scrolling (thereby giving you a chance to 'pick off' the aliens more carefully), and one which speeds up the aliens (avoid this!). You can move backwards a short way, but it takes a few squares' worth of screen to get fully across the screen, so bear this in mind in the mazier sections.

meta.name: Atax
meta.desc: In the darkest years of the Government's oppressive reign, one man had dared to oppose the system. His only weapon? A small attack craft called ATAX capable of low level skimming advances on the planet surface. Flying through hostile terrain and under attack from the Government's Guardians you must reach the gateway, each one guarded by an evil assailant.

meta.name: Atomix
meta.desc:
Atomix is a puzzle game. On each level, you are given a couple of atoms, and your task is to arrange them into a specific shapes. 
In a top-down view, you see all the atoms available for you to move, and all the directions they can connect to. Down below on the left side is a small picture of what you must get. That picture represents some molecular structure that you must complete by moving atoms horizontally and vertically. Once you move your atom, it won't stop unless it bumps into something, so you have to use other atoms as blockades to prevent it from going into unwanted areas. 
There are over 50 levels, and you have limited time for each level.

meta.name: Backgammon Royale
meta.desc: Backgammon Royale is a simple computerized version of the classic board game of chance & skill called "Backgammon". Backgammon Royale lets the player choose between two styles of play (aggressive or defensive), and also select the game speed between three parameters (fast, medium or slow). The game has a save/load option that gives the player the opportunity to continue the game later.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Balance of Power - The 1990 Edition (Europe).zip.torrent

meta.name: Balance Of Power : The 1990 Edition
meta.desc:
Balance of Power is a Geopolitical Simulation video game developed by Chris Crawford and published by Mindscape.
It is a geopolitical simulation reproducing the Cold War. The player plays as the President of the United States or the General Secretary of the Communist Party of the Soviet Union. In a turn-based strategy game system, he ruled his country for eight years. The objective is to maximize the prestige of his camp while avoiding nuclear war.

meta.name: Ballistix
meta.desc: Psygnosis' Ballistix is an arcade game in which you have to manipulate a ball in order to score a goal with your opponent. To do this, you will control an arrow that defines a direction, and pressing the fire key will launch a ball from this arrow in the direction the arrow points to; by launching balls at correct angles, you will manipulate the main ball and control the way it moves. Ballistix also keeps certain physics laws (namely gravity and friction), and will present you with varying obstacles in either one or two player mode.

meta.name: Barbarian : The Ultimate Warrior
meta.desc: ?... Y he aquí que un poderoso guerrero aparecerá, procedente de los helados eriales del Norte, y se alzará solo contra las fuerzas del mal...? (El libro de la Muerte)

meta.name: Battle Chess
meta.desc: Battle Chess es un juego de ajedrez bastante típico, pero viene con un giro: todas las piezas están representadas por figuras pequeñas y realistas que caminan por el tablero de ajedrez, y cuando una pieza toma otra, ambas participan en una batalla animada. Hay una animación diferente para cada permutación, según las piezas que se capturen o se capturen. También puedes jugar en 2D sin animación.

meta.name: Battle Probe
meta.desc:
A long time after the Human Race left Earth and traveled to the Solar System of Sol, some thoughts about returning to Earth came up. As aliens occupied the abandoned earth, The ?Council of the Confederation of Human Kind? decided to send a ship to Earth to conquer the home planet again.
Of course, the player takes control of that Battle Probe and fights his way through 65 levels to expel the aliens by simply killing all of them in this vertical scrolling shoot 'em up game.

meta.name: Battlehawks 1942
meta.desc: Vuela como piloto estadounidense o japonés en una de las 4 operaciones en el Teatro del Pacífico durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial. Esta simulación también puede calificar como software educativo porque el manual presenta toneladas de información histórica. Se representan doce aviones (incluidas las variantes) y unos 20 tipos de barcos. El primero de la trilogía de combate aéreo de la Segunda Guerra Mundial de Lucasfilm/Lawrence Holland.

meta.name: Beach Volley
meta.desc:
While two boys playing Beach Volley a stranger passes by and give them two the possibility to play around the world for the Beach Volley Cup. They take change and start their first competition in London. The rules are easy, one of the teams has to reach seven points first. When you win you fly to other continents like America, Africa or China to meet your next opponent.
You can play against the computer (cup mode) or a second player.

meta.name: BeastLord
meta.desc: Beastlord is an action game with puzzle-solving elements. The Lord of Darkness managed to trick the three guardians of the world (a unicorn, a hawk and a beam of light) into imprisonment and now overruns everything with his orc hordes. The player takes the role of a young man, who is called the Beastlord because he can interact with animals, and has to explore three levels with the goal to free the guardians. The levels are side-scrolling in nature, but there are many branches to map out.

meta.name: Beyond the Ice Palace
meta.desc:
La leyenda «Mas allá del Palacio de Hielo y hacia el Norte» cuenta la historia de una tierra mística donde viven extrañas criaturas. Es una tierra de fantasía y magia, de duendes y espíritus, de dioses y diablos.
Este lugar está siendo arrasado por una terrible guerra entre las fuerzas del bien y el mal, guerra que los espíritus de la luz están perdiendo.
En un último intento por restablecer el orden, los Espíritus de los Bosques se reunen con el Consejo de Ancianos y, entre todos, bendicen una flecha que lanzan al aire. Aquel que la encuentre se verá inmerso en una gran aventura, pues sobre sus hombros caerá la misión de terminar, de una vez por todas, con la desolación y la oscuridad.

meta.name: Black Tiger
meta.desc: En este juego, encarnas a un bárbaro que debe matar a tres dragones que han descendido del cielo y han sumido el reino en la oscuridad. Tienes que atravesar varias zonas y destruir a los monstruos que encuentres en tu camino. Por el camino te encontrarás con ancianos que, una vez rescatados, te darán objetos como tiempo extra, más vitalidad o más monedas. También pueden venderte objetos como mejoras de armadura, armas, llaves de cofres del tesoro o pociones antienvenenamiento. Puedes recoger monedas destruyendo ciertos monstruos o rompiendo vasijas.

meta.name: Blasteroids
meta.desc:
Blasteroids es una actualización de su antepasado arcade "Asteroids" en el que el objetivo es eliminar todos los sectores de asteroides y naves enemigas. Una vez completada esta tarea, el jugador se enfrenta a Mukor, el jefe que gobierna todas las galaxias.
La nave del jugador aparece primero en el centro de cuatro agujeros de gusano, entre los que debe elegir su destino. A continuación, será transportada a un sector del sistema estelar elegido.
A diferencia de "Asteroides", la nave debe reponer su suministro de combustible recogiendo cristales de asteroides de colores. Algunos sectores no ofrecen estos cristales, y si la nave se queda sin combustible, se pierde.

meta.name: Blazing Thunder
meta.desc:
Corre el año 2059. El poder militar de Zimmerad gobierna el planeta y un movimiento para derrocar el régimen está en marcha. Tú eres la última oportunidad para derrotar a Zimmerad y mantener libre a tu pueblo.
Juegas como un doble de Rambo en un carro de combate y te adentrarás en las líneas enemigas, a través de la jungla, la ciudad y el desierto y disparando a todo lo que se mueva.
Los combatientes no paran de aparecer por todas partes y algunos incluso te tienden emboscadas para ajustarse mejor a ti. También tendrás que tener cuidado con las minas, los tanques enemigos y los formidables ataques aéreos. Afortunadamente, las armas de bonificación te ayudarán en esta difícil empresa. El escenario a menudo se interpone en el camino y debe ser destruido. Una vez completado un nivel, te enfrentarás a un jefe.

meta.name: Block Out
meta.desc: Blockout is a Tetris variant with an added twist: it's in 3D. The player can rotate the blocks in 3D in order to fit them into the pit they are being guided into. Advanced users can play this game with odd three-dimensional pieces, or change the size of the pit, for depth of between 6 and 18 piles, and width and length of between 3 and 7.

meta.name: Blood Money
meta.desc:
The speech in the introductory sequence probably sums things up best - "the biggest unanswered question is 'where is the money?"
The player has 4 missions to take on, in each case trying to kill baddies for the money they have, which can be spent in the shop rooms to upgrade their craft. Energy is depleted by contact with enemies and the walls, although there are some baddies who simply hover on your ship and steal, rather than physically doing damage.
The game is a shoot 'em up which scrolls both horizontally and vertically, while being viewed from an R-Type style sideways perspective. Navigating the levels sometimes requires the player to duck through gaps in scenery.

meta.name: Bloodwych
meta.desc:
La tierra de Trazere estuvo antaño gobernada por la poderosa y benévola organización de magos conocida como los Bloodwych. Gobernados por el Gran Dragón, los Bloodwych mantenían el país en equilibrio, protegiéndolo del mal y llevándolo a la prosperidad. Sin embargo, el segundo al mando de los Bloodwych, llamado Zendick, se volvió contra su grupo, desterró a sus oponentes al plano astral y comenzó a trabajar en un loco plan para invocar al Señor de la Entropía. El jugador controla al campeón de Trazere, cuyo objetivo es detener a Zendick y restaurar la paz en la tierra.
Bloodwych es un juego de laberintos en 3D en primera persona. La característica especial de este juego es el soporte de pantalla dividida para dos jugadores.
Cada jugador controla a un grupo de cuatro personajes. Las cuatro clases básicas son guerrero, mago, aventurero y ladrón.
meta.genre: Juego de Rol / RPG de Mazmorras

meta.name: The Blues Brothers
meta.desc: Como en la película, The Blues Brothers está protagonizado por Jake y Elwood. Como era de esperar, los dos hermanos se han vuelto a meter en líos, así que tendrán que ir huyendo de las garras de la ley a lo largo de los cinco niveles que componen el juego. De esta manera, tendremos que pasar por un centro comercial, huir de la prisión, cruzar el río y alcanzar la gran ciudad para ser libres.
meta.genre: Plataformas / Corre y Salta con desplazamiento

meta.name: BMX Simulator
meta.desc:
This is an overhead-viewed racing game similar in style to Super Sprint. There are 7 courses of increasing difficulty, incorporating ramps and bumps which significantly affect the bike's handling. Each course has a time limit you must complete 3 laps of the course within, or it's game over. The further inside the time limit you are, the more points you score.
There's a computer opponent, but the scoring isn't affected by whether you beat him just so long as you qualify. There is a two-player mode. A unique feature at the time is the action replay, which can be viewed in slow motion.

meta.name: Bob Winner
meta.desc:
Bob Winner is searching for a lost civilisation somewhere in the desert, and has to gain three keys to access it by beating a boss in Paris, London, and New York respectively. The first two bosses are boxers, the last one is a gun-toting cowboy. The items necessary to beat the bosses are found on the preceding screens.
So far the rather weak story for this typical French side-view flip-screen action adventure that focuses not so much on combat but on avoiding rather unmotivated rolling barrels and flying insects and is remarkable mainly because of its at the time outstanding graphics.

meta.name: Bomb Jack
meta.desc:
Toma el control de Jack y recoge todas las bombas para pasar a la siguiente ronda. Esto no es tan fácil como suena con numerosos enemigos como pájaros, tortugas y momias que se interponen en el camino.
nnLos fondos para los Niveles consisten en ubicaciones reales como; Miami Beach, Sphynx o Sastle Neuschwanstein.
nnTiene 99 niveles pero una vez que alcanzas 99 el juego salta de vuelta a la ronda 0. Los niveles individuales realmente se repiten mucho antes.

meta.name: Bridge Master
meta.desc: Finally, a Bridge opponent that can provide a tough and challenging game any time of day or night. Atari Bridge Master is suitable for players of all standards from novice to expert. Playing as either defender or declarer, Bridge Master supports the proper bidding in the Acol system, including the Stayman and Blackwood conventions. Bridge Master for the Atari Mega and ST Computers...... can you beat it?

meta.name: Bridge Player 2000 With Tutor
meta.desc: This is a bridge player for both the expert and the beginner. The computer will play as either defender or declarer. Generates random hands and allows proper bidding in the Acol system, including the Stayman and Blackwood conventions. Bid against the computer, then prove your skill as it takes you on playing both your opponents hands. The tutorial proposes section with 20 set hands, advice and explanation. Rewind facility allows you to rebid and replay and hand. Review bidding or play to previous tricks while playing a hand. Input a contract of your own choice to test yourself. Peep at your opponents hands. Comprehensive on-screen information displays: contract, tricks won so far, cards played in current and last trick, score. Option to bias the deal to give you and your 'partner' more high card points if you prefer to play as declarer. At any time claim the rest of the tricks. Restart the play of the cards.

meta.name: Pop-Up
meta.desc:
Controlaréis a Bumpy, siendo vuestra misión principal, que os permitirá el acceso a la siguiente fase, la de comeros todo lo que hay en pantalla. Aunque no sea necesario, para pasar de escenario, es más que conveniente, por no decir que indispensable, que recojáis los demás objetos que pueden aparecer, que son las llaves, los martillos y las gotas de agua. Las primeras sirven para abrir caminos por donde antes había paredes; los segundos os permiten destruir los muros de ladrillo que os impiden el paso; y las gotas os permitirán apagar los incendios que hay en algunas de las plataformas.
Una vez que hayáis recogido todos los comestibles, aparecerá una puerta por la que accederéis al siguiente nivel. Es conveniente que os penséis desde el lugar de salida cuál es el mejor itinerario posible para completar la fase.

meta.name: Burger Man
meta.desc: Burger Man is a straight BurgerTime variant. In each of the one-screen levels the player needs to assemble a certain number of burgers. Each burger consists of four parts which lie on the platforms. The player needs to walk over those parts and then they fall down one level - when they meet another of the parts, it also falls down. A burger is done when all four parts are on the lowest level. The platforms are interconnected with ladders which are also the only way to evade the enemies which walk around the levels (the player character can't jump). Touching an enemy results in death.

meta.name: Captain Blood
meta.desc:
El jugador encarna a un programador atrapado y clonado dentro de su propio juego. Poco a poco se transforma en una máquina y debe encontrar y destruir a sus cinco clones antes de perder definitivamente su forma humana.
La acción se desarrolla en Hydra, un universo imaginario, donde el jugador se desplaza de planeta en planeta, encontrándose con alienígenas de diferentes características, que pueden ayudarle o no a cumplir su misión. Captain Blood's Ark se caracteriza por su relativamente innovador sistema de diálogo, que permite al jugador crear frases a partir de iconos para comunicarse con los alienígenas.
El jugador controla una nave biológica llamada Arca, y debe lanzar sondas a las superficies de los planetas, haciéndolas navegar con éxito por el paisaje para localizar a un alienígena. El Arca también puede escanear planetas y, a veces, teletransportar alienígenas a diferentes lugares.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Captain Fizz Meets the Blaster-Trons (Europe) (En,Fr,De).zip.torrent

meta.name: Captain Fizz : Meets The Blaster-Trons
meta.desc: The Blaster-Trons have invaded the planet Icarus, which is set as 20 levels on top of the last. The people can only be saved if a hero or two step forward and reach each of the 20 lifts in this Gauntlet-style game. Two players is the ideal, as gameplay is simultaneous and only ever fills half the screen for each player. Each level has doors which are locked with colour coded keys, as well as doors which can only be used in one direction, and lots of long corridors and mazy layouts. Both yourself and the aliens are armed with lethal lazers, although you can take several hits before dying.

meta.name: Carrier Command
meta.desc:
Command Carrier está ambientada en 2166, cuando las pruebas nucleares han creado unas islas llenas de energía sin explotar. Un equipo de científicos ha desarrollado dos portaaviones para colonizar este archipiélago. Tras el robo del ACC Omega por la organización terrorista STANZA, el jugador toma el control del segundo portaaviones, el ACC Epsilon, para impedir que la facción contraria colonice las islas y destruir el prototipo robado. Para ello, cuenta con vehículos anfibios: las Morsas y aviones: las Mantas. El jugador tendrá que construir dispositivos de extracción de recursos y luego fabricar combustible, armas y edificios defensivos para tomar el control y defender las islas del archipiélago.
Los gráficos son en 3D y ofrecen una innovadora combinación de juego bélico y de acción. Hay muchos elementos de estrategia en tiempo real.

meta.name: Cartoon Capers
meta.desc:
Cartoon Capers es la combinación perfecta de combate desgarrador y humor desternillante, y es adecuado para todas las edades. Lanza pasteles de crema, explota a tus oponentes con una bomba bien dirigida, atraelos a un peso de una tonelada, déjalos inconscientes con puñetazos y patadas letales, y mucho más, en esta extravagancia adictiva para uno o dos jugadores.
Usando efectos de sonido muestreados, gráficos de estilo de dibujos animados de alta calidad y una dosis de humor potencialmente mortal, este impresionante juego debería llevar una advertencia de salud del gobierno.

meta.name: Catch 23
meta.desc: The CK23 is a plane that can take off and land like an ordinary plane, but can fly into space and orbit the earth for weeks on end. When it's ready it can swoop back to the earth destroying all in it's path. It's Development site is on a highly guarded mountainous deserted island surrounded by minefields, electric fences and numerous vehicle and foot patrols. The major problem is that it belongs to your enemy. You have been parachuted in (where you land is down to the wind) to enter the heart of the development complex, take the blueprints to the plane and set a time delay detonator in the nuclear reactor. You have eight hours till sunrise to complete your mission.

meta.name: Championship Baseball
meta.desc:
In this traditional baseball simulation, gameplay takes place mainly on a split screen.One side shows an overview of the field, the other showing the batter, with the latter view disappearing when the ball is hit.
The game requires you to "draft" a team before play, composing the best possible squad based on each player's skill attributes. The game also allows a semblance of managerial control, and has an optional batting practice mode to warm up. It then allows you to play individual games, or participate in a 4 division, 24-team championship.

meta.name: Championship Cricket
meta.desc: It used to be a game for gentleman and players but the demands of the sponsors, the media and club finances have made Cricket a game for professionals both on and off the pitch. Can you guide your team to the top and stay there? If so, then here's your chance! It's the ultimate challenge for any cricket enthusiast.

meta.name: Championship Wrestling
meta.desc:
Arcade-style game about wrestling, featuring 8 different characters, like K.C. Colossus or Prince Vicious, and 25 different moves, like leg drops, spin kicks, body slams, rope bouncing, flying drop kicks and the so-called "infamous" atomic drop. You can even throw your opponent off the ring. Scoring is based on the complexity of your moves.
Two-player hot-seat feature available as well, and up to 8 players can play in the same championship.

meta.name: Chase
meta.desc: In Chase the player takes the role of a hero who has to save the abducted princess Chardonnay. To do so, the hero mans a space ship and has to solve four levels with slightly different gameplay mechanics

meta.name: Chase H.Q.
meta.desc:
"Chase H.Q." es un juego de carreras basado en puntos de control en el que el jugador asume el papel de un policía encubierto llamado Tony Gibson en este juego inspirado en "Miami Vice" de Taito. Gibson conduce un poderoso coche de policía sin marcas (parecido a un Porsche 911) junto con su compañero, 'Raymond Broady' y debe perseguir y detener a varios criminales.
El jugador tiene entre cincuenta y cinco y setenta segundos para alcanzar al criminal que huye, y luego, en el mismo período de tiempo, vuelve a chocar repetidamente contra el coche del criminal hasta que éste queda demasiado dañado para conducir. El coche del criminal se aleja constantemente, así que si el jugador choca repetidamente o conduce demasiado despacio, el criminal escapará y el juego terminará.

meta.name: Chess Player 2150
meta.desc:
Chess Player 2150 is a chess program that performed well against other programs of the time and won the 1989 British Personal Computer Chess Championship. The author made no secret of his program's prowess. A drop-down menu within the program allows you to compare its performance against Chessmaster 2000, Chessmaster 2100, and Colossus X, in 10 games each.
The game was designed to improve over time, so that a game played against good players is much better than the one you started with. Users have the option to save their games so as not to lose any acquired knowledge.
Although the author clearly intended the game to be used by experienced chess players, he also included original chess pieces. One set includes farm animals (sheep pawns, dog rooks, horse knights, chicken bishops, cow queens and pig kings), another set includes science fiction pieces resembling aliens. The game is playable in 2D or 3D and includes digitized dialogue on the Amiga.

meta.name: Chess Player 2150
meta.desc:
Chess Player 2150 is a chess program that performed well against other programs of the time and won the 1989 British Personal Computer Chess Championship. The author made no secret of his program's prowess. A drop-down menu within the program allows you to compare its performance against Chessmaster 2000, Chessmaster 2100, and Colossus X, in 10 games each.
The game was designed to improve over time, so that a game played against good players is much better than the one you started with. Users have the option to save their games so as not to lose any acquired knowledge.
Although the author clearly intended the game to be used by experienced chess players, he also included original chess pieces. One set includes farm animals (sheep pawns, dog rooks, horse knights, chicken bishops, cow queens and pig kings), another set includes science fiction pieces resembling aliens. The game is playable in 2D or 3D and includes digitized dialogue on the Amiga.

meta.name: Chess Simulator
meta.desc: Chess Simulator is a chess game which offers the standard features: playing chess against the AI which can be set in a number of different levels suited for beginners and advanced players (the maximum ELO rating is 2150); optionally with an advice option which tries to teach chess to the player. Graphical features include a number of different pieces and the option to change the angle and zoom of the 3D playfield. Of course it is also possible to use a top-down perspective. The game also provides a way to calculate the user's ELO score: the program presents 24 situations and the player must provide likely moves within two minutes.

meta.name: The Chessmaster 2000
meta.desc:
Esta entrega de la serie Chessmaster presenta un poderoso oponente de ajedrez con 12 niveles de habilidad, desde principiante hasta gran maestro. Entre sus muchas funciones se incluye una biblioteca de aperturas formada por 71.000 jugadas y la posibilidad de ver el historial de jugadas.
Para ayudar a los principiantes, hay un modo de aprendizaje que muestra todas las jugadas legales, una jugada de sugerencia que ofrece lo que el ordenador cree que es una jugada fuerte, y la posibilidad de que el maestro de ajedrez analice todas las jugadas anteriores de una partida. También se ofrecen famosas posiciones de juego reales y desafíos preestablecidos.

meta.name: Chicago 30's
meta.desc:
Un juego de acción trepidante para los amantes de emociones fuertes.
Si decides entrar en acción, tu misión será guiar al mejor detective de la ?Poli? de Chicago, ?ELLIOT EL GRANDE?, hasta un almacén clandestino de bebidas.
Tendrás que salir del puerto, atravesar los bajos fondos, entrar en la ciudad y llegar al almacén; cuatro niveles plagados de peligros.
Tu habilidad y tu ametralladora serán los únicos aliados con que contar.
El juego de la ?PASMA? te dejará ?PASMADO?.

meta.name: Chips Challenge
meta.desc:
Chip McCallahan es un "nerd" al que le gustaría ser aceptado en el club de informática Bit Busters", presidido por Melinda, un portento de inteligencia. Pero para entrar en el club, tiene que demostrar su inteligencia superando una prueba de iniciación resolviendo los retos que componen los numerosos niveles del juego (hasta 149 según la versión).
Chip tendrá que recoger todas las fichas electrónicas de cada nivel antes de poder eliminar el "socket" que bloquea la salida. Para ello, tendrá que calcular el orden de sus acciones, abrir puertas cogiendo la llave adecuada, empujar bloques para bloquear pasadizos o crear otros, utilizar el accesorio adecuado para llegar a zonas mortales o infranqueables (escudo azul para el agua, rojo para el fuego, crampones para caminar sobre el hielo, imán para resistir campos magnéticos...). Los primeros niveles son un tutorial y la dificultad aumenta rápidamente.

meta.name: Chrono Quest II
meta.desc: The Explora II adventure game on Atari ST resumes at the end of the first episode. After the time tracker to find his father's killer, the player is stuck with the time machine in an unknown era. Problem: The machine can now only work with pieces of metal. You must then find metal knowing that different objects will lead you to various historical eras. Your goal is to return home in 1922.

meta.name: Chuckie Egg
meta.desc:
En Chucky Egg, juegas como Harry el Gallinero, que debe recoger una docena de huevos en cada nivel, mientras evita a los pájaros. Los niveles se componen de plataformas, escaleras y ascensores, y son similares al juego de plataformas Donkey Kong. También se puede recoger maíz, para aumentar los puntos y detener la cuenta atrás durante un tiempo, aunque los pájaros también pueden comerse estas semillas.
Sólo hay 8 niveles distintos. El noveno nivel es una copia del nivel 1, el décimo es una copia del nivel 2, y así sucesivamente.

meta.name: Chuckie Egg II
meta.desc:
Chuckie Egg II es la secuela del juego de plataformas Chuckie Egg, pero es muy diferente del juego original. Mientras que el juego original tiene ocho niveles de una pantalla cada uno, éste tiene muchas más pantallas que forman un laberinto.
En el juego, Hen House Harry tiene que construir un huevo de chocolate gigante con los ingredientes (cacao, leche y azúcar) que se encuentran en la fábrica. Debe haber ocho de cada. También tiene que encontrar las ocho piezas de un kit de juguetes para colocar dentro del huevo.
Para conseguir todos los objetos, tienes que abrirte camino por la fábrica, evitando muchos tipos diferentes de enemigos y resolviendo rompecabezas con la ayuda de varios objetos que puedes llevar. Hay varias formas de moverse por la fábrica, cruzando plataformas, pero también cuerdas y tuberías.
A pesar de los cambios radicales con respecto al original, el juego conserva la misma banda sonora.

meta.name: Clever & Smart
meta.desc:
Clever & Smart is an action game with puzzle elements, based on the Spanish comic book series Mortadelo y Filemón. The two protagonists are special agents and in this game they need to find Dr. Bakterius who was kidnapped by the competing agency OMA.
The main part of the game takes place on the city map which is shown from a top-down perspective (except persons, cars and trees). Here the protagonists need to explore the city and its sewers to find hints on Bakterius' location. However, there are many locations where Clever & Smart need to have certain items in their possession to proceed. For example to enter some houses Clever needs to use one of his trademark disguises or in the sewer they can tap telephone phone line with the right tools.
Another important resource is money which is used to buy items, disguises and food. The latter is essential for survival because a hunger value constantly rises when the heroes don't eat. Money is either earned by illegal activities like burglary or forging checks or by playing mini games like flipping coins or a snail race (Clever participating himself in disguise).

meta.name: Cloud Kingdoms
meta.desc:
Baron Von Bansai has stolen Terry's precious crystal collection and scattered it across 32 different realms. So Terry sets out to find it. From a bird's eye view, his challenge is to progress through these worlds, collecting keys to access different sections and avoiding enemy balls and insects by jumping on them whenever possible. There are no lives per se, but the game is limited to approximately 400 seconds, and dying sends you back to the beginning of the level, losing time. You do, however, get an extra 80 seconds for each level completed.
The levels present all sorts of other hazards: Holes in the floor to avoid (some visible, others hidden), arrows that force the ball in a particular direction, slippery tiles that exaggerate the effect of any movement, magnetized tiles that make jumping impossible, and many more. Fortunately, many bonuses, time bonuses and bonus fruits are also dropped at random intervals.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Conquests of Camelot - The Search for the Grail (Europe) (v1.019).zip.torrent
n: Conquests of Camelot - The Search for the Grail (Europe) (v1.019).zip

urls.label: Conquests of Camelot - The Search for the Grail (Europe) (v1.019).zip.torrent

meta.path: ./atarist TORRENTS/Conquests of Camelot - The Search for the Grail (Europe) (v1.019).zip.torrent
meta.name: Conquests Of Camelot : The Search For The Grail
meta.desc: It is the ninth century, and Camelot, the legendary castle ruled by King Arthur, has fallen under a curse. Famine and drought plague the kingdom because of the love triangle between the king, his wife Gwenhyver, and the knight Launcelot. It appears that only the mysterious Holy Grail can restore Camelot, and three knights - Launcelot, Gawaine, and Galahad - embark on a journey to find it, and soon disappear without trace. King Arthur leaves his castle in search of the missing knights, hoping to locate the Grail as well. His quest takes him to real and mythical locations in England, and later to Jerusalem and other areas of the Holy Land.
