meta.name: Continental Circus
meta.desc:
Continental Circus es un juego de carreras de Fórmula Uno en el que el jugador corre en varios circuitos de Grandes Premios Internacionales, intentando completar cada vuelta antes de que expire el tiempo límite. El juego presenta paradas en boxes y un clima dinámico, este último en forma de lluvia.
nnSi el coche del jugador es golpeado por un coche rival o golpea una barrera en la pista, el coche se dañará y empezará a echar humo. El jugador debe entrar en boxes lo antes posible para reparar el coche, de lo contrario el fuego se extenderá y el coche acabará explotando. Si el coche del jugador sufre una segunda colisión antes de llegar a la parada en boxes, el coche explotará, perdiendo un tiempo precioso antes de que aparezca un coche de sustitución.

meta.name: Corruption
meta.desc:
En Corruption el jugador toma el control de un corredor de bolsa que está de camino a la riqueza. De repente, hay intentos de asesinato y se escuchan las palabras "tratos con información privilegiada". El héroe es incriminado por un crimen que no cometió y debe demostrar su inocencia antes de que sea demasiado tarde.
El jugador ingresa comandos verbales para interactuar con el entorno y avanzar en la historia. La jugabilidad se centra en la investigación realista y la recopilación de información en lugar de la resolución de acertijos.

meta.name: Crack Down
meta.desc: Ben y Andy. los dos mejores agentes del Servicio Especial, acaban de aceptar una peligrosa misión, eliminar al Sr. K y a su Sistema de Vida Artificial. El Sr K planea acabar con todo tipo de vida humana en la tierra haciendo uso de los robots asesinos que él mismo ha creado. Sólo Ben y Andy podrán detenerle. Ayúdales a infiltrarse en la escalofriante ciudad del Sr. K. poner las bombas Clystron y salir corriendo antes de que exploten ¡Acabe con el Sr K!

meta.name: Cricket Captain
meta.desc:
Most of the important tactical decisions during the match are under cricket captains control as is the case in this simulation, where you can play or simply watch the match. The teams are real, but the players' names are fictional.
As a football manager, you must hire a coach, a scout and a physiotherapist to train your players and keep them fit and acquire new ones through a transfer market similar to that of football.
You must select your squad of 11 players before the match, with talented all-rounders being more common than in real life. The game includes the 4 major tournaments of the time: A single-division 4-day unlimited-overs league, the Sunday one-day league, and 2 cups.
The match view presents a plan view of the defensive setup and a forced perspective view of the batsman fielding a shot. You must time and place your shot in the right spot to score. When playing on the field, you can choose the bowler and change the layout of the field.

meta.name: Crystal Castles
meta.desc: Bentley Bear está atrapado en los castillos de cristal. Para salir, debe recoger todas las gemas que se encuentran en cada castillo. El juego se desarrolla en una falsa vista isométrica en 3D a través de castillos multiplataforma. Cuando Bentley recoge todas las gemas del nivel, pasa al siguiente castillo, más difícil. Bentley tendrá que evitar una gran variedad de criaturas peligrosas que deambulan por los niveles. De vez en cuando aparecerá un sombrero mágico. Si Bentley recoge el sombrero, será temporalmente invencible.

meta.name: Cyberball
meta.desc: Ábrete camino a golpes hasta el poste de la portería en Cyberball el deporte nacional del siglo XXI. Grandes Robots luchan a brazo partido por avanzar yardas en este campo de fútbol de metal crujiente del futuro. Y cuando la acción se torne crítica, ¡la pelota explotará!

meta.name: Cybercon III
meta.desc:
The world is in chaos, due to a computer system which was built to look after the world, but inevitably went wrong and started killing people. Only a few people remain, of which you are one, and your mission is to locate and destroy the Cybercon III computer.
The gameplay involves lots of exploration and puzzling, as you try to enter the complex and destroy or disable the hardware. Getting into the system is made easier by the presence of a secret entrance the computer doesn't know about. The computer has all manner of defences in place, which you can shoot out.

meta.name: Dames Simulator
meta.desc:
Dames Simulator is a computerized version of the famous board game called Checkers. The objective, as in all checkers games, is eat all the enemy pieces, before than the opponent.
In Dames Simulator the player has the opportunity to select the color of his pieces (Black or white), the enemy level (between nine levels), the strategy (Defensive or offensive). The player can also save the game in any moment. During the game, the player has the possibility to use the hint option, for advice on the best move to make.

meta.name: Darius +
meta.desc:
Darius was Taito's effort to compete in the arcades against the likes of R-Type and Gradius. Technically impressive, it featured three screens depicting the largest playfield seen in a game so far (the same system was employed for Ninja Warriors), with the player sitting atop a big set of loudspeakers. Visually and audibly, it was a league above Irem's and Konami's offerings.
When Taito (and others) ported the game to home machines, they were forced to shrink the playfield to fit in one single screen, and re-dubbed it Darius Plus.
The plot of Darius involves the two heroes Proco Jr. and Tiat Young fighting the menaces posed by galactic fish and other sea animals again their homeworld.
What sets Darius apart from other shoot'em-ups of the time is its way of letting the player choose his path with a certain amount of freedom. At the end of each area (level), you are able to choose between one of two worlds which the area branches into. This renders a higher replay value, since there are many paths to reach the end of the game by.
Apart from this, the gameplay is on the simplistic side, both due to unimaginative attack waves and little interaction with the surroundings, but mainly due to the very basic powerup system, which is nowhere near the complexity of the aforementioned R-Type's and Gradius'.

meta.name: Day Of The Viper
meta.desc:
The Sun League has been trying to fight back against the corrupted and oppressive Gar computer for many years. Now they have attacked a defense base. The only hope is for a Viper V droid to be sent in under your control to reactivate the planet's defenses.
To do this, you must find floppy disks that are everywhere in the station to reboot that evil computer! To complete this task, you must fight 33 types of little robots who attack you. The action is viewed in first-person 3D, with directional arrows on screen for movement and rotation.
There are 25 levels, each of which is automatically mapped as you explore it. Use turbolifts to get to them. Each object is managed by the game, and a notepad feature is provided to allow you to keep track of vital information.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Deja Vu - A Nightmare Comes True! (Europe).zip.torrent
n: Deja Vu - A Nightmare Comes True! (Europe).zip

urls.label: Deja Vu - A Nightmare Comes True! (Europe).zip.torrent

meta.path: ./atarist TORRENTS/Deja Vu - A Nightmare Comes True! (Europe).zip.torrent
meta.name: Deja Vu : A Nightmare Comes True!!
meta.desc: En Deja Vu, la acción tiene lugar en Chicago en diciembre de 1941. El nombre de su personaje Theodore "Ace" Harding - un boxeador retirado que trabaja como detective privado. Se despierta en un retrete de un pub de mala calidad sin recordar quién es ni lo que está haciendo allí. Para empeorar las cosas, pronto topas con un cadáver con tres balas enterradas en él. Efectivamente, encuentras que hay una pistola en el bolsillo con tres balas que faltan. Desde allí se tiene que averiguar lo que pasó y quién eres antes de que lo que está sucediendo a tu cerebro te convierta en un vegetal sin sentido. Por si fuera poco a la policía le gustaría mucho hablar contigo acerca del cadáver.

meta.name: Deliverance : Stormlord II
meta.desc:
Como en Stormlord, tienes que salvar al mayor número posible de hadas, esta vez atrapándolas en el cielo mientras caen. No es tan fácil como parece, ya que este juego de plataformas con desplazamiento tiene muchas secciones en las que las hadas caen hacia pozos ardientes, y tienes que atraparlas sin chocar con los pozos.
Los controles te permiten saltar y volver a saltar mientras caes, lo que te permite, con un poco de esfuerzo, subir casi hasta la parte superior de la pantalla. Las fuerzas de la Reina Negra están ahí para detenerte. Nubes y estalactitas en los techos liberan gotas mortales. Esporádicamente se ofrece un nivel de bonificación, que te permite recoger monedas para conseguir vidas extra.

meta.name: Demon Blue
meta.desc: In the game you are a small shaggy blue demon found himself in the dungeon full of fallen angels, gargoyles, wasps, etc. Walking through them you lose your energy, which is your life. So you have to run and jump avoiding them, collecting gems, blood drops, energy vials, and some sort of your friend-demons such as eyes and tongues. On each level you have to find the keys to open door to magical cauldron guarded by beautiful elf. Levels are decorated with statues of beautiful women, old men, dragons, swords, or eye walls.

meta.name: Demoniak
meta.desc:
Demoniak is an interactive fiction adventure in which the player guides four superheroes in an attempt to stop the evil Demoniak entering our dimension and doing dastardly things by sealing his gateway.
The player may 'become' another character at any time and give that character instructions, objects, such as weapons, may be passed from one character to another.

meta.name: Dick Tracy
meta.desc: Dick Tracy es un juego de acción basado en la película del mismo nombre. El jugador asume el papel de Dick Tracy, un detective cuya vida da un vuelco el día en que su suegro es asesinado por un gángster llamado Big Boy Caprice. Dick Tracy sumerge al jugador en un mundo oscuro en el que cada encuentro acaba en un baño de sangre. Avanzas con la pistola en la mano mientras los gángsters te disparan desde la calle o desde las ventanas de los edificios. Puedes luchar con tus puños, una pistola o una ametralladora.

meta.name: Disc
meta.desc:
Disc is a game of fast reflexes and clever thinking. You control one player against the computer or another person. The objective is to finish off your opponents by knocking him off the platforms or by making the platform disappear by hitting the walls behind your opponents. Your weapon is a disc, which you can throw at your opponent or at the walls. The disc will ricochet off the walls, opening a wide range of angles and attacks. You can also try a direct hit at your opponents, as enough of these will eliminate him as well, but be careful - since it gives him a chance to block your disc, thus gain control of it!
As you progress through the levels, from Novice, through Disciple, up to a Great Guide, your rivals become tougher, platforms take longer hits to disappear, and there are more discs on the playing field.

meta.name: Dizzy Dice
meta.desc:
Dizzy Dice is a gambling game simulating a fruit machine. You start with a fixed amount of cash. As you play and get winning combinations, you'll have to choose whether to collect or gamble what you've won. After completing the fruit machine game, you'll get the chance to play a dice game where you have to guess if the next throw will be higher or lower than the current one. 
Dizzy Dice features two game modes. The first one you play as a normal fruit machine. But then there also is the bank mode, where you start with $20 and need to reach $100 to break the first bank. In total there is five banks, each requiring more cash to win. The game is controlled using the keyboard.

meta.name: Double Dragon
meta.desc:
Set in a post-apocalyptic New York, Double Dragon is the story of Billy and Jimmy Lee, twin brothers trained in the fighting style of Sou-Setsu-Ken. Together, they manage a small martial arts training school, teaching their students in self-defense. One day, Billy's girlfriend, Marian, is kidnapped off the street by the "Black Warriors", a savage street gang led by a man named Willy. The Black Warriors demand the Lee brothers disclose their martial arts secrets in exchange for Marian's freedom. The Lee brothers set out on a rescue mission to crush the Black Warriors and save Marian.
Using whatever techniques they have at their disposal, from the basic punches and kicks to the invulnerable elbow strike, as well any weapon that comes into their hands, the Lee brothers must pursue the gang through the city slum, industrial area and the forest before reaching their hideout to confront the big boss, Willy.
The NES version of this game also has an additional VS. fighting mode for one or two players. Players choose from a field of six different characters (Billy and 5 of the enemy characters) and enter into a one-on-one fighting match. Players have to punch, kick, jumpkick, and even use a weapon against their opponents until someone's health bar is fully drained. The winner is the last one standing.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Double Dragon II - The Revenge (Europe) (v1.2) (Budget - 16 Blitz).zip.torrent
n: Double Dragon II - The Revenge (Europe) (v1.2) (Budget - 16 Blitz).zip

urls.label: Double Dragon II - The Revenge (Europe) (v1.2) (Budget - 16 Blitz).zip.torrent

meta.path: ./atarist TORRENTS/Double Dragon II - The Revenge (Europe) (v1.2) (Budget - 16 Blitz).zip.torrent
meta.name: Double Dragon II : The Revenge
meta.desc: The lovely Marian was rescued from the clutches of the Black Warriors gang by Billy & Jimmy Lee in the first Double Dragon game, but now the gang has killed her in retaliation of their early defeat. The Dragons must now embark on a mission to avenge her d

meta.name: Dragon Spirit
meta.desc:
La princesa Alicia del reino de Mitgult ha sido secuestrada por el monstruo Zawell (resucitado por Galda, que quiere conquistar el mundo). Ahora le toca al heroico guerrero Amul transformarse en un dragón azul e ir a rescatar a la princesa.
Dragon Spirit es un shoot-em-up de desplazamiento vertical que consta de nueve niveles. Los jugadores vuelan y destruyen todo lo que encuentran a su paso. La acción se desarrolla en dos niveles, tanto en el cielo como en el suelo. El dragón tiene dos tipos diferentes de ataques: fuego que sale disparado hacia arriba por la pantalla, y fuego que cae para golpear un punto en el suelo delante del dragón. Los enemigos están presentes en el suelo y en el aire.
El jugador puede recoger bonificaciones o mejoras (cabezas extra en el dragón, salud, disparos más rápidos, ...). Hay un jefe al final de cada nivel. Es mejor tener tantas mejoras como sea posible antes de este encuentro.

meta.name: Drakkhen
meta.desc:
ANHAK DRAKKHEN AGHNAHIR HURTHD!
The prophecy has been fulfilled. The world shall be ruled by the dragons. On an island far away, their lords prepare for the conquest of the lands. There is only one hope for mankind. The emperor sends out 4 heroes - warriors and magicians - to solve the Puzzle of Tears and prevent the invasion of the Drakkhen.
Drakkhen is a role-playing game with several ingenious features for its time. The eye-catcher is a mix of fast 3D landscapes and 2D interiors. The player's team will travel overland on a flat terrain made up of vectors with zoomed 2D objects (The same type of engine was later used in Eternam).
The player will encounter monsters and fight them in real-time combat and discover the palaces of the dragon lords. Indoors, the player has to find a way through the maze of chambers, solving puzzles and defeating the minions of the Drakkhen. Team members are depicted in 4 status window, thus allowing to see their current status and equipment at once.

meta.name: Driller
meta.desc:
El planeta Evath tiene dos lunas, Mitral y Triscupid. Mitral ha sido brutalmente explotada por unos forajidos, los Ketar, que han huido de la luna. En el subsuelo de Mitral se han formado grandes bolsas de gas, y si Mitral explota, miles de evathianos serán aniquilados al salir Evath de su órbita y la congelación acabará con toda la población del planeta. Los científicos han descubierto que un meteorito se aproxima y chocará contra Mitral en pocas horas, una auténtica catástrofe.
Tu misión es asegurar cada uno de los 18 sectores de Mitral colocando un equipo de perforación sobre las bolsas de gas que existen en cada sector antes de que el meteorito impacte contra el planeta.

meta.name: Dynasty Wars
meta.desc:
Conversion of the Capcom arcade to home computers. The player adopts the identity of an ancient Chinese warrior, and riding on horseback has to eliminate all his opponents, mostly infantry and archers.
The game uses a lateral scroll and the player can move in all four directions. A novelty is the attack system: when pressing fire the energy of the attack will load up as the warrior moves his spear up and backwards, in order to gain momentum. The more the player can keep fire pressed, the more powerful the attack will be.
The game spawned a sequel in the arcades, "Warriors of fate", and is not to be confused with the PSX game of the same title, which is a one-on-one fighting game.

meta.name: East Vs. West : Berlin 1948
meta.desc:
Shortly after the war, several countries want to control Berlin. An atomic bomb has been smuggled into the city by the Americans. You play an American spy, whose mission is to guard this bomb and not to let Stalin have it under any circumstances.
This is one of the early examples of a 3rd person perspective point & click adventure, the interface being slightly more complicated than the famous SCUMM system.

meta.name: Elemental
meta.desc:
Elemental is set on the planet of the same name. The player takes the role of a two-year old Roundline, basically a living ball, who has to pass the great ordeal.
Every of the 32 levels plays out on a non-scrolling field where the player has to evade two enemies and touch certain tiles. This causes objects to appear which can be picked up and dropped at another place. If an enemy touches an object, it transforms into a pill which also has to be picked up and dropped elsewhere. There are save tiles where the enemies can't touch the player.

meta.name: Elf
meta.desc: Elf is a 2D side-scrolling action game in fantasy world. The player controls a green-suited elf with bow and arrows, who must find 2 halves of golden pumpkins. He explores big levels, avoid traps, like spikes or holes (elf dies of a fall) and shoots various enemies, like skeletons giant flies or small humanoid creatures. One shot/contact with enemy and Elf loses life. He has limited arrows, but he can find new packs. The game has 8 levels.

meta.name: Elite
meta.desc:
Pilota tu nave espacial Cobra en un fantástico viaje de descubrimientos y aventuras, una prueba suprema de tus habilidades de combate, navegación y emprendimiento.
La mayor parte del juego consiste en viajar a diferentes sistemas estelares, comerciar con sus habitantes, ganar dinero y reputación. También se puede ganar dinero mediante misiones militares, caza de recompensas, minería de asteroides, ..... Cuando el personaje del jugador gana dinero, puede mejorar sus naves con mejores armas, escudos, mayor capacidad de carga, sistema de acoplamiento automático, etc.
Independientemente de cómo gane el dinero, por las buenas o por las malas, tendrá que correr por el espacio luchando contra naves piratas y alienígenas hostiles.

meta.name: Enterprise
meta.desc: Over the centuries mankind's origins have gradually been lost in his migration across many star systems. One of the main candidates for his origins and among the most densely populated and most pleasant of the inhabited worlds is Sola III. Still an important seat of the regional government, life on thee planet is threatened by the failure of the thin layer of Ozone which lies high up in the planet's atmosphere. The orbiting devices that maintain this layer require continuous supplies of six super heavy atomic nuclei. Relations with neighbouring star systems have recently deteriorated making access to these critical elements impossible. Can you locate the six elements and return them safely to Sola III? Enterprise is the perfect mix of strategy and action.

meta.name: Erik
meta.desc: Erik is a platform game that scrolls vertically but not horizontally. The titular hero is a friendly viking whose peaceful living is disrupted when the evil god Loki is reincarnated. Not happy with Erik's refusal to join the pursuits of more violent vikings, Loki casts a spell on the lands turning the world into a terrible place. Erik's now has to overcome all the dangers so that he once again can live in peace.

meta.name: Exolon
meta.desc:
Durante días y días tu viaje ha comenzado, desesperas de poder aterrizar tu nave espacial cuando, de repente, ves el final del viaje... El comité de bienvenida está en la cita. Tienes dos armas: la pistola o las granadas, estas últimas tienen la ventaja de atravesar también los muros gruesos o las paredes rocosas... Sin embargo, si los enemigos resultan ser numerosos, poderosos e indestructibles, no dudes en utilizar tu armadura hiperblindada: el exoesqueleto te protege mejor y te permite volar.
Exolon presenta unos gráficos compuestos por muchas pantallas de colores con una animación bastante buena. La progresión es lineal y puedes llenarte de energía y granadas por el camino.

meta.name: Eye Of Horus
meta.desc: As a mystical shaman, go through a pyramid in ancient Egypt to get the magical eye of horus. In a cool twist, by pressing the up arrow you turn into a birdy and can search through the levels. Just press the down arrow and voila! Human again. Many traps try to trick you.

meta.name: F-19 Stealth Fighter
meta.desc:
Rule the night! Take the pride of American Stealth technology and take on the best the Warsaw pact technology can offer! Dodge between radars, sneak under enemy fighters, and take out your primary objectives and secondary objectives with your limited weapons onboard, then make your way home. Can you survive all the way to general and win the Congressional Medal of Honor?
F-19 Stealth Fighter was based around Sid Meier's closest estimate of the stealth fighter based on the data available at the time. You get full 3D graphics, 3D enemies, random objectives and enemy dispositions (so each mission will be different), dynamic radar effectiveness that depends on your position and radar cross section, enemies that search you out if you do "tickle" their defenses, even civilian aircrafts in the air, and ability to play in cold war, moderate war, or all-out war, with very different rules of engagement.

meta.name: Face-Off
meta.desc:
The action in this ice hockey game is viewed from a side-scrolling perspective with a semi-3D effect. The puck loosely sticks to the player as he skates, and the netminders are CPU-controlled. Fights and penalties can be turned on or off, and the length of the match can be varied. 
As well as individual one or two player modes, a full managerial mode is included. This sees you take control of an international team and guide them through a full schedule of matches, including developing their skills and team-work.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Fire and Forget II - The Death Convoy (Europe).zip.torrent
n: Fire and Forget II - The Death Convoy (Europe).zip

urls.label: Fire and Forget II - The Death Convoy (Europe).zip.torrent

meta.path: ./atarist TORRENTS/Fire and Forget II - The Death Convoy (Europe).zip.torrent
meta.name: Fire And Forget II : The Death Convoy
meta.desc:
En un incierto futuro postapocalíptico, el mundo está plagado de grupos terroristas que amenazan la poca civilización que aún existe intentando destruir las ciudades supervivientes con explosiones nucleares.
En cinco niveles, deberás alcanzar a un mortífero convoy para destruirlo. Hordas de enemigos, cada uno tan sorprendente como el siguiente, intentarán oponerse a ellos. Bípedos mecánicos, sidecares agresivos, torretas trípode y otros objetos voladores no identificados recorren a toda velocidad la carretera entre el jugador y el camión objetivo. Su vehículo ya puede desplazarse por el aire. Es cierto que la opción está sujeta a un medidor de energía, pero puede activarse en cualquier momento, siempre que tengas energía suficiente.

meta.name: Flimbo's Quest
meta.desc:
Rescuing girlfriends is a pretty common challenge in older computer games - why can't any of these ladies look after themselves? On this occasion Pearly has been kidnapped by Fransz Dandruff, so you'd better make sure he's hair today, gone tomorrow.
The gameplay is platform based, although you can move down platforms as well as up to the next one. There are lots of baddies (drawn in a cutesy style) who need shooting and offer rewards. the 7 levels are fairly short, relatively easy, and linear.

meta.name: Football Manager 2
meta.desc:
El inventor del juego de fútbol más vendido del mundo (KEVIN TOMS) vuelve con otro gran éxito. Ha creado este excelente juego después de años de investigación y duro trabajo. El resultado ha sido esta obra maestra.
Football Manager 2 no es solamente una mejora de Football Manager 1. Es la nueva generación. Con nuevos factores como marcajes hombre a hombre, selección de formaciones y sustituciones, ?tackling?, cruces y estiradas del portero, etc. Está lleno de acción y los gráficos son espectaculares.
ESTE JUEGO TE DARÁ DIVERSIÓN INTERMINABLE, AÑÁDELO A TU COLECCIÓN.

meta.name: Foundation's Waste
meta.desc:
As per your instructions, all routes from the Waste have now been made impassable.
However, agent Einholts probability calculations sugggest a low order loophole to the UNISECT INC. Galaxy Perimeter.
Analysis of data is as yet incomplete, but we must admit the possibility of a single-craft jump from the penal landing strip, a weak point in our internal and external transit defences.
All positions have been alerted to this route, with "capital" dissentive for non-diligence.
In honour of the Emperor.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Foundation's Waste (Europe) (Coverdisk - The One - Issue 22) (Amiga + ST).zip.torrent
n: Foundation's Waste (Europe) (Coverdisk - The One - Issue 22) (Amiga + ST).zip

meta.name: Foundation's Waste
meta.desc:
As per your instructions, all routes from the Waste have now been made impassable.
However, agent Einholts probability calculations sugggest a low order loophole to the UNISECT INC. Galaxy Perimeter.
Analysis of data is as yet incomplete, but we must admit the possibility of a single-craft jump from the penal landing strip, a weak point in our internal and external transit defences.
All positions have been alerted to this route, with "capital" dissentive for non-diligence.
In honour of the Emperor.

meta.name: Full Metal Planete
meta.desc:
Conectado con el juego de mesa del mismo nombre, bastante desconocido pero realmente brillante. Hasta cuatro jugadores aterrizan en un planeta con sus naves nodrizas e intentan recolectar la mayor cantidad posible de minerales en 24 rondas de juego.
Esto casi suena como una feliz e idílica ronda de recolección de flores... si no fuera por el camión lleno de tanques y destructores que cada jugador tiene en el área de carga de su nave nodriza. Por lo tanto, los jugadores suelen pasar la misma cantidad de tiempo recogiendo mineral y golpeando las cabezas de sus contrincantes.

meta.name: Future Basketball
meta.desc: One of the first Speedball clones takes the basic court layout of basketball as its inspiration. There are 5 players on each team, on a small court with 2 and 3 point shooting areas. The difference is that physical contact of a fairly violent nature is allowed, and the court is littered with mines and bombs to wound the players. Shooting involves holding down fire to get the height right, so avoid being tackled as you prepare your shot. Other basketball rules such as double-dribbling and the 25-second hand-over are unsurprisingly waived. A 3-division league is included to progress through.

meta.name: Future Wars : Time Travellers
meta.desc: En 1989, un simple limpiacristales trabaja frente a un rascacielos. Justo cuando está a punto de gastarle una broma a su descontento jefe, nuestro insólito héroe descubre un pasadizo secreto que conduce a una máquina del tiempo, así como unos misteriosos documentos extraterrestres. Al activar el dispositivo, el protagonista se encuentra de nuevo en 1304, donde se le encomienda una misión aparentemente ordinaria: debe salvar a una dama en peligro. Pero pronto se enfrenta a una amenaza mucho mayor: una invasión mundial de alienígenas. El héroe deberá viajar al lejano futuro del siglo 44, finalmente, al pasado aún más lejano del período Cretácico para desbaratar sus planes.

meta.name: Galaxy Force II
meta.desc: You are strapped into a spaceship to take on five dangerous settings, ranging from a pleasant garden to hostile fire and tough ice. You will have to fly freely before cutting through tunnels and canyons, and finally destroying an alien base. Your energy read out starts at 1200 and decreases as shots hit you, or you make contact with a wall or blockage. You have infinite cannons and guided missiles to help you along. You can get regular energy recharges and power upgrades, by shooting and then collecting their carrier pods.

meta.name: Game Over II
meta.desc:
The Serena Commander have the mission to rescue his companion of expedition captured in Moon 4 of System Sotpok, better known like the world Phantis, an unusual place inhabited by a hostile fauna and exuberant flora.
Phantis is an horizontal shooter (R-Type like), combined with platform arcade levels (Turrican like). You have 24 different enemies to beat throughout 4 phases and 6 levels.
This program has two parts, recorded individually on cassette versions. In order to play the second, it's necessary to discover the access code, which is granted when finishing the first.That procedure was called FX Doble Carga (FX Double Charge), and designed to give more hours of addictive playing.

meta.name: Gazza's Super Soccer
meta.desc:
This was the first of the two football games licensed around Paul Gascoigne, then the most expensive player in British football history. The game is viewed top down, and can be set to either move left-right or top-bottom.
League and cup tournaments are included, as are single matches and set-piece practice sections (you have full control of these). The gameplay involves a number of advanced moves, and includes a gauge to control the exact dimensions of a kick (height and curl as well as strength), if you can use it quickly enough. Unusually, you have control over the goalkeeper, so can only blame yourself when you concede a goal. The players each have their own skills and strengths, and these develop as the game goes on – if you play well, your players become better, and more capable of facing better opposition.

meta.name: Gemini Wing
meta.desc:
Los humanos y los alienígenas viven en armonía en el futuro, hasta que un periodista sensacionalista aviva el odio hacia los alienígenas. Estos responden invadiendo el planeta, y depende de ti resolver una situación inquietantemente similar a la realidad en esta conversión arcade.
Gemini Wing es un shoot 'em up de desplazamiento vertical, que se distingue por su inusual sistema de power-ups. En lugar de obtener fichas ocasionales que conducen a mejoras duraderas en el armamento, se liberan ráfagas ocasionales de fichas para asegurar una rápida mejora del fuego. Los fondos orgánicos son detallados y tienen muchas secciones que te disparan.

meta.name: Get Dexter
meta.desc: Controlas a Crafton, un androide que busca escapar del centro de investigación en el que está prisionero. Para hacerlo, tienes que juntar los 8 pedazos de código que le permiten abrir la puerta de salida tras localizar los 8 científicos que los poseen. También debes prestar atención a los enemigos que surcan las diferentes localizaciones del complejo.

meta.name: GFL Championship Football
meta.desc:
This is one of the earliest team sport games to use a first-person view – the packaging mocks the Xs and Os used to represent players in contemporary Gridiron games. What you see is what the player sees – control and viewpoint passes from the kicker to the receiver on a punt or kickoff and the quarterback to the running back or receiver on a pass or kick. Releasing passes involves rotating the controls to select the pass direction. To take the ball, aim the visible hands in the centre of the screen.
There are 28 teams split into 4 divisions. Their names are fictional (including the Seagulls, Mustangs and Geronimos) and each is rated out of 3 on 8 areas of skill. Matches last for 4 quarters of either 4 or 7 minutes' in-play time. Menus to select plays or teams involve using diagonal movements for selection.
Standard Gridiron rules apply. Gain 10 yards in 4 attempts (downs) without fumbling or having a pass intercepted. Kick a punt or field goal if you are about to fail at this.

meta.name: Ghosts 'n Goblins
meta.desc: Ghosts'n Goblins is a sideways scrolling action platformer spread over six levels, each of which must be completed within three minutes (or a life is lost), taking in forest, mountain and cavern settings.Arthur the brave knight must rescue his lady from t

meta.name: Ghouls 'n Ghosts
meta.desc: 3 years ago (in Ghosts 'N' Goblins), Arthur the brave knight saved Princess PrinPrin from the Dark Prince, Lucifer, and drove his evil forces back into the Underworld. Now, something sinister is again stirring...monsters had returned to attacking the king

meta.name: Go-Moku And Renju
meta.desc: The Go-Moku (or also called Gomoku) board game is played on a 15x15 board with each player is allowed to place one stone at a time. The goal is to get a row of five stones in any direction (even diagonal). As it is proven that the starting player always can win if playing correctly, the Renju variant with slightly modified starting rules applies to prevent the advantage of the first player. The game features both variants, it can even alter the board size (9x9, 11x11, 13x13 and 15x15). It comes with an AI that can be adjusted in playing levels (from 1 to 9). Also, help can be shown and there is an undo function for any turns.

meta.name: Goofy's Railway Express
meta.desc: Este juego presenta a Goofy y Mickey viajando en tren. Es un videojuego educativo en 2D centrado en el reconocimiento de colores, formas y matemáticas.

meta.name: Gravity
meta.desc:
Gravity is an isometric-perspective action game whose gameplay centers around maneuvering a spaceship around a three-dimensional isometric grid in an attempt to colonise planets. Centers of gravity create "pits" on that grid, which are the basic obstacles to maneuver around.
An alien species called "Outies" plans on transforming all suns of the galaxy into black holes. They feed off raw energy, and as black holes are a good source of that, they attempt to create as many as possible of them. The player is sent out in a scout ship to colonise worlds in an attempt to gain resources to use for battling the Outies.

meta.name: Growth
meta.desc:
Growth is an arcade game loosely extending the Arkanoid principle, shifting the focus from the classic ball and bat schema more on the shooting bat extra weapon of Arkanoid and only adding he ball as bonus.
The player controls the bat and can not only move it at the bottom of the screen, but also around the screen borders, so you can move it to the left, right and top of the screen as well. The bat have shooting abilities by default, which is badly required, as the eye in the center of the screen is constantly popping up new stones to the playfield. A life is lost if the growing stone formation is reaching any border. The goal in most levels is to simply destroy the eye in the center of the screen, which can be achieved by shooting through the stones until the eye itself can be hit while controlling the expansion of the stones.

meta.name: Guardian Angel
meta.desc:
In the future NYC has become inhospitable and depraved, with thugs lining every street waiting to pounce on ordinary civilians. Thankfully Freddy Hardest is on hand to face up to the baseball bats and knives, in a side-scrolling beat 'em up game.
As with any Dinamic title, the difficulty level is set high. A few kicks and punches are available to you, and you have one life with energy which depletes as you get hit, but can be recharged by finding a safe space to stand still.

meta.name: The Guild of Thieves
meta.desc: As a beginner and inducted into the "Guild Of Thieves", you must steal your way to the top - the Guildmaster is there to not only help you, but to make your life a living hell. Worst of it all is you're STILL in the land of Kerovnia.....if something makes it look tough to solve, that's nothing for a puzzle - something else will screw it up more.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Hacker II - The Doomsday Papers (Europe).zip.torrent

meta.name: Hacker II : The Doomsday Papers
meta.desc:
Hacker II: The Doomsday Papers is a real-time strategy game. It is the sequel to Hacker.
Once again you hack into a computer system, just to end up saving the world. Hacker II: The Doomsday Papers opens with the console to the "Actisource" computer hotline system (a nice self-ironic pun - although nobody knows why a serious hacker might want to crack a help service for computer games...). However, your quiet little hack is soon disturbed: The government wants you for a secret mission. It, again, involves a robot drone and you're the one at the remote control. Although this time, it's not the whole globe that's your playground, but a high security facility in Russia, where the plans for global domination are hidden.

meta.name: Hammerfist
meta.desc:
In a grim future, the people are kept under control by a horde of genetically-modified beings who look identical to everyone else, and appear to act the same, but are subtly controlling minds and actions. This works perfectly for Centro-Holographis until two of their droids, Hammerfist (male) and Metalisis (female) malfunction. They try to put things right, and come under your control in this side-view action game with adventure elements.
You can switch between the two characters at any moment, and must use this wisely as their abilities differ greatly. On each screen you must kill all enemies, as well as taking out the robots which keep the doors locked.

meta.name: Hard Nova
meta.desc: Take control of your own team of high-tech mercenaries in this sci-fi role-playing game.  Pick your team and take on dozens of missions in four star systems, each increasing in difficulty and profitability.  Gameplay features three different real-time combat systems: deep space, air combat within a planet's atmosphere, and ground battles on the surface.

p: atarist TORRENTS/HardBall! (Europe) (Compilation - Accolade All Time Favourites).zip.torrent

meta.name: Hardball!
meta.desc: Hardball is a baseball action game for one or two players. You can throw a variety of pitches from fast balls to curve balls, steal bases, select team members, and substitute players as the game is played.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Harley-Davidson - The Road to Sturgis (Europe).zip.torrent

meta.name: Harley-Davidson : The Road To Sturgis
meta.desc: It's just 10 days away from the great bike drop bash happening at Sturgis South Dakota, and you're miles away! Ride your Harley through the open countryside to get there in time. You must dodge fallen rocks, automobiles, outrun the police, and rescue a few wayward females with car troubles along the way. During your adventure, you'll be required to upgrade your motorcycle, join cycling events in local towns, and talk to natives in the local stores. Once you get to Sturgis, then the real fun begins!

meta.name: Hellraider
meta.desc:
You are a commander of HMS Raider, on a daring privateer raid into the extremities of the planet Hell. Your mission is to collect diamonds from this hellish planet. Fly around, collect diamonds and shoot all incoming enemies. 
Only your HMS Raider can collect diamonds. There are four fighters inside your Raider, called Orbitals. You can use them to survey the area and destroy enemies while your mothership keeps collecting diamonds automatically or by another player. If orbital is used, camera follows it, so stay close to Raider if another player is controlling it. It is hard to collect diamonds if can't see them or yourself)

Guild Of Thieves, The

meta.image: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Mercenary - Escape from Targ & The Second City (Europe) (Compilation - Premier Collection II).zip-image.jpg
meta.marquee: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Mercenary - Escape from Targ & The Second City (Europe) (Compilation - Premier Collection II).zip-marquee.png

meta.name: Hill Street Blues
meta.desc:
Hill Street Blues is a top-down action / strategy mix.
“Let’s be careful out there!”
Based on the ‘80s TV drama series Hill Street Blues, this game puts you in the role of Captain Furillo of the Hill Street police department. Crime rates are soaring in the precinct, and it’s up to your team of nine officers (all well-known from the series and with digitized portraits) to keep the streets safe.
Your officers move on foot or by car on a 2D top-down map of the city, complete with real-time traffic. True to the series, each day starts with a roll call from Sgt. Esterhaus. Once on duty, listen to radio operator A.J. Hill report crimes every few minutes. Deploy officers to the scene, help the victim and call an ambulance or coroner; next, identify and find the suspect. Some criminals may flee, others even shoot at you. Give chase or open fire if necessary. When the bad guy is arrested, a court trial may follow.
Hill Street Blues is controlled entirely with the mouse via a set of icons – that’s everything but intuitive, especially when directing a single officer through the streets. Since there will soon be multiple crimes all over the city, the challenge is to co-ordinate multiple officers simultaneously and keep track of cases and suspects. If your success rate is high enough, you will ultimately be promoted to chief of police.

meta.name: Hostages
meta.desc: Unos terroristas han asaltado una embajada y mantienen como rehenes a las personas que se encuentran en su interior. Controlas a agentes antiterroristas cuya misión es eliminar a los secuestradores. En la primera parte del juego, tienes que colocar a tus hombres en posición para que puedan disparar contra el edificio. La segunda parte consiste en entrar en el edificio para matar a los terroristas y rescatar a los rehenes. Dependiendo de cómo hayas colocado a tus francotiradores, también puedes utilizarlos para que te ayuden en esta sección del juego.

meta.name: Hotshot
meta.desc:
A simple two-player game released to much marketing fanfare, Hotshot places you and another player (either another person or an AI robot) in an arena split down the middle into two save for a hole about half the screen's height for the ball to travel through, with a series of bricks on each side to destroy.
The aim of the game is to destroy your own bricks before your opponent can destroy his. This is achieved by catching the small by pointing your suction device at it and holding fire, and then releasing in the needed by letting go of the button. This is easier said than done, as the ball neither moves in a straight line or according to the natural rules of.gravity.
Should either player be hit with the ball and not catch it properly, they will be knocked down and possession of the ball is passed to the other player.

meta.name: Hound Of Shadow, The
meta.desc: A text adventure game set in HP Lovecraft themes in 1920's.

meta.name: Hunter Killer
meta.desc: Relive the war in the pacific: Experience the reality of commanding an American World War II combat submarine operating in the south pacific. Master the controls of your vessel, then embark on a series of missions - from straightforward 'search and destroy' sorties to detailed escort duties modelled on real WWII campaigns. Eleven different submarines are featured, with fourteen seperate missions to attempt at a range of difficulty levels.

meta.name: Hyperbowl
meta.desc:
Hyperbowl is a one-on-one futuristic sport viewed from above, with a small amount of the rectangular pitch visible at a time. Each player controls one of the 10 available spaceships, each with their own subtle strengths and weaknesses in terms of speed, inertia and fire direction. A scanner shows the positions of both ships and the ball, so that things don't become disorientating.
The aim is to guide the ball either into a 'goal' in the middle of each end (scoring 2 points) or onto the goal-line elsewhere (scoring one point). The ball can be steered either by hitting it with the ship or by shooting at it with your craft's beam (which does not injure or impede the opposition craft in any way). In either case the ball moves in a semi-random direction similar to the one you directed it in, but can rebound off the plus-shaped divots in the wall unexpectedly.

meta.name: I, Ball
meta.desc: Terry Ball (terrible, ¿lo entiendes?) ha secuestrado a Lover Ball, No Ball, Eddy Ball y Glow Ball, y I,Ball debe rescatarlos a través de 16 fases. La jugabilidad se basa en el shoot 'em up, con los 16 niveles desplazándose verticalmente. Están llenos de peligros que van desde...

p: atarist TORRENTS/Ice Hockey aka Face Off (Europe).zip.torrent

meta.name: Face Off
meta.desc:
Face Off, not to be confused with Face-Off, is a an action-oriented ice hockey game played from a top-down perspective. The player directly controls one of the five field athletes. The action button either initiates a shot (when in control of the puck) or a foul (when the opponent team is in control). When the action shifts near the own goal, the player also controls the diving movement of the goal keeper.
Besides a single match, the player can also compete in a cup tournament or a league, both with eight teams total. Other options which may be changed are the team colors, the team names, the length of a period (5, 10 or 20 minutes), the number of players (one or two) as well as one of four difficulty levels when playing against the AI.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (USA).zip.torrent
n: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (USA).zip

urls.label: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (USA).zip.torrent

meta.path: ./atarist TORRENTS/Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (USA).zip.torrent
meta.name: Indiana Jones And The Temple Of Doom
meta.desc:
Juegas como Indy, que debe atravesar tres niveles que se repiten.
Nivel Mina: Ábrete paso a latigazos por una mina para liberar a los niños atrapados en su interior. Usa tu látigo para balancearte por los abismos, subir escaleras, rodar por las cintas y defenderte de los ataques de varios enemigos. Escapa con el carro de la mina después de liberar a todos los niños.
Nivel del carro minero: Elige la ruta correcta a través de una red de vías de tren montando en un carro minero. Evita baches, raíles rotos y guardias para llegar sano y salvo al final del camino.
Nivel del templo: Dirígete al altar y coge la Piedra de Sankara mientras Mola Ram, los murciélagos y los guardias Thuggee te atacan. Ten cuidado con la lava.
meta.image: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (USA).zip-image.jpg
meta.video: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/videos/Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (USA).zip-video.mp4

meta.thumbnail: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (USA).zip-thumb.jpg
meta.fanart: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (USA).zip-fanart.jpg
meta.manual: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/manuals/Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (USA).zip-manual.pdf
meta.boxback: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (USA).zip-boxback.jpg

meta.name: International Ninja Rabbits
meta.desc: Having saved the day by destroying a chemical plant in Ninja Rabbits, Bugs must now travel the world and destroy several more chemical plants to save the environment from pollution. To get to each plant our hero must walk from left to right on a scrolling side view game. Bugs doesn't just have to travel above ground but has the option in various places to go underground as well.

meta.name: International Truck Racing
meta.desc:
Este juego de carreras de vista aérea es una simulación seria del emocionante deporte de las carreras de camiones. Esto explica el desplazamiento aparentemente lento, desigual y colisiones desvencijadas, ya que así es como se manejan los camiones reales.
Hay 6 camiones en cada carrera, que tienen lugar en famosos circuitos internacionales. Cada dos vueltas debe repostar, lo que se hace conduciendo a los boxes y recogiendo la bandera en el color de su automóvil. Los 3 primeros clasificados en cada carrera suman puntos, y debes terminar entre los 3 primeros para avanzar a la siguiente ronda.

meta.name: Interphase
meta.desc:
Dreams are made by The Dreamtrack Corporation, a group of evil subliminal-messengers whose intention is to destroy the minds of the minority of people capable of interpreting other people's dreams and live them out through entertainment. That's the story in this distinctly Cyberpunk-inspired title, and you play Chad, the man who discovers this secret, and aims to put an end to it.
Your task on each level is to clear a path for Kaf-E, your girlfriend, to be able to progress to the heart of the Dreamtrack HQ, getting past each of the myriad of security systems they have built up. A map must be used to navigate the route through the systems, with lots of information readily available.
The basic gameplay sees you darting through 3D tunnels using the mouse, and is like a prototype Descent, with your ship kitted out with cannons and missiles, with each enemy better dealt with by one or the other.
As well as ensuring your own survival, you must guide Kaf-E through the levels by blasting out the correct sections to clear a path for her. As she has no intelligence, and simply walks into walls, this element can be compared to Lemmings.

meta.name: Italy 1990
meta.desc: World Class Soccer is a soccer (football) game that ties in with the 1990 football World Cup. The game uses a top-down perspective for matches and features the full World Cup structure and all the 24 teams who were involved. Multiple formations and team selections are available before each match. The ball sticks to the feet of the players, who can be tackled either by doing a block tackle, or attempting a slide tackle, which risks giving away a foul. Matches can vary between 4 and 90 minutes, and each player has differing skills and behaviour style depending on his team's relative ability.

meta.name: Ivanhoe
meta.desc: A scrolling beat 'em up along the lines of the Streets of Rage series. Our hero is armed with a sword. He must progress through lots of tough levels in order to save the princess. He has various ways of slashing at opponents with his sword. The game features large characters with animation indicating clumsy lumbering movement.

meta.name: James Pond : Underwater Agent
meta.desc: "James Pond" is (obviously) a parody on the famous agent 007 stories. You control Pond, a fish-like creature, who has to complete several missions, while making his way through levels full of dangers and hostile creatures. It is not a typical "jump and run" game: instead of breezing through large levels, Pond has to complete unique missions for each game area: free hostages, detonate a structure, find keys, etc. It is possible to exit a level only after having completed the objective. Many missions are timed.

p: atarist TORRENTS/James Pond II - Codename RoboCod (Europe).zip.torrent

meta.name: James Pond II : Codename Robocod
meta.desc: En su segunda aventura, James Pond debe recuperar los juguetes que el Dr. Maybe ha robado. Pond ha sido armado con un dispositivo de estiramiento estilo Inspector Gadget, que puede usar para ver áreas más altas o arañar los techos para deslizarse a través de ellos. La jugabilidad se lleva a cabo en mundos temáticos en torno a determinados tipos de juguetes, como artículos deportivos, dulces y aviones. Los niveles se desplazan hacia los lados, aunque se incluye una pequeña cantidad de movimiento vertical. En cada nivel, Pond debe recolectar 2 pingüinos y llegar a la salida, aunque generalmente hay varias salidas y muchas áreas secretas para explorar.

meta.name: Jewels Of Darkness
meta.desc:
This is a collection of three previously-published Rainbird interactive fiction (with graphics) games. It contains:
1. Adventure Quest
2. Colossal Adventure
2. Dungeon Adventure

meta.name: Kick Off 2
meta.desc:
The original Kick Off was expanded on in many ways for this sequel. The game now features full tournament modes (although the players on the teams are fictitious) and four different pitches (including an implementation of plastic pitches, whose uneven bounce cause controversy when several British clubs tried them in the 1980s).
Viewed top-down, the controls involve trapping the ball under your foot, giving you time to prepare passes. Running with the ball is tricky at first, as it doesn't stick to your foot the way it did in contemporary football games. Complex moves such as overhead kicks, back-heels and long-range through-ball passes can be completed with practice.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Kick Off 2 - Return to Europe (Europe) (v2.1e).zip.torrent

meta.name: The Killing Cloud
meta.desc:
Killing Cloud is set in a San Francisco ravaged by an opaque orange death smog layer known as the Killing Cloud. This hovers around the middle of the skyscrapers, creating a claustrophobic low level experience (and a different feel to the many other flight simulations set in the city, such as F/A-18 Interceptor).
In this maelstrom, the Black Angel gang is terrorising the public. The player is a member of the SFPD Police force, charged with bringing them down throughout ten missions. Some are out-and-out action while others are more strategic. You can only survive for 20 minutes in the smog, so time is crucial in these missions.

p: atarist TORRENTS/King's Quest III - To Heir is Human (Europe) (v1.02) (11.18.86).zip.torrent

meta.name: King's Quest III : To Heir Is Human
meta.desc: King's Quest III: To Heir is Human is an adventure game similar in basic gameplay mechanics to its predecessor The player navigates Gwydion with arrow keys and interacts with the environment by typing verb and noun combination commands. Llewdor consists of interconnected screens that loop once the player character reaches the border of the land. Throughout the course of the game, Gwydion will also travel to other locations and have a magic map at his disposal, allowing him to teleport to different areas.

meta.name: Klax
meta.desc: An action/puzzle game, the object is to catch assorted color falling tiles and create rows, columns, or diagonals of a single color. Each level requires a different pattern to be made, and the tiles fall faster, more at a time, and in an increasing number of colors as the game progresses.

meta.name: Laser Squad
meta.desc:
En Laser Squad, controlas a un grupo de soldados que parecen marines espaciales (y a veces cyborgs). Antes de llevarlos a la batalla (vista desde arriba y avanzando por turnos), debes comprarles armas y armaduras con una cantidad predeterminada de créditos, teniendo en cuenta las habilidades individuales de tu escuadrón. Los soldados no ganan experiencia con el tiempo.
Se ofrecen tres misiones:
1: The Assassins: en la que tendrás que enfrentarte a Sterner Regnix y sus guardias.
2: Moonbase Assault: te reta a destruir la base de datos de OmniCorp.
3: Rescue from the Mines : debes evitar la violencia en favor de una misión de rescate.

meta.name: Last Ninja III
meta.desc: The third in the Last Ninja series sees you as Armakuni, the Last Ninja. He is drawn again into a battle with evil Shogun Kunitoki. The battle will take place among the temples of Tibet, the source of the Last Ninja's mystical strength. The Shogun intends to corrupt these Buddhist temples, to destroy the source of power for Armakuni and his emerging Ninja brotherhood. Armakuni must stop the Shogun's evil scheme. The game retains the mix of martial arts combat (hand-to-hand and with various weapons), puzzles involving various objects you find on your way, and navigating your way around obstacles. However, it also introduces Bushido, necessary to complete each level. Bushido is earned by fighting honorably, by fighting enemies with the same weapon as them or in hand-to-hand combat, and not fleeing from a battle. The levels correspond to the elements that combine to make up a Ninja's power, Earth, Water, Wind, Fire and Void.

meta.name: Leader Board Pro Golf Simulator
meta.desc:
Before the long-running Links series, Access produced the Leader Board lineage, which concludes here. Wind, snap and power are the main considerations as you dodge the bunkers, water and rough which make for more complex courses than the 8-bit versions of the original.
A course editor is provided.  The courses provided include real courses like St. Andrews, a fictional designs such as The Gauntlet, which as the name suggests is designed to push your skills to the maximum.
The PC version revolutionized the use of the PC speaker to reproduce voice samples via their patented "RealSound" process. Quips like "No doubt about it, he's deep in the sandtrap", "Straight onto the fairway", and "Looks like he hit the tree, Jim." are used to provide running commentary on the gameplay.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Leisure Suit Larry in - The Land of the Lounge Lizards (Europe) (v1.04) (6.18.87).zip.torrent
n: Leisure Suit Larry in - The Land of the Lounge Lizards (Europe) (v1.04) (6.18.87).zip

urls.label: Leisure Suit Larry in - The Land of the Lounge Lizards (Europe) (v1.04) (6.18.87).zip.torrent

meta.path: ./atarist TORRENTS/Leisure Suit Larry in - The Land of the Lounge Lizards (Europe) (v1.04) (6.18.87).zip.torrent
meta.name: Leisure Suit Larry In The Land Of The Lounge Lizards
meta.desc:
Leisure Suit Larry in the Land of the Lounge Lizards is the first game in Al Lowe's Leisure Suit Larry series, largely inspired by the text adventure Softporn Adventure.
Larry, the game's protagonist, is a short, tacky, balding, leisure suit-wearing kinda guy who's constantly searching for his next score. His combination of stupidity and brashness gets Larry into trouble. The object is to get him out of trouble in traditional adventure fashion, finding and manipulating objects as you thread your way through the story line. The content is comedic and adult-oriented. A graphical interface is used with a text parser to input commands. Typical of Sierra games, progress is tracked through a set amount of points, awarded for advancement or minor actions.

meta.name: Lethal Xcess : Wings Of Death II
meta.desc: After the events of Wings of Death, the once evil sorcerer Sagyr has been reintegrated into society and only does good things with his magic. Unfortunately, one day he stumbles upon a curse which releases an evil witch called Xandrilia. She immediately conquers the world and teleports Sagyr 3 000 years into the future. Using a spaceship, his only hope to free the world is to destroy the planet Metallycha, where Xandrilia's heirs live.

meta.name: The Light Corridor
meta.desc:
El objetivo del juego es guiar una bola a través de laberintos sembrados de trampas en un universo tridimensional. Paredes, barreras y otros obstáculos estáticos o móviles son las dificultades que hay que superar con paciencia y destreza. El juego también cuenta con un editor de niveles para crear tus propios laberintos.
Mueves una paleta vertical y horizontalmente en un plano justo delante de la pantalla para propulsar la pelota, y luego la sigues por el nivel, desviándola antes de que caiga detrás de ti. Al principio, los obstáculos son todos estáticos, pero las barreras móviles requieren sincronización, reacciones y suerte.
También hay varios objetos de bonificación, que debes recoger al pasar por ellos: una L para una pelota extra y un rectángulo doble que te da una segunda raqueta que se mueve aleatoriamente.

meta.name: Locomotion
meta.desc: You are the driver of the only train able to supply the townsfolk of the Badlands and thus save them from the marauding bandits. But be warned, the forces of evil are out to stop you reaching your destination at all costs. The objective of the game is to travel between stations avoiding the enemy. Move forwards/backwards by moving stick right/left. Change tracks by moving stick forwards/backwards. Pressing fire releases smoke with which you can shoot down enemy planes. Also en-route you will encounter mailbags which can be picked up for bonus points and water towers which if stopped at will replenish your water supply. Each level is more difficult to complete than the previous one with number and type of enemy forces increasing. After completion of each level and calculation of mailbag and time bonuses there is a bonus level where you must shoot down planes to earn extra points.

meta.name: Log!cal
meta.desc: Logical is a bizarre puzzle game in which you have to arrange colored balls (green, purple, blue or yellow) to form quartets in any of several locations on the game board. These locations are, in fact, balls you can spin, then send any of the balls in them through the connection path (have a look at the screenshots).

meta.name: Lure Of The Temptress
meta.desc:
La ciudad medieval de Turnvale ha caído en manos de la malvada hechicera Selena. Ella está controlando un ejército de una raza guerrera orco Skorl, que la sirve con devoción. Los Skorl odian a los humanos y han aterrorizado a la ciudad y las tierras cercanas. Diermot es un tipo ordinario que fue capturado por los Skorl y arrojado a la prisión. Su primera tarea será escapar. Después de obtener su libertad, Diermot también tendrá que descubrir cómo liberar a toda su patria de las garras de los villanos.
Este juego de aventuras utiliza un sistema especial llamado Teatro Virtual. Los personajes no jugables caminarán y realizarán diferentes acciones independientemente de su interacción con ellos. Existe una variedad de opciones y comandos, incluida la posibilidad de interactuar con un personaje secundario, a quien puedes dar órdenes para resolver algunos de los rompecabezas del juego.

meta.name: The Lurking Horror
meta.desc:
A pesar de una terrible tormenta de nieve, un joven estudiante de G.U.E. Tech va al laboratorio de informática de la escuela para trabajar en su trabajo final. Sin embargo, ha ocurrido algo extraño. El archivo que contiene el trabajo del estudiante ha sido parcialmente sobrescrito por los archivos del Departamento de Alquimia. Al principio, el único objetivo del estudiante es encontrar su documento perdido, pero pronto se da cuenta de que algo mucho más siniestro está ocurriendo en el interior del edificio de la escuela.
The Lurking Horror es el único juego de aventuras de texto con temática de terror de Infocom. El juego se desarrolla en el edificio de la escuela embrujada, en medio de una ventisca que ha hecho imposible la huida. El jugador explora los entornos y debe resolver rompecabezas para superar los obstáculos. Hay criaturas hostiles en el juego, la mayoría de las cuales deben ser derrotadas o desbaratadas utilizando objetos específicos.

meta.name: Mach 3
meta.desc: Mata a todos los enemigos, evita las minas y viaja entre mundos distintos para matar a la mente maestra malvada en este juego de disparos detrás del héroe.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Mafdet and the Book of the Dead (Europe).zip.torrent
n: Mafdet and the Book of the Dead (Europe).zip

meta.path: ./atarist TORRENTS/Mafdet and the Book of the Dead (Europe).zip.torrent
meta.name: Mafdet And The Book Of The Dead
meta.desc:
The story starts in ancient Egypt. The evil god, Seth, has stolen The Book of the Dead and hidden it deep in the underworld. Without The Book, no egyptian man or woman will be able to enter the afterlife when they die - their soul will be condemned to walk the earth until the spells in the book are read.
You are Mafdet, the cat Goddess of Revenge, who has been summoned by Isis (the Goddess of Earth) to retrieve the book and return it to the Egyptian people.
You will need to use all your strength and intelligence to find the book, which is well guarded by Seth's minions. Collect amulets which will help you along your way; change between cat and human to help you pass some obstacles; find your way through mazed and dungeons; above all - FIND THE BOOK. All Egypt has put its trust in you.

meta.name: Manchester United
meta.desc: A football management simulation with an arcade component where you manage the world's most famous football team. Lead them through a season to see how many trophies you can win. You can pick your dream team for the positions you want and see how they do in the championships. The management side lets you choose and configure your team, choosing training schedules to develop your players and viewing their skills. The arcade side can be used purely as a hands off simulation, or as a way to have a direct effect on the result.

meta.name: Manhattan Dealers
meta.desc: You're Dirty Harry and you need to find and beat up dealers to get drugs and burn them outside the town, which will regain your energy. This is the Silmarils' first game. In 9 screens, you can fight with ninjas, amazons, punks and other thugs and low-lives, and you've only your hands and feets for that !

meta.name: Le Manoir De Mortevielle
meta.desc: En 1951, alguien es asesinado en una impresionante mansión y Jerome Lange debe resolver el caso. Pero cuidado: algo sobrenatural está sucediendo aquí...

meta.name: Matrix Marauders
meta.desc: Matrix Marauders is a racing game set in the future. The player takes part in the ultimate racing championship and, well, races against other cars and tries to be the first at the goal. All cars are equipped with weapons which can be used to destroy the opposition. Other things to keep in mind are holes on the track which need to be jumped over and power ups which offer advantages when picked up, e.g. more speed. Permission to start at the next race is only given if the player finishes the race among the first three. Between races the car and its weapon system can be upgraded.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Mean 18 (Europe) (Compilation - Accolade All Time Favourites).zip.torrent

meta.name: Mean 18
meta.desc:
Pebble Beach and St. Andrews are 2 of the courses on offer in this golf simulation, released in the early years of 16-bit technology. The three-click control system was used, whereby the first click starts the swing, the second sets the power, and the third sets draw or fade.
Beginner and Expert difficulty options are given - the latter mode has more pronounced draw and fade effects, making the timing of the third click even more crucial. You can also choose between regular and professional tees - in the latter option the distance on the holes is longer, and the computer doesn't choose the best club automatically. Because long drives aren't a crucial aspect of many of the holes, the Begginer/Expert setting is a bigger factor on your likely scoring. A unique feature for the day was the course designer, which was quite versatile with practice.

meta.name: Mega Twins
meta.desc: El juego presenta a dos gemelos que intentan recuperar el control de su tierra, Alurea, tras el inesperado ataque de un monstruo que destruye todo a su paso. Los habitantes de Alurea han vivido en paz durante mil años y han olvidado cómo luchar. Los únicos supervivientes del país, los hijos gemelos del rey, deben enfrentarse al desafío y devolver a su reino su antigua gloria. Los dos gemelos, de unos 15 años en la época del juego, se aventuran en busca de una piedra legendaria conocida como el "Dragon Blue Eyes", de la que se dice que puede volver a poner todo en orden.
