meta.name: Star Wrek
meta.desc: Star Wreck is a single player text adventure game with graphics that is a parody of the television series Star Trek.

meta.name: Starblaze
meta.desc:
To qualify as a Tamsinian warrior in an intergalactic war of unparalleled ferocity, you must prove your prowess by taking on scores of fiendish alien attack waves and living to tell the tale. How will you do it? Only with quick reactions and the fastest trigger finger on the planet! StarBlaze is pure solid vector 3-D Shoot 'em Up from the programming team that brought you 16-bit Elite - Mr Micro! The game draws upon the strongest feature of the classic arcade titles to introduce a wholly original style of game to the arcade genre, featuring:
Over one hundred different attack patterns
Action-packed gameplay in stunning solid 3-D
Five colourful backdrops - forget boring starfields!
Shield, smart-bomb and extra power pickups.

meta.name: Starflight
meta.desc:
Starflight is a space exploration game with role-playing elements. The game is completely non-linear, allowing the player to venture to any star system and available planets. The main plot is advanced by following cryptic clues either received as transmissions or obtained as a result of successful communication with various alien races populating the universe.
The player must first form a crew and customize the spaceship before blasting off from spacedock. A science officer, a navigator, an engineer, a communicator and a doctor have to be assigned. The player can choose between Humans, Velox, Thrynn, Elowan, and Android races. Each profession usually has a racial counterpart with the highest proficiency in it.
Except Androids, members of every race can be trained in their skills by spending the game's currency. 
 At start, the player can also acquire better weapons, armor, and shields for the ship, as well as outfit it with cargo pods. Terrain vehicle can be customized as well.

meta.name: Starglider
meta.desc:
The Planet Novenia has been attacked by the Egrons, who snuck in by disguising their craft as the protected Starglider species, which Novenia's automated defenses were programmed not to shoot.
Your task is to fight them using only an obsolete Airborne Ground Attack Vehicle. This was designed as the ultimate combat machine. It has a fully-rechargeable shield, plasma drive unit, an inbuilt scanner, a high top speed and 2 homing missiles.
The game is viewed from AGAV's cockpit, with control over speed, weapon targeting and firing. There are several control options like fixed or floating sighting and automatic centering, allowing you to balance the game between easy sighting and advanced shooting ranges. Repair depots must be visited frequently for refilling the weapon bays and repairing the ship.
Crucially, the Egron Stargliders need 3 missiles to be shot down, so at least 1 visit to a depot is required to complete this job, at which point you move up to the next, harder, level.

meta.name: Starglider 2
meta.desc:
More space combat and strategy in this sequel, which challenges you to collect the elements to form a bomb to destroy a resistance force, before delivering them through heavy fighting. Each planet has its own characteristics, with differing inhabitants and features. 
As well as flying through space, you must dart through tunnels under the planets, which restricted your movement range but are where most of the weapons are. As you go along you'll have to obtain objects from people, and trade them so as to be able to complete your main objectives.
The biggest advance from the original Starglider was seen as the polygon graphics, which are filled on 16-bit systems, and contain considerable detail.

meta.name: Starquake
meta.desc:
Un mensaje acaba de ser interceptado por la Tierra procedente de un Planeta inestable emergiendo de un Agujero Negro en alguna parte del extremo de la Galaxia. Si el núcleo no es reconstruido, implicaría la destrucción de todo el Universo, con explosiones en cadena de estrellas.
BLOB, ser Biologico Operado remotamente, se le envía a un planeta inestable y se le encarga la tarea de evitar que explote. Esto implica recolectar varios elementos y llevarlos al núcleo del planeta.
El juego es una aventura de arcade vista desde el lateral, con 512 pantallas dispuestas en un patrón de 16x32. Existe un sistema de teletransportación, por lo que una vez que encuentre los códigos, podrá acceder rápidamente a diferentes partes del juego.
Las criaturas que debes evitar son inteligentes, y cada vez es más difícil de predecir a medida que te acercas al centro, pero estás armado con un arma y también puedes intentar evitarlas.

meta.name: StarRay
meta.desc: StarRay es un shooter de desplazamiento lateral. El objetivo es defender tus colonias de varias oleadas de alienígenas atacantes. El juego presenta pantallas de desplazamiento por capas, y nuevos diseños de fondo y enemigos para cada uno de los 7 niveles.

meta.name: Steel
meta.desc: The space ship Steel is so advanced that it is completely operated by robots. As usually in video games, these robots went havoc and have to be put out of business. This job falls to the player who goes on the ship to shut down the security system. He is disguised as robot, but this does not stop the other ones from attacking.

meta.name: Stone Age
meta.desc:
Stone Age is a challenging puzzle game where you are in control of a dinosaur and you have to make him reach the exit of each cave. The dinosaur can only walk on certain blocks on the level: some are just ordinary blocks, some are movable in the direction the arrow points, some crumble after you walk on them, and some have coloured keys which are needed to get past locks of the same colour.
The game has two difficulty modes, one giving you more time to complete the levels than the other, and every time you run out of time, you lose a life. The levels are coded so you don't lose your progress when you quit, although you'll lose any score gained.
The graphics are simple and cartoony, and the levels come in a variety of scenarios. The game also includes a Jukebox, which allows you to customize the played tracks much like a playlist editor.

meta.name: Storm Master
meta.desc: Eoliae is a remote land where myth meets truth, and where winds shows only the power of gods moving armies from front to front, while diplomacy is still 'hanging' in the air full of crossing winds. The chaos was born as the Great master was murdered, and evil Sharkaan is threatening all of the Eoliae land. You must learn the power of the winds, gain the knowledge for trade and diplomacy, build windmills and strike your enemy where it hurts the most. Only try doing that and stay alive.

meta.name: Strider
meta.desc:
Juegas como Hiryu, miembro de la hermandad de los Striders, una especie de orden caballeresca moderna, que lucha contra el siniestro "Grand Master Meio", que desea conquistar el mundo. Diezmada su hermandad, usted es uno de los únicos Striders que siguen vivos para buscar venganza. El juego adopta la forma de un juego de plataformas. Armado con tu sable láser (Cypher), tendrás que eliminar a numerosos enemigos en varios niveles que van desde la Unión Soviética hasta la selva tropical.  También puedes colgarte de las paredes con un gancho metálico.
Ocasionalmente, las bonificaciones obtenidas al destruir cápsulas te permitirán aumentar el alcance de tu espada o ir acompañado de un pequeño robot que destruirá a tus enemigos. Apreciamos los espectaculares movimientos del personaje desenvainando su arma o girando en el aire mientras salta.

meta.name: Strike!
meta.desc: Strike es un juego que te permite jugar bolos de 10 bolos contra un amigo o contra una computadora (nivel de habilidad 1-4). El juego sigue las reglas de los bolos: debes derribar 10 bolos al final de la pista en dos tiros, a menos que consigas un strike en el primer lanzamiento. El juego se desarrolla en 10 rondas y el ganador es el que obtiene la puntuación más alta. El juego tiene una vista isométrica que muestra al jugador al final de la pista.

meta.name: Stryx
meta.desc: You star as half-robot operative Stryx. Dome City is under attack by KILLER CYBORG ASSASSINS! You navigate Stryx through numerous levels on foot, hovercrafts and some weird round eyeball-type flying craft. It's basic side scrolling action/arcade whackiness. This game was released for IBM PC, Amiga and Atari ST systems.

meta.name: Sundog : Frozen Legacy
meta.desc: You just inherited a one-man star freighter - the SunDog - from an uncle who died under mysterious circumstances. You also inherited the contract he signed to aid in the building of a colony for a religious group. You have three tasks to perform: find the location of the colony; find, buy, and deliver goods needed for its construction; and locate the cryogenically-frozen colonists needed to populate the colony.

meta.name: Swap
meta.desc: Swap es un juego de rompecabezas en Atari ST. Debe cambiar las cortinas para construir una secuencia de cortinas del mismo color para eliminarlas. Una vez finalizado el nivel y si se obtienen puntos suficientes, el juego se trasladará al nivel superior.

meta.name: Tai-Pan
meta.desc:
Tu deseas hacer fortuna en China, en esta adaptación del libro de James Clavell. Tu primer objetivo es conseguir un préstamo que sea suficiente para comprar un barco; una vez que tengas esto y obtengas un equipo pagándolo o simplemente secuestrándolo, podrás comenzar a comerciar.
El juego tiene 3 etapas principales, y una serie de elementos de juego diferenciales que te permiten elegir tu propio camino. Inicialmente caminas por las calles tratando de obtener los elementos y las personas correctas, luego te diriges a las aguas para ir a otras ciudades comerciales. Al acercarte a otros barcos, puedes abordarlos y luchar contra sus tripulantes.

meta.name: Tass Times In Tonetown
meta.desc:
Su abuelo ha inventado un dispositivo que hace realidad todo lo que puede ver en su sueño. Todos los lugares y criaturas extrañas con las que puede soñar realmente existen en una realidad alternativa. Una de esas criaturas, llamada Franklin Snarl, viajó a través del dispositivo a nuestra realidad y secuestró a Gramps, teletransportándolo al mundo loco de Tonetown. ¡Espera que Gramps siempre permanezca dormido, lo que asegura la propia existencia de Snarl!
Ahora depende de ti, el héroe del juego, viajar a la dimensión alternativa de Tonetown y rescatar a tu abuelo. Interactúa con el entorno escribiendo comandos o eligiendo uno de los iconos de acción disponibles como interfaz. El juego, por lo tanto, combina la interacción basada en texto con el enfoque más moderno de "apuntar y hacer clic".

meta.name: Tau Ceti
meta.desc:
Un simulador espacial con diversos elementos de otros géneros. Tu misión es destruir a la armada robótica que controla el planeta.
Tras la colonización de Tau Ceti III y su posterior abandono a causa de una epidemia, los terrestres intentan volver al planeta con una cura. Pero las defensas automáticas siguen en funcionamiento e impiden todo aterrizaje.

meta.name: Tennis Cup
meta.desc:
SUPERBLY REALISTIC
Featuring exceptional graphics and sound effects, the playing area is divided into two sections giving both players the opportunity to get into the action !
PLAY AU THE SHOTS!
Serve, volley, lob, smash, add some spin, or even play a cunning drop shot - the choice is yours !
CHOOSE YOUR MATCH !
Play singles or doubles, or train for exhibition games, tournaments, even the Davis Cup ! Play against the computer or with a friend, in a quick set or a gruelling championship game!
EVERY GAME IS UNIQUE !
Choose your technique and style, select one of 32 different opponents, each with their own characteristics and skill, or even create your own opponent!
TENNIS CUP- A NEW GENERATION OF SIMULATION SOFTWARE

meta.name: Terramex
meta.desc: This multi-level action/adventure takes players back 40 years to find Professor K.K. Renegade, who predicts that a catastrophic asteroid is heading straight for earth. You're in charge of finding Professor Renegade.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Test Drive (Europe) (Compilation - Accolade All Time Favourites).zip.torrent
n: Test Drive (Europe) (Compilation - Accolade All Time Favourites).zip

urls.label: Test Drive (Europe) (Compilation - Accolade All Time Favourites).zip.torrent

meta.path: ./atarist TORRENTS/Test Drive (Europe) (Compilation - Accolade All Time Favourites).zip.torrent
meta.name: Test Drive
meta.desc: This mix of racing simulation and arcade game consists of driving a choice of 5 sports cars on a mountain strip at the fastest speed possible without getting caught by the cops.  To avoid them, use your radar detector -- or just try to outrun them if they spot you.  Manual stickshift only, so make sure you don't redline or you'll blow your engine.

meta.name: The Deep
meta.desc: In The Deep the player takes the role of a ship which has to defend itself against a variety of underwater enemies, e.g. u-boats or jellyfish with weapons. All the enemies launch missiles or mines at the boat which can be dodged by moving left or right. Water bombs can be dropped to get rid of the enemies - but there are only eight available which slowly refill over time.

meta.name: Immortal, The
meta.desc:
The Immortal is an isometric action-adventure game.
Your old mentor Mordamir has disappeared. Probably kidnapped. You're not too sure where he might be, but a dungeon is always a good place to look, so you seek out the nearest one and plunge into its depths. Beware: 8 levels of 
isometric death await.
The Immortal is the prototype of a trial-and-error game. Progress is made by encountering a hazard, dying, solving the problem, encountering the next hazard. To solve a level, you have to know its traps and their patterns by heart. As frustrating as this may sound (it is), The Immortal quite cleverly balances annoyance with curiosity and graphical rewards. In short: You want to see what challenge lies in the next room.
The puzzles range from simple avoidance of traps to the correct use of items; you collect objects in an inventory. Every now and then, The Immortal surprises with a special challenge. For example, you've got to ride a magic carpet through a hallway full of fire traps, or ride a barrel on an underground river. The dungeon isn't empty: some friedlies may have valuable information or trade items, the nasty sort of guys will attack. Combat is fought man-to-man on a special screen. Your adversary indicates his next attack a few seconds before he executes it, so you've got time to react appropriately. You can dodge to the left or the right, as well as attack from these two directions. There is no save option in the game, of course, but you may restart each level as often as you like. Levels can be skipped by entering passwords.

meta.name: Theme Park Mystery
meta.desc:
Theme Park Mystery is a strange adventure game set in the mysterious world of gypsies, magic and supernatural powers where nothing is quite what it seems. Your routine life is disrupted forever when you use a discarded tokens in the fortunetelling machine.
Use the tokens to get a ticket from the Zoltan Wizard fortune telling machine at the Train Station to journey through the four worlds of Dragonland, Dreamland, Futureland and Yesterdayland.  Find out what drove the fun seekers away and your uncle insane.  Hunt for hidden keys, fiery torches and supernatural potions to help you avenge your uncle's death.  Terror Awaits!

meta.name: Thrust
meta.desc:
Thrust took a unique game style by bringing realistic physics and inertia-based movement into arcade games, directly influencing titles like Oids, not to mention the same author's Exile from Audiogenic. The action is viewed from the side, with the graphics drawn in vectors, in keeping with the mathematical nature of everything that unfolds.
As a Resistance fighter, the player must fly into enemy lines in order to steal Klystron Pods to power more advanced starships, using your tractor beam to take them. A network of mounted guns are aiming to shoot the player down – these can be disabled by shooting their power source, but eventually this will explode, forcing the player to flee. Some of the later levels feature reverse gravity, which is where things really get difficult.

meta.name: Thunder Burner
meta.desc: You are a pilot of some robot/spacejet transformer on some deserted planet full of cacti and enemy ships. You may turn left/right at the angle of 45 degrees, move at the angle of 45 degrees, accelerate/decelerate speed of your moving, shoot, and metamorphose into a spacejet at will. During 12 levels of gameplay enemies fly towards you, and you should shoot them or avoid them, because each meeting with the enemy means decreasing the number of instances of your transformer. You'll also need to collect spheres to maintain your fuel levels. When all instances of your spacejet will be lost you may be enlisted in the High Score Table.

meta.name: Thundercats
meta.desc: Es un videojuego de desplazamiento lateral basado en la serie animada original de televisión ThunderCats en el cual tu misión será derrotar a las fuerzas de Mumm-Ra, que van desde enanos hasta murciélagos. Aunque comienzas solo con una espada, puedes recolectar más destruyendo los diversos contenedores a través de los niveles; las armas posteriores pueden destruir a estos enemigos más rápido y permitir ataques desde la distancia. Al llegar al final de cada nivel ve bonificaciones por tiempo y muertes. El camino a través del juego se puede variar en los niveles posteriores, por lo que puedes jugarlo más de una vez y encontrar nuevas secciones, a pesar de que los niveles individuales solo se desplazan de izquierda a derecha.

meta.name: Thunderwing
meta.desc: The player controls Thunderwing, an Urban Air Fighter, which is stolen to help the rebel forces against some suppressor. The game is a vertical scrolling shooter. The ship is equipped with lasers and can activate the disruptor, a force field around the ship, destroying everything near. There are differently colored enemy formations, which give different rewards on complete destruction: a red formation rewards an update to the basic laser cannon, destroying two blue and two red formation is rewarded with an extra live. Some ground enemies leave a reload to the limited disruptor. There are end-of-level bosses to defeat.

meta.name: Time And Magik : The Trilogy
meta.desc: Three of Level 9's most acclaimed adventures come together in one package. And each has been enhanced and enlarged with more text than ever before - 60,000 mind-expanding words creating magic and mystery round every corner. There's a powerful new parser, and most disc versions include stunning digitised pictures that help to dramatically heighten the atmosphere.

meta.name: Time Blast
meta.desc:
Time blast is a single player horizontal scrolling shooter in the vein of Scramble, created by Tim Moore by Micro Value in 1987.
Blast the enemies, watch and replenish your fuel and avoid enemy missiles and attacks.

meta.name: Tintin on the Moon
meta.desc: Hergé's famous cartoon character is brought to life in this multi-stage action game, specifically based around the episode of the same name. In many details the story was similar to the real moon landings, then many years off.

meta.name: Toobin'
meta.desc: Toobin' involves Biff and Jet racing their way down the rapids of a river, riding on tires. You rotate your tyre left or right, and drift as the current sends you, making sure to avoid the banks of the river, and the dividing lines in the middle. Hazards include crocodiles, stray logs and branches, and fishermen - you are armed with a limited supply of tin cans to take care of these. There are gates to slide through on the way down - these give you a points bonus. Each level has a strict time limit to adhere to, although there's a kickin' party at the end if you succeed.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Top Cat Starring in Beverly Hills Cats (Europe).zip.torrent
n: Top Cat Starring in Beverly Hills Cats (Europe).zip

urls.label: Top Cat Starring in Beverly Hills Cats (Europe).zip.torrent

meta.path: ./atarist TORRENTS/Top Cat Starring in Beverly Hills Cats (Europe).zip.torrent
meta.name: Top Cat Starring in Beverly Hills Cats
meta.desc: Top Cat is in Beverly Hills to track down Benny the Ball, prevent him from gaining the contents of a will that is not rightly his, and find the rightful heiress. The game is a top-down puzzler of sorts. An object manipulation mode is used to pick up and use objects when necessary. Extra milk (for energy) and fruit (for points) can be collected. Skateboarders must be avoided as they can take objects and randomly move them. The members of your gang must all be gathered up on the first level and must be kept on your side by ensuring that your energy doesn't drop too low.
meta.image: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Top Cat Starring in Beverly Hills Cats (Europe).zip-image.jpg
meta.marquee: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Top Cat Starring in Beverly Hills Cats (Europe).zip-marquee.png
meta.thumbnail: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Top Cat Starring in Beverly Hills Cats (Europe).zip-thumb.jpg
meta.boxback: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Top Cat Starring in Beverly Hills Cats (Europe).zip-boxback.jpg

meta.name: Tower Of Babel
meta.desc:
The Zapper, Pusher and Grabber robots were dropped onto the planet of the Shinerians, but are now desperate to return home. They have killed off the Shinerian race, but must climb a high tower, negotiating all the traps it holds, before they can contact their masters.
Each robot's name indicates what their main function and purpose is, and these skills must be combined for success. Each section has its own task - collecting energy pods and destroying mines and bombs for example. The creatures which fill the towers must be avoided, or used to your advantage.
The game is viewed through a rotating camera with variable zoom, giving the game an advanced 3D feel for the day. A level designer has also been included.

meta.name: Trailblazer
meta.desc:
El objeto del juego es guiar el balón por cada uno de los 21 recorridos lo más rápidamente posible, evitando caer en los agujeros y en otros obstáculos. Cada recorrido tiene su límite de tiempo. Hay dos posibles juegos:
Juega el arcade: Tiene cuatro saltos por recorrido, con un límite de tiempo en cada uno. Debes completar el máximo número posible de recorridos y conseguir la máxima puntuación.
Competición de tres recorridos: Puedes practicar tres cualesquiera de los recorridos, con un límite de 99 segundos.

meta.name: TrashHeap
meta.desc: TRASHHEAP is an exciting 3-dimensional game with a difference. The year is 4711, LIETC, (Latest Intergalactic Egg Timer Calendar). You are a hyperdriven, universe suitable service robot and you are carrying the last battle of absolutely high proof stuff through the depths of the sour milky way. It is your job to get the valuable liquid to the emperor as fast as possible. Requires 1 MB of RAM. Free 3D glasses included.

meta.name: trauma
meta.desc: A futuristic shoot'em up with sci-fi graphic-novel inspired designs.

meta.name: Treble Champions
meta.desc: Treble Champions is a football management game. The player can manage a squad, train players, and try to gain the way to the top of the leagues and cups. There are four divisions of 20 teams each and 1,500 (fictional) players with individual attributes are included in the game and purchasable for the manager. Beside the squad skills and injuries, the finances have to be managed for further progress in the game.

meta.name: Trinity
meta.desc:
You are neither an adventurer nor a thrill-seeker. You are simply an American tourist in London, enjoying a relaxing stroll in the famous Kensington Gardens. When World War III breaks out and the city is vaporized moments after the story begins, you have no hope of survival. Unless you enter another time, another place, another dimension.
Escaping London's destruction does not mean the end of your problems but rather the beginning of new, stranger puzzles. You will find yourself in an exotic world teeming with giant flytraps, strange creatures and other unpleasantries. Time and space will obey their own complex and malicious logic.
You will visit fantastic places and acquire curious objects as you seek to discover the logic of your new universe. And if you can figure out how things unfold, you'll find yourself in the New Mexico desert, minutes before the climax of the greatest scientific experiment of all time: The world's first atomic explosion code named Trinity.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Trivial Pursuit - A New Beginning (Europe).zip.torrent

meta.name: Trivial Pursuit : A New Beginning
meta.desc:
Esta secuela difiere del primer opus, que retomaba el principio original del famoso juego de tablero. Cada jugador controla ahora una nave espacial y el objetivo general es convencer a los Sabios del planeta Genus de que acepten el plan de colonización de tu pueblo.
Todos los Sabios se encuentran en diferentes partes de la galaxia y sólo se puede llegar a ellos viajando por la galaxia respondiendo correctamente a las preguntas y respondiendo a una pregunta específica una vez que se ha llegado a ellos.
Las seis categorías de preguntas son las mismas que en el juego original, y hay 50 niveles de preguntas que resolver, pero la gran diferencia es que la categoría de pregunta es aleatoria.

meta.name: Turbo GT
meta.desc:
In the game you are a racer on the circuit with three other racers. Entire track is visible on the playscreen and gameplay is flowed in top-down view. You may turn left or right, and accelerate your car, which drives much faster than other cars. Finishing 5 laps on each track of different shape, players must come in first to participate in next race. Otherwise, the game will be over. Sometimes your car can be immobilized for the rest of the race.
The game is available for 1 or 2 players. In 2 players mode one player should use keyboard and another player should use joystick to play simultaneously,  while in 1 player mode player may choose between the controllers.

meta.name: Turbo Out Run
meta.desc: The sequel to OutRun features similar basic gameplay to the original, with the action viewed from behind the car, and the challenge being to complete each stage within the time limit. Contact can cause the car to spin, slow down or even flip; in each case you will lose time.

p: atarist TORRENTS/Turrican II - The Final Fight (Europe) (Budget - Kixx).zip.torrent
n: Turrican II - The Final Fight (Europe) (Budget - Kixx).zip

urls.label: Turrican II - The Final Fight (Europe) (Budget - Kixx).zip.torrent

meta.path: ./atarist TORRENTS/Turrican II - The Final Fight (Europe) (Budget - Kixx).zip.torrent
meta.name: Turrican II : The Final Fight
meta.desc:
Turrican II: The Final Fight es un juego de plataformas y disparos del tipo que se suele ver en las consolas, pero diseñado desde cero para ordenadores personales.
Su argumento es sencillo: un malvado mega-robot llamado "la Máquina" ataca la nave Avalon 1 de los Planetas Unidos, masacrando a todos los que se resisten. Todos excepto Bren McGuire, que consigue escapar y ponerse la armadura biónica experimental de Turrican. Como Turrican, se propone demostrar a la Máquina quién manda.
A diferencia de otros juegos de este tipo, este juego contiene tres niveles de acción de tiro horizontal. Hay seis grandes mundos para explorar, en los que eres bastante libre de ir donde quieras, ya que no hay desplazamiento automático y los niveles están llenos de vidas extra y armas ocultas. Todos estos niveles son muy diferentes: el primero, en el desierto de piedra, es muy colorido, mientras que los siguientes mundos son cada vez más oscuros.

meta.name: TV Sports Football
meta.desc: Before Electronic Arts sought to imitate television coverage of sports with their EA Sports titles, Cinemaware had the same idea, initially applying it to (American) Football. Cutscenes follow dramatic moments in the match, and each match is preceded by a TV-style introduction. The game is primarily action-based, although you also choose your plays before executing them. You then bring the passes and runs to life on the pitch itself. You can play single matches or full leagues, with any of the NFL teams of the time.

meta.name: Twylyte
meta.desc: Twylyte is an arcade 3D shoot-em-up in the tradition of Space Harrier and Backlash. The player drives towards the horizon continuously at enormous speed. There are indestructible barriers which the invisible player ship must avoid contact with, as well as enemies shooting and firing missiles at the player. Beside moving left and right, the ship can also moved up and down, which adds further possibilities to evade the barriers, but also makes it difficult to shot at moving enemies at different height.

p: atarist TORRENTS/UMS - The Universal Military Simulator (Europe).zip.torrent

meta.name: UMS : The Universal Military Simulator
meta.desc: UMS (Universal Military Simulator) attempts to cover the ground of games like Empire and go beyond, simulating almost every aspect of warfare in a realistic manner. Battles can range from ancient history to a science-fiction future, with famed battled such as Gettysburg and the Battle of Hastings built in. The view system operates at multiple levels, from a single unit up to the whole theater.

meta.name: Universe 3
meta.desc:
Unlike the first two games in the series, which fell into the roleplaying and resource-management category, Universe 3 poses true logic-based puzzles for you to solve. Your characters move about in much the same way as their counterparts in Breach, Omnitrend's tactical combat RPG.
You set out to escort a diplomat on a trip to the hyperspace booster (a key element of Universe 2) to investigate the disappearance of shipments from Earth to this remote corner of the star map. The story takes a quick twist when you and your crew are captured, forcing you to rack up some criminal charges during your escape. You'll spend the rest of your time looking for evidence about the missing shipments, which will clear you of the charges as well as wrap up the mystery.

meta.name: The Untouchables
meta.desc: You are The Untouchables in this side-scrolling action game. Play as Elliot Ness after the ruthless Mafia boss Al Capone. You have various tasks throughout the six levels and a variety of weapons to pick up such as a shotgun or tommy gun. Watch out for Capone’s henchmen though.

meta.name: Vector Ball
meta.desc:
This one on one future sport combines ideas from a number of real-world competitions, most notably the schoolgirl favourite Netball (I wonder why the ad blurb makes no mention of this?). The action is viewed isometrically, so moving the joystick up moves your droid north-east, down moves south-west, and so on.
The aim is to score more points than your opponent in each match, and be the first to win four matches (against either a human or computer opponent), before moving up to the next difficulty level. There is a goal in the middle at each end, and the ball can be advanced by shooting it (the length of a shot is affected by pushing the joystick up or down with fire pressed) as you can't run with the ball, or hold onto it for long. The main novel idea in the game is the shaping of the pitches, which are viewed in full 3D and have bumps and big divots all around.

meta.name: Vindicators
meta.desc:
El Imperio Tangent se está preparando para atacar la tierra con su convoy de tanques, y son ustedes los que han sido enviados para destruir las 14 estaciones espaciales que constituyen la potencial amenaza de invasión.
Hay 3 subniveles en cada emisora, que se pueden tocar en cualquier orden. La acción se desplaza en todas las direcciones, con usted guiando a su droide para que dispare a los droides de la oposición. El tanque tarda un tiempo en manejarse, lo que hace inicialmente más difícil evitar el contacto con esos enemigos. Cada nivel contiene estrellas de energía, que pueden ser canjeadas por mejoras tales como armas mejoradas y velocidad extra después de cada nivel.

meta.name: Virus
meta.desc:
Aliens have infested Earth, and are spreading a deadly virus throughout the planet. Needless to say, they must be stopped, and fast. The time pressure (your score upon completing a level is based on the uninfected percentage of the land) is only one difficult aspect of this shooter.
Viewed in remote 3D with a patchwork-quilt type ground effect, with trees sticking out and full gravity. Controlling your spaceship involves balancing the direction and height as well as thrusting to the right speed. A scanner tells you where the aliens are.

meta.name: Wanderer 3D
meta.desc: Wanderer is set in the future where cats have become very valuable. The hero's cat has been kidnapped by someone who demands 8000 cats as ransom. Additionally, all the planets of the universe are obsessed with an poker-like card game. So the player visits planets, barters cards and plays the card game - and if a planet is satisfied with their own set, they reward the player with cats.

meta.name: Wanted
meta.desc: Wanted is a vertically scrolling shooter with a Western theme, similar to Gunsmoke. The player takes the role of a bounty hunter who has to bring four desperadoes to justice. They can be tackled in any order and if all are defeated, a fifth level emerges. The gameplay offers no surprises: shooting masses of enemies until reaching the end of the level. The player can shoot barrels to receive extras, e.g. boots for extra speed or a rifle for a better range. Dynamite destroys every enemy on the screen.

meta.name: J.R.R. Tolkien's War In Middle Earth
meta.desc: War in Middle Earth is an Atari ST role-playing game obviously inspired by the work of J.R.R. Tolkien: The Lord of the Rings. You can take turns playing as the different leaders of the Middle War, each with different characteristics.

meta.name: Warhawk
meta.desc: Warhawk is a vertical-scrolling shooter set in space (its authors were inspired by coin-op arcade game Star Force). The player pilots a laser-armed starfighter flying into an asteroid belt, fighting against enemy starbases and waves of fighters, avoiding mines and meteor showers depleting ship's shields, while hunting for precious power-ups.

meta.name: Warlock
meta.desc: Warlock is an isometric flick-screen game where you play the role of The Doomlord of a fallen world living a comfortable life for an aeon or two. After taking over the world and ruling with evil and darkness in your castle called DoomRock, an adversary called The White Wizard has stormed the castle and taken it over. The land you rule is now in danger of being ruled with good and light, and so you have decided to get your castle back by destroying the creatures of good and find the Orb of Power to destroy the wizard in a final battle.

meta.name: Warlock's Quest
meta.desc: Warlock is a game which played much like Ghosts & Goblins. The player has to find the ancient relics which are needed in order to beat "The Unspeakable One". When the player kills enemy characters in the game they will sometimes drop powerups including vitality (health), power (magic), armor, treasure (points), and mystery (often bad things).

meta.name: Where Time Stood Still
meta.desc:
While flying three members of the same family, your planes crash-lands in an area where it soon becomes clear that time has stood still - dinosaurs still roam the area, and the humans are primitive and carnivorous. Your task is to guide them to safety through the complex isometrically viewed world (using the same basic game engine as Denton Designs' Great Escape license).
Hazards to be faced include the aforementioned dinosaurs and cavemen, as well as sea monsters, precarious mountainous ledges and dilapidated bridges. Objects including weapons and first aid kits can be collected. Each character has his own distinct behaviors - one becomes hungry easily, while another is only really competent while his fiancé survives. Although the ultimate aim is to save all four characters, you can continue while at least one is alive.

meta.name: Wild Streets
meta.desc: New-York, Year 1998. The once most prestigious city in the world, has now become a fighting zone. Half of the city is left in ruins, and it is in that part of town that the marginals and gangs are living, hunted by every law enforcement agencies. The other half of the city consists of fancy mansions, in some of which the most important drug barons reside. Unfortunately, they are the ones who run the city using the enormous profits they make from dealing drugs and weapons. They now have succeeded in endangering the country's economy.

meta.name: Winter Olympiad 88
meta.desc: This is a winter sports game that lets you compete in five Olympic events: Downhill skiing, Biathlon, Slalom, Ski Jump and Bob Sled. It is very similar to offerings like Winter Games from Epyx. In Downhill skiing, you must avoid the obstacles and make it to the bottom of the hill, by swerving left and right and adjusting your speed by pushing the joystick forward and back. The Slalom is similar, involving skiing around flags. In the ski jump, you must position the skis for a proper landing. In the bobsled event, you must carefully control the angles so your bobsled doesn't flip. The Biathlon event combines skiing to shooting ranges and shooting the targets archery-style.

meta.name: World Championship Boxing Manager
meta.desc:
In this boxing Management, players can develop the careers of heavyweight boxers. Options are selected using an icon system representing the manager's office.
Training boxers involves determining what to work on, taking into account their strengths and weaknesses. The game features 97 opponents. Reaching the top of the rankings will therefore require approximately 15 to 20 fights.
Choosing an opponent who is easy to beat and capable of placing the fight at the top of the Friday night bill, negotiating the best financial deal and a mutually acceptable challenge are the main criteria.
2 governing bodies are included in the game, each with slightly different rules. A fight in one set of rules won't be viewed quite as significantly by the other.
Fights are presented with the 2 expert analysts exchange text descriptions of key punches and who is doing them best (a clue to the judges' decision). Before and during fights, the player can indicate to the boxer the tactics to adopt.

p: atarist TORRENTS/World Class Leader Board (Europe) (Budget - Klassix).zip.torrent

meta.name: Leader Board Pro Golf Simulator
meta.desc:
Before the long-running Links series, Access produced the Leader Board lineage, which concludes here. Wind, snap and power are the main considerations as you dodge the bunkers, water and rough which make for more complex courses than the 8-bit versions of the original.
A course editor is provided.  The courses provided include real courses like St. Andrews, a fictional designs such as The Gauntlet, which as the name suggests is designed to push your skills to the maximum.
The PC version revolutionized the use of the PC speaker to reproduce voice samples via their patented "RealSound" process. Quips like "No doubt about it, he's deep in the sandtrap", "Straight onto the fairway", and "Looks like he hit the tree, Jim." are used to provide running commentary on the gameplay.

meta.name: Wrangler
meta.desc: In the distant future, travel between the planets and the distant galaxies is no longer by rocket. Hyperspace is old hat.  Travel is almost instantaneous by using Pathways in other Dimensions which are out of time and space. These Pathways are under constant invasion by alien forces from another universe hoping to open them up for their use.

meta.name: X-Out
meta.desc:
En principio, este es otro shoot-'em-up de desplazamiento horizontal (técnicamente muy impresionante). El giro interesante sobre el escenario es que no se desarrolla en el espacio como el juego similar R-Type y la mayoría de sus clones, sino que la lucha entre el bien y el mal es bajo el agua.
A lo largo de cinco niveles, tienes que disparar a innumerables enemigos, que se completan con los obligatorios jefes de mitad de nivel y de final de nivel. La parte más innovadora de este juego llega después de un nivel, cuando puedes comprar nuevas armas: en lugar de simplemente comprar mejoras, puedes personalizar tu nave colocando tus nuevas armas en cualquier parte de ella.

meta.name: Xenon
meta.desc:
Xenon es el misterioso predecesor del mucho más conocido Xenon 2: Megablast. En realidad, el juego no se parece en nada a su secuela, con un esquema de control y una jugabilidad completamente diferentes. Sin embargo, la trama se superpone cuando los Xenites hacen su primer intento de controlar la galaxia.
Xenon es esencialmente un shooter vertical. La diferencia entre Xenon y su secuela es que aquí el jugador controla el movimiento del campo de juego (arriba o abajo) simplemente moviendo la nave en la dirección elegida. Para hacer esto en la secuela, los jugadores deben golpear su nave contra la parte inferior de la pantalla y tirar hacia atrás de la palanca para desplazarse hacia atrás en el campo de juego.
También cuenta con un campo de juego 3D (algunos enemigos, por ejemplo, estarán montados en una especie de colinas, donde los jugadores no podrán dispararles). Para combatirlos, el jugador puede transformar su tanque en un avión. Luego, el juego cambia al estilo de juego más familiar, como se ve en otros shooters de desplazamiento vertical. El avión tiene que volver a transformarse en un tanque para combatir a la mayoría de las unidades terrestres.

meta.name: Atomix
meta.desc:
Atomix is a puzzle game. On each level, you are given a couple of atoms, and your task is to arrange them into a specific shapes. 
In a top-down view, you see all the atoms available for you to move, and all the directions they can connect to. Down below on the left side is a small picture of what you must get. That picture represents some molecular structure that you must complete by moving atoms horizontally and vertically. Once you move your atom, it won't stop unless it bumps into something, so you have to use other atoms as blockades to prevent it from going into unwanted areas. 
There are over 50 levels, and you have limited time for each level.

meta.name: B-17 Flying Fortress
meta.desc:
In the Spring of 1942 the United States 8th Air Force landed in Britain. Its task to mount the air offensive in German occupied Europe: striking in the daylight from high altitude, at precise. strategic targets. The heavy bomber chosen to perform this task was the B-17 The Flying Fortress. Now, MicroProse brings you the complete simulation of the Second World War's legendary aircraft. 
Flying Fortress is a flight simulation that soars above all others. You'll be dazzled by the graphic detail and period atmosphere. From customizing a bomber with your choice of 'nose art' to the breathtaking air combat sequences. MicroProse has launched the flying experience you'll never fart!

p: Back To The Future II (1990)(MirrorSoft)[cr Empire][t +2 V8].st
n: Back To The Future II (1990)(MirrorSoft)[cr Empire][t +2 V8]

meta.path: ./Back To The Future II (1990)(MirrorSoft)[cr Empire][t +2 V8].st
meta.name: Back To The Future Part II
meta.desc:
Back to the Future II is a collection of five arcade and puzzle games. Based on the second installment of the popular Hollywood series Back to the Future, this movie conversion has Marty McFly and Doc Brown travel through time to stop their arch-rival Biff from changing the future. The game consists of five parts, each inspired by one of the movie's most memorable scenes:
1. Hoverboard Chase: A Paperboy clone without newspapers, but with isometric levels and lots of enemies to dodge.
2. Jennifer Rescue: Guide Marty's girlfriend Jennifer out of the house without her meeting one of the four family members. Open and close doors to make the persons go from one room to the next in this top-down puzzle sequence.
3. Beat Biff: A side-scrolling beat-em-up sequence in the tradition of Double Dragon. Fight your way through a grim 1985 by jumping, hitting and kicking at Biff's lackeys.
4. Band Puzzle: Rearrange the mixed-up parts of an animated picture of the school band in this sliding block puzzle. The clock is ticking.
5. Hoverboard Chase 2: Another hoverboard sequence, similar to the first one, only this time set in 1955.

p: Back to the Future III (1991)(Image Works)[cr BBC][one disk].st
n: Back to the Future III (1991)(Image Works)[cr BBC][one disk]

meta.path: ./Back to the Future III (1991)(Image Works)[cr BBC][one disk].st
meta.name: Back To The Future Part III
meta.desc:
Back to the Future III is an multi-action game. Marty McFly and Doc Brown have traveled back through time to the year 1885 and they're soon facing Mad Dog Tannen's gang and have to find a way to return to the present. This game takes 4 scenes from the movie Back to the Future III and turns them into arcade sequences:
- Buckboard Chase: Doc Brown goes horseback in an attempt to save Hill Valley's lovely school teacher Clara. This game of quick ducking, jumping and shooting alternates between a side-scrolling and a top-down perspective.
- Shooting Gallery: A classic game of aim-and-shoot, spiced up by hidden extras and bonus targets.
- Pie Throwing: Meet the Mad Dog gang. They have guns,and you have... cream pies. It's an isometric version of the shooting gallery but the targets shoot back.
- The Train: Basically a side-scrolling beat-em-up on train wagons with some ducking and jumping. Get rid of the mechanics and collect speed logs to push the engine to a magic 88 mph.
