meta.name: Backlash
meta.desc: Game-play consists of arcade style fast and frantic reflex action from the first-person perspective, much akin to Atari's coin-op Battlezone. The game takes place on a seemingly endless flat landscape, littered with obstacles in the form of some pseudo 3D spikes protruding from the ground.  Armadas of hostile UFOs shoot fire balls at you from every direction. Your aiming reticle is in the centre of the display, and is surrounded by circular radar, which is formed by a series of small white dots, within this are numerous red dots which represent the UFO enemies. You are dealt an initial five lives, and you score points for each UFO destroyed. The game features environmental effects, such as day time turning to night, and vice versa.

meta.name: Badlands
meta.desc: Bad Lands es un juego de carreras ambientado en un futuro postapocalíptico. Han pasado cincuenta años desde que el desastre nuclear cambiara el mundo. Las carreras de velocidad son ahora una batalla sin cuartel entre coches armados. Las carreras tienen lugar en circuitos construidos sobre las ruinas de la peligrosa zona nuclear conocida como BADLANDS, y cada carrera se disputa a tres vueltas. Los coches están equipados con armas con las que se puede disparar a los competidores para ralentizarlos. También es posible ganar o comprar mejoras de misiles que destruirán por completo un vehículo contrario.

meta.name: Badlands Pete
meta.desc: Get the hell out'a town. Badlands Pete Coyote is the meanest leanest six gun machine. His quick fire two-handed gun style and steely glare are recognised and feared by desperados everywhere. Take on the role of Badlands Pete and rescue the governor's daughters. Battle mountain men, renegade Indians, Mexican banditos, rustlers and all sons of crazy characters. Take nothing for granted, the old ladles, squaws and saloon gals may not be the sweet little things you think.

meta.name: Ballistix
meta.desc: Psygnosis' Ballistix is an arcade game in which you have to manipulate a ball in order to score a goal with your opponent. To do this, you will control an arrow that defines a direction, and pressing the fire key will launch a ball from this arrow in the direction the arrow points to; by launching balls at correct angles, you will manipulate the main ball and control the way it moves. Ballistix also keeps certain physics laws (namely gravity and friction), and will present you with varying obstacles in either one or two player mode.

meta.name: Barbarian : The Ultimate Warrior
meta.desc: ?... Y he aquí que un poderoso guerrero aparecerá, procedente de los helados eriales del Norte, y se alzará solo contra las fuerzas del mal...? (El libro de la Muerte)

meta.name: Barbarian II : The Dungeon Of Drax
meta.desc:
In the sequel to Barbarian / Death Sword, the Wizard Drax is back after your previous defeat of him. But this time, you're not alone. The princess you saved back then has taken up a sword and joined your cause! Now, it's more than a death match. You have to explore the many tunnels in his dungeon, defeat the dangerous monsters that come between you and put cold steel to Drax's throat.
The game has similar game play to the original, but with a different challenge. Various monsters will come and attack you, but you'll need to use different approaches in order to defeat each of them. For example, you can't overhead chop a monster that's shorter than your axe. There are 4 dungeon levels to explore before you reach Drax at the final stage.

meta.name: Barbarian II : The Dungeon Of Drax
meta.desc:
In the sequel to Barbarian / Death Sword, the Wizard Drax is back after your previous defeat of him. But this time, you're not alone. The princess you saved back then has taken up a sword and joined your cause! Now, it's more than a death match. You have to explore the many tunnels in his dungeon, defeat the dangerous monsters that come between you and put cold steel to Drax's throat.
The game has similar game play to the original, but with a different challenge. Various monsters will come and attack you, but you'll need to use different approaches in order to defeat each of them. For example, you can't overhead chop a monster that's shorter than your axe. There are 4 dungeon levels to explore before you reach Drax at the final stage.

meta.name: Batman : The Caped Crusader
meta.desc: El superhéroe de los tebeos, Batman, irrumpe en tu ordenador en una explosiva aventura de arcade en la que te enfrentas a las fuerzas del mal en Gotham City. Los gráficos estilo cómic y la animación lo convierte en un juego innovador, que te proporcionará horas y horas de entretenimiento.

meta.name: Battle Chess
meta.desc: Battle Chess es un juego de ajedrez bastante típico, pero viene con un giro: todas las piezas están representadas por figuras pequeñas y realistas que caminan por el tablero de ajedrez, y cuando una pieza toma otra, ambas participan en una batalla animada. Hay una animación diferente para cada permutación, según las piezas que se capturen o se capturen. También puedes jugar en 2D sin animación.

meta.name: Battle Command
meta.desc: Battle Command is a 3D arcade/strategy game, loosely derived from the same developers' Carrier Command. In a near future alternate reality, the Ultra War is fought between the two dominate races in the New World. The 'Mauler' is the latest technology - an Armored Fighting Machine capable of being lifted in and out of hostile territory by a fast Stealth Chopper, and armed with the most advanced weaponry science can devise. You command a single "Mauler" assault tank in one of a series of scenarios. These range from a railway ambush to escort duties and a raid on a riverside hideout. Before starting you must choose the right weaponry based on the mission briefing.

meta.name: Battlehawks 1942
meta.desc: Vuela como piloto estadounidense o japonés en una de las 4 operaciones en el Teatro del Pacífico durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial. Esta simulación también puede calificar como software educativo porque el manual presenta toneladas de información histórica. Se representan doce aviones (incluidas las variantes) y unos 20 tipos de barcos. El primero de la trilogía de combate aéreo de la Segunda Guerra Mundial de Lucasfilm/Lawrence Holland.

meta.name: Battle Master
meta.desc:
An early squad based combat strategy game set in a medieval style fantasy world.
The player decides which race they want to play (Human, Orc, Dwarf or Elf) each with their own strengths and weaknesses. It is then a matter of clearing out areas of opponents and finding items to enhance your character's and companions abilities. 
There are many traps to avoid and death is a constant in what most people would find a very tough game. 
The nearest game to compare it to would be Rage Of Mages, though that has more of an RPG focus, it does bear aesthetic similarities and a squad based fantasy fighting theme.

meta.name: Beyond the Ice Palace
meta.desc:
La leyenda «Mas allá del Palacio de Hielo y hacia el Norte» cuenta la historia de una tierra mística donde viven extrañas criaturas. Es una tierra de fantasía y magia, de duendes y espíritus, de dioses y diablos.
Este lugar está siendo arrasado por una terrible guerra entre las fuerzas del bien y el mal, guerra que los espíritus de la luz están perdiendo.
En un último intento por restablecer el orden, los Espíritus de los Bosques se reunen con el Consejo de Ancianos y, entre todos, bendicen una flecha que lanzan al aire. Aquel que la encuentre se verá inmerso en una gran aventura, pues sobre sus hombros caerá la misión de terminar, de una vez por todas, con la desolación y la oscuridad.

meta.name: Bionic Commando
meta.desc:
En Bionic Commando, el jugador toma el control de un soldado con un brazo biónico que se extiende y se contrae. El brazo biónico permite al soldado agarrarse a objetos fijos, balancearse y subir niveles. El brazo también puede agarrar a los adversarios y tirar de ellos hacia el protagonista.
La misión del jugador es asaltar la fortaleza del enemigo y destruir el ordenador que le permite utilizar su arma letal.

meta.name: The Black Cauldron
meta.desc: The Black Cauldron is the video game adaptation of the unfamous eponym Disney movie from 1985. You play Taran, apprentice pig keeper who has to prevent the malicious Horned King to obtain the black cauldron and create his undead army. The gameplay is similar to the other Sierra games from this period (Space Quest II or King's Quest III): it's an adventure game – point & click where you control the main character to walk, run, swim, talk to other characters… The interface is quite simple and the game not very difficult which makes it quite approachable. One of the game subtlety is that you can play it to follow the original story but being more creative will bring you more points and an alternate ending (up to 6).

meta.name: Black Tiger
meta.desc: En este juego, encarnas a un bárbaro que debe matar a tres dragones que han descendido del cielo y han sumido el reino en la oscuridad. Tienes que atravesar varias zonas y destruir a los monstruos que encuentres en tu camino. Por el camino te encontrarás con ancianos que, una vez rescatados, te darán objetos como tiempo extra, más vitalidad o más monedas. También pueden venderte objetos como mejoras de armadura, armas, llaves de cofres del tesoro o pociones antienvenenamiento. Puedes recoger monedas destruyendo ciertos monstruos o rompiendo vasijas.

meta.name: Blasteroids
meta.desc:
Blasteroids es una actualización de su antepasado arcade "Asteroids" en el que el objetivo es eliminar todos los sectores de asteroides y naves enemigas. Una vez completada esta tarea, el jugador se enfrenta a Mukor, el jefe que gobierna todas las galaxias.
La nave del jugador aparece primero en el centro de cuatro agujeros de gusano, entre los que debe elegir su destino. A continuación, será transportada a un sector del sistema estelar elegido.
A diferencia de "Asteroides", la nave debe reponer su suministro de combustible recogiendo cristales de asteroides de colores. Algunos sectores no ofrecen estos cristales, y si la nave se queda sin combustible, se pierde.

meta.name: Blinky's Scary School
meta.desc:
The first of Blinky the ghost's two outings, the ghost with the most has to progress through a series of levels and remove the hazards left by ghost-busters (who aren't called Peter, Egon, Winston or Ray for licensing reasons). He does this by collecting the right objects to cast the all important spells.
The levels themselves are flick-screen and are layered with platforms. Making the task difficult are spiders, mice and the like - watch out in particular for the jumping frogs. Once the appropriate spells have been cast (involving lots of back-tracking to collect objects and bring them to the cauldron) the objects to make an underwater diving suit must be obtained.

meta.name: Black Lamp
meta.desc:
Black Lamp is a platform game in which you have to find and collect several colored lamps and bring them back, one by one, to a case located in the first room. There are also several types of bonuses to collect along the way, and many enemies and creatures (some flying) to fight off. The ultimate goal is to bring all the colored lamps back to the case, including the elusive Black Lamp.
The Black Lamp world is presented as a collection of rooms, all connected with ladders and/or doors, as well as outside areas where you must defend yourself by shooting or avoiding the attacking creatures.
The graphics are very sharp and colorful, and all fireplaces, candles and torches are animated.

meta.name: Bloodwych
meta.desc:
La tierra de Trazere estuvo antaño gobernada por la poderosa y benévola organización de magos conocida como los Bloodwych. Gobernados por el Gran Dragón, los Bloodwych mantenían el país en equilibrio, protegiéndolo del mal y llevándolo a la prosperidad. Sin embargo, el segundo al mando de los Bloodwych, llamado Zendick, se volvió contra su grupo, desterró a sus oponentes al plano astral y comenzó a trabajar en un loco plan para invocar al Señor de la Entropía. El jugador controla al campeón de Trazere, cuyo objetivo es detener a Zendick y restaurar la paz en la tierra.
Bloodwych es un juego de laberintos en 3D en primera persona. La característica especial de este juego es el soporte de pantalla dividida para dos jugadores.
Cada jugador controla a un grupo de cuatro personajes. Las cuatro clases básicas son guerrero, mago, aventurero y ladrón.
meta.genre: Juego de Rol / RPG de Mazmorras

meta.name: Bloodwych
meta.desc:
La tierra de Trazere estuvo antaño gobernada por la poderosa y benévola organización de magos conocida como los Bloodwych. Gobernados por el Gran Dragón, los Bloodwych mantenían el país en equilibrio, protegiéndolo del mal y llevándolo a la prosperidad. Sin embargo, el segundo al mando de los Bloodwych, llamado Zendick, se volvió contra su grupo, desterró a sus oponentes al plano astral y comenzó a trabajar en un loco plan para invocar al Señor de la Entropía. El jugador controla al campeón de Trazere, cuyo objetivo es detener a Zendick y restaurar la paz en la tierra.
Bloodwych es un juego de laberintos en 3D en primera persona. La característica especial de este juego es el soporte de pantalla dividida para dos jugadores.
Cada jugador controla a un grupo de cuatro personajes. Las cuatro clases básicas son guerrero, mago, aventurero y ladrón.
meta.genre: Juego de Rol / RPG de Mazmorras

meta.name: Blue Angel 69
meta.desc: Blue Angel 69 combines the idea of Maxit with pictures of sexy female androids. The player takes the role of certain person who is proposed to play this board game with an android. If the player wins, more of the exposed picture of the opponent is displayed. There are ten stages to complete. In the game there is an 8x8 board. Each space in the board contains a point value. The object of the game is to earn as many points as possible by moving a marker to a non empty space to collect how ever many points are in that space. The first player is only able to move the marker horizontally, and the second player can only move the marker vertically. The board contains both negative and positive point values, so ideally you want to take a high, positive point value and force your opponent to take a negative value. The game ends when no more moves are possible, and the player with the most points wins.

meta.name: BMX Simulator
meta.desc:
This is an overhead-viewed racing game similar in style to Super Sprint. There are 7 courses of increasing difficulty, incorporating ramps and bumps which significantly affect the bike's handling. Each course has a time limit you must complete 3 laps of the course within, or it's game over. The further inside the time limit you are, the more points you score.
There's a computer opponent, but the scoring isn't affected by whether you beat him just so long as you qualify. There is a two-player mode. A unique feature at the time is the action replay, which can be viewed in slow motion.

meta.name: Bobo
meta.desc:
The game Bobo is an cartoon style arcade game.
The main character is Bobo - controlled by you - he is an inmate and has been sentenced for 17 years.
In this game inmate Bobo must do many chores, such as peeling potatoes, ladling soup to his fellow prisoners, helping his fellow prisoners to escape, jumping electric wires and singing lullabies to his snoring cell mates.
Besides playing all events it is possible to select and play just one event.
Up to six player can play this game by entering their names. They play alternating not simultaneously
Each event can be played by joystick or keyboard. The specific moves you have to make vary from event to event but it come basically down to moving the joystick or keyboard keys fast from left to right. To pick things up you have to move the joystick downwards (keyboard arrow key down). Tossing things is done by moving the joystick up (when using the keyboard you have to press cursor key up).
Below you 'll find a brief description of each event:
Bobo has a job in the prisons canteen. He must serve soup to the other inmates and keep their soup plates full. To do this Bobo must move around the tables. When his supply of soup is empty he must refill it at the top of the screen where a new supply of soup is available. If his fellow inmates demand more soup they  start banging and hammering on the tables. The score of this event is based on how many plates of soup he hands out.
Peeling potatoes is not Bobo's favorite chore but he has to do it. He has to pick up a potato, then peeling it and when that's done tossing it away. Bobo scores points based on the number of potatoes he has peeled. If a potato is not fully peeled it will be tossed back.
In the next event Bobo must help his inmates to escape prison. The inmates are jumping out of their cell windows and it is Bobo's task to get them over the prison wall by moving a trampoline around. 
The score is based on how many inmates actually can escape. Bobo must be sure to catch the inmates under the right angle with his trampoline because if he fails the inmates will crash into the prison wall.
Finally, Bobo found an way to escape prison. He must jump from wire to wire and as the wires are electrified he must take care not to be electrocuted. The score in this event based on how long Bobo can prevent being electrocuted. Bonus points can be earned by picking up the green objects that appear occasionally on the wires
In the last event Bobo has been captured by the police and returned to his cell. He can't sleep because his cell mates are snoring and to stop it he has to sing lullabies to them. He has to climb the beds and not wake his cell mates by stumbling around his cell. When all cell mates are fast asleep Bobo himself must go to bed to get some rest himself. The score in this event is based on the time Bobo is actually able to sleep himself.

meta.name: Bomb Jack
meta.desc:
Toma el control de Jack y recoge todas las bombas para pasar a la siguiente ronda. Esto no es tan fácil como suena con numerosos enemigos como pájaros, tortugas y momias que se interponen en el camino.
nnLos fondos para los Niveles consisten en ubicaciones reales como; Miami Beach, Sphynx o Sastle Neuschwanstein.
nnTiene 99 niveles pero una vez que alcanzas 99 el juego salta de vuelta a la ronda 0. Los niveles individuales realmente se repiten mucho antes.

meta.name: Bombuzal
meta.desc:
Little Bombuzal has to blow up bombs on little islands in this puzzle game. In order to advance to the next level, all bombs need to detonate. There are various sizes of bombs. Bigger ones have such a huge blast radius that Bombuzal cannot trigger them directly - instead, he has to explode smaller bombs first and cause a chain reaction. So as one might imagine, later levels turn into loud blastfests that need to be carefully planned.
Besides, later levels introduce all kinds of additional hazards and gimmicks, like ice floors, movable bombs, disappearing ground tiles, and much more. Nobody said being a pyromaniac is easy.

meta.name: Borrowed Time
meta.desc:
Encarnas a un detective privado con ocho casos de diversa importancia, que puedes conocer leyendo los expedientes correspondientes. Una llamada anónima altera tu rutina diaria: ¡te avisan de que alguien intenta matarte! Hay veinte personas que pueden enfadarse lo suficiente como para decidir matarte.
En este juego tienes que escribir combinaciones de verbos y sustantivos para realizar una acción. Los lugares se describen en texto y se presentan mediante imágenes, estas últimas a menudo proporcionan información adicional no incluida en la descripción del texto.

meta.name: Boston Bomb Club
meta.desc: In this humorous puzzle-action game you as one of the members of mad scientists club have to play the game with other members. Billiard table is now a puzzle maze, where opponents throw bombs, and you have to operate some mechanisms to pass the bombs in certain places. Level after level the mechanisms are added and the difficulty is raised.

p: Boulder Dash Construction Kit (1987)(First Star Software)[!].stx
n: Boulder Dash Construction Kit (1987)(First Star Software)[!]

meta.name: Boulder Dash : Construction Kit
meta.desc:
Rockford the Ant returns in another Boulder Dash adventure contains 15 new levels, in addition to the easy-to-use game editor. Players can build, save, and play their own levels. The software includes a feature to sequence your levels on a separate game disk.
All of the elements and hazards from the previous Boulder Dash outings are back: The fireflies, butterflies, growing amoebas, enchanted walls, and of course, the boulders. New features include titanium (indestructible) walls, growing walls, and slime that allows boulders and diamonds to drop through it at a varying rate.

meta.name: Brataccas
meta.desc:
Brataccas is one of the very first Atari ST and Amiga games ever produced. Controlled using the mouse, it combines exploration, puzzle-solving and combat.
You play a character named Kyne, a man who has a price on his head. You must search the mining asteroid, Brattacus, to gather proof of a government plot against you and to try to stay alive. Surveillance cameras are watching you, so take any chance to disable them.
Brataccas is a place where greed and corruption rule the day.  The residents are treacherous, and while they can be bribed they are not above murder, so be careful out there.

meta.name: Brides Of Dracula
meta.desc:
Brides of Dracula es un juego para dos jugadores a pantalla partida. Cada jugador controla al cazavampiros Van Helsing o al Conde Drácula. Van Helsing ha sido convocado al pueblo de Bistritz para matar a Drácula y a sus esposas. Su objetivo es encontrar trece herramientas para matar a Drácula y devolvérselas a Helsing. Para Drácula, el objetivo es conseguir trece esposas encontrando mujeres, mordiéndolas y llevándolas de vuelta a la cripta, donde trece ataúdes están alineados y esperando a sus destinatarias.
Algunos de los peligros sólo pueden afectar a uno de los personajes (los engendros sólo atacan a Van Helsing, mientras que los sacerdotes y los aldeanos sólo dañan a Drácula). Cada jugador comienza con tres vidas. Los objetos y las mujeres recogidos se muestran en la parte inferior de la ventana de personaje, junto con la barra de salud. El juego se desarrolla en el cementerio y el pueblo adyacente.

meta.name: Bubble Bobble
meta.desc:
Bubble Bobble es la historia de dos humanos, Bub y Bob, que deambulan por la misteriosa cueva de los monstruos y mágicamente se convierten en dinosaurios. La única forma de transformarse es llegar al final de la cueva ...
Bubble Bobble es un juego de plataformas, con cada nivel en una sola pantalla. Los enemigos deben ser eliminados de un nivel para pasar al siguiente. Con un jugador controlando a Bub y el otro controlando a Bob, el jugador puede saltar y recoger elementos para obtener puntos. Sin embargo, el verdadero poder que tienen Bub y Bob es la capacidad de hacer burbujas. Estas burbujas pueden ser plataformas para saltar o atrapar enemigos. Los enemigos atrapados en una burbuja deben explotar saltando sobre ellos, en donde se convertirán en fruta. Además, los power-ups a veces flotan en burbujas. Incluyen relámpagos, que vuelan horizontalmente hacia los enemigos, y agua, que arrastra al jugador y a los enemigos hacia abajo, fluyendo sobre las plataformas.

meta.name: Bubble Bobble
meta.desc:
Bubble Bobble es la historia de dos humanos, Bub y Bob, que deambulan por la misteriosa cueva de los monstruos y mágicamente se convierten en dinosaurios. La única forma de transformarse es llegar al final de la cueva ...
Bubble Bobble es un juego de plataformas, con cada nivel en una sola pantalla. Los enemigos deben ser eliminados de un nivel para pasar al siguiente. Con un jugador controlando a Bub y el otro controlando a Bob, el jugador puede saltar y recoger elementos para obtener puntos. Sin embargo, el verdadero poder que tienen Bub y Bob es la capacidad de hacer burbujas. Estas burbujas pueden ser plataformas para saltar o atrapar enemigos. Los enemigos atrapados en una burbuja deben explotar saltando sobre ellos, en donde se convertirán en fruta. Además, los power-ups a veces flotan en burbujas. Incluyen relámpagos, que vuelan horizontalmente hacia los enemigos, y agua, que arrastra al jugador y a los enemigos hacia abajo, fluyendo sobre las plataformas.

meta.name: Bubble Ghost
meta.desc:
Bubble Ghost tiene que soplar una pompa para salir del castillo de su creador. Tu tarea es guiarle mientras desplaza la burbuja por los huecos de las habitaciones. La dirección de la burbuja depende de la posición desde la que se sopla.
Velas, ventiladores y otros obstáculos contribuyen a dificultar la tarea del pequeño Bubble Ghost. Bubble Ghost es invencible, pero la pompa está a punto de estallar si algo llega a tocarla. Dispones de cinco burbujas antes de que la partida termine.

meta.name: Buggy Boy
meta.desc:
Buggy Boy es un juego de carreras de Buggys. El objetivo del juego era recorrer uno de cinco recorridos (Offroad, Norte, Este, Sur u Oeste) en el menor tiempo posible. Cada recorrido tiene cinco etapas, cada una llena de obstáculos como cantos rodados y paredes de ladrillo. Se otorgan puntos por atravesar puertas y recoger banderas.
El jugador también puede golpear troncos y tocones de árboles para saltar el buggy sobre los obstáculos, ganando puntos extra mientras está en el aire. También se otorgan puntos extra por conducir el buggy sobre una rueda.

meta.name: Bully's Sporting Darts
meta.desc: Do you like to play darts? Would you like to have the opportunity to play darts on your computer? Here is your chance. This game offers seven scoring styles such as Golf, Cricket, and the normal 501 scoring style. Choose how you want to score the game and hop right in and play. Aim your dart with your joystick or keyboard, then let it fly and hope you hit something good! The game automatically scores for you so if you do not know how to score a dart game, you can still play. Knowing what you should aim for is helpful for getting high scores, however.

meta.name: Cadaver
meta.desc:
In the person of the thief Karadoc, players set out to raid the five stories of the castle Wulf.
Legend has it that it’s filled with treasure. What the legend didn’t say is that the Castle is also filled with deadly traps, riddles and monsters. Surviving is not only a question of defending your life.  Karadoc also has to prove his wit in collecting objects, putting them to the right use, mastering spells and solving tasks posed by the gods. Quick reflexes and jumping skill wouldn’t hurt either.

meta.name: Cannon Fodder
meta.desc:
Guía a un equipo de hasta seis soldados a través de múltiples zonas de batalla en este juego de acción y estrategia de arriba abajo.  Selecciona un soldado o un grupo y pulsa un botón para moverlos a un lugar determinado y otro para disparar a un enemigo. También puedes recoger granadas o cohetes que puedes utilizar para destruir grupos de enemigos, edificios o determinados vehículos.
Cada misión tiene un objetivo específico, y en algunas intervienen vehículos como tanques. Tus tropas pueden cruzar el agua pero no pueden disparar en ella, por lo que encontrar y controlar puentes suele ser crucial. Puedes utilizar la disposición de los árboles para encontrar escondites desde los que disparar, pero ten cuidado con los soldados enemigos que hacen lo mismo.

meta.name: Captain Blood
meta.desc:
El jugador encarna a un programador atrapado y clonado dentro de su propio juego. Poco a poco se transforma en una máquina y debe encontrar y destruir a sus cinco clones antes de perder definitivamente su forma humana.
La acción se desarrolla en Hydra, un universo imaginario, donde el jugador se desplaza de planeta en planeta, encontrándose con alienígenas de diferentes características, que pueden ayudarle o no a cumplir su misión. Captain Blood's Ark se caracteriza por su relativamente innovador sistema de diálogo, que permite al jugador crear frases a partir de iconos para comunicarse con los alienígenas.
El jugador controla una nave biológica llamada Arca, y debe lanzar sondas a las superficies de los planetas, haciéndolas navegar con éxito por el paisaje para localizar a un alienígena. El Arca también puede escanear planetas y, a veces, teletransportar alienígenas a diferentes lugares.

meta.name: Captain Fizz : Meets The Blaster-Trons
meta.desc: The Blaster-Trons have invaded the planet Icarus, which is set as 20 levels on top of the last. The people can only be saved if a hero or two step forward and reach each of the 20 lifts in this Gauntlet-style game. Two players is the ideal, as gameplay is simultaneous and only ever fills half the screen for each player. Each level has doors which are locked with colour coded keys, as well as doors which can only be used in one direction, and lots of long corridors and mazy layouts. Both yourself and the aliens are armed with lethal lazers, although you can take several hits before dying.

meta.name: Captive
meta.desc:
You awake in prison, without the memory of who you are, where you are and why you are imprisoned. In the corner of your cell you find a briefcase computer, which gives you the control over a unit of four droids. Now you must use these droids to find yourself, and free yourself.
With the help of the droids you explore tech-dungeons (its a SF-setting, but the feeling is like fantasy rpgs with robots and droids) and seek information, which lead to the next planet(s) on a path, which end marks your cell.
The Movement and Fighting is similar to games like Eye of the Beholder, but you can buy weapons and droid-parts in shops. The droids haven't levels like in normal rpgs, you must buy upgrades for the different parts of the droids, which make them stronger and faster. You can also buy a variety of chips, which allow the droids to see in darkness, invert the gravity or simple to shield a little period of time.
meta.genre: Juego de Rol / RPG de Mazmorras

meta.name: Carrier Command
meta.desc:
Command Carrier está ambientada en 2166, cuando las pruebas nucleares han creado unas islas llenas de energía sin explotar. Un equipo de científicos ha desarrollado dos portaaviones para colonizar este archipiélago. Tras el robo del ACC Omega por la organización terrorista STANZA, el jugador toma el control del segundo portaaviones, el ACC Epsilon, para impedir que la facción contraria colonice las islas y destruir el prototipo robado. Para ello, cuenta con vehículos anfibios: las Morsas y aviones: las Mantas. El jugador tendrá que construir dispositivos de extracción de recursos y luego fabricar combustible, armas y edificios defensivos para tomar el control y defender las islas del archipiélago.
Los gráficos son en 3D y ofrecen una innovadora combinación de juego bélico y de acción. Hay muchos elementos de estrategia en tiempo real.

meta.name: Castle Master
meta.desc:
Castle Master utiliza un sistema de juego en 3D en primera persona. Debes explorar un castillo medieval armado con un tirachinas / lanzapiedras para liberar a un ser querido del malvado "Magister".
El juego combina acción y resolución de puzles en cuatro torres principales de tres niveles cada una. Las puertas deben abrirse con una de las diez llaves proporcionadas. Éstas no están marcadas, al igual que las distintas pociones, por lo que resulta difícil saber qué llaves abren qué puertas y qué pociones son beneficiosas.
El contacto con ghouls o cgutes drena tu energía. Es posible recuperar algo comiendo queso. El movimiento y la puntería se controlan por separado.

p: Castle Master II - The Crypt (1990)(New Dimensions).st
n: Castle Master II - The Crypt (1990)(New Dimensions)

meta.name: Castle Master II : The Crypt
meta.desc: En un castillo oscuro y siniestro, cruza un foso infestado de tiburones y arriesga tu vida en un desesperado intento de rescate. Elige liberar al príncipe o a la princesa. Lucha contra los espíritus malignos con tu tirachinas. Busca llaves, pociones y pistas para desvelar los misterios del "Castillo de la Eternidad". Usa tus ojos y oídos para descubrir las soluciones a los alucinantes rompecabezas. Habitaciones secretas, pasillos oscuros y trampas ocultas, todo ello en una impresionante vista 3D en primera persona, hacen de Castle Master una experiencia de acción y aventura única y atmosférica. ¡Entra en "el castillo de la eternidad" si te atreves! Podrías quedarte allí para siempre.

meta.name: Chambers Of Shaolin
meta.desc: Aún eres sólo un aprendiz, pero ya sueñas con convertirte en el igual de los más grandes monjes Shaolin. No por gloria, no por honor. Mucho menos por dinero. Sino para alcanzar la plenitud en la abnegación. La dicha en el desinterés. Así que, sólo cuando hayas logrado progresar superando las diversas pruebas en las cámaras Shaolin, y luego hayas tenido el privilegio de competir contra los mejores luchadores del templo, serás juzgado apto para afrontar tu mayor desafío: acabar con el dragón rojo.

meta.name: Championship Baseball
meta.desc:
In this traditional baseball simulation, gameplay takes place mainly on a split screen.One side shows an overview of the field, the other showing the batter, with the latter view disappearing when the ball is hit.
The game requires you to "draft" a team before play, composing the best possible squad based on each player's skill attributes. The game also allows a semblance of managerial control, and has an optional batting practice mode to warm up. It then allows you to play individual games, or participate in a 4 division, 24-team championship.

meta.name: Championship Wrestling
meta.desc:
Arcade-style game about wrestling, featuring 8 different characters, like K.C. Colossus or Prince Vicious, and 25 different moves, like leg drops, spin kicks, body slams, rope bouncing, flying drop kicks and the so-called "infamous" atomic drop. You can even throw your opponent off the ring. Scoring is based on the complexity of your moves.
Two-player hot-seat feature available as well, and up to 8 players can play in the same championship.

meta.name: Chariots Of Wrath
meta.desc: You are prince Agar of the Forgotten Kingdom. Your arch-rival, the Baron, has kidnapped the Princess Arthena, your future Queen. The player needs to guide Agar through different levels to save her. Each level however has completely different gameplay. The first one is set inside a castle with a first-person perspective where Agar needs to defend it against invading creatures by shooting them, similar to Operation Wolf. The second level is a Breakout variant. The third one a vertically-scrolling top-down shooter and the fourth one returns to the Breakout-like gameplay. The fifth one has typical platform gameplay, the sixth one returns to the mechanics of the first level and finally the seventh one is an Asteroids clone.

meta.name: Chase H.Q.
meta.desc:
"Chase H.Q." es un juego de carreras basado en puntos de control en el que el jugador asume el papel de un policía encubierto llamado Tony Gibson en este juego inspirado en "Miami Vice" de Taito. Gibson conduce un poderoso coche de policía sin marcas (parecido a un Porsche 911) junto con su compañero, 'Raymond Broady' y debe perseguir y detener a varios criminales.
El jugador tiene entre cincuenta y cinco y setenta segundos para alcanzar al criminal que huye, y luego, en el mismo período de tiempo, vuelve a chocar repetidamente contra el coche del criminal hasta que éste queda demasiado dañado para conducir. El coche del criminal se aleja constantemente, así que si el jugador choca repetidamente o conduce demasiado despacio, el criminal escapará y el juego terminará.

meta.name: Chess Simulator
meta.desc: Chess Simulator is a chess game which offers the standard features: playing chess against the AI which can be set in a number of different levels suited for beginners and advanced players (the maximum ELO rating is 2150); optionally with an advice option which tries to teach chess to the player. Graphical features include a number of different pieces and the option to change the angle and zoom of the 3D playfield. Of course it is also possible to use a top-down perspective. The game also provides a way to calculate the user's ELO score: the program presents 24 situations and the player must provide likely moves within two minutes.

meta.name: Chuck Rock
meta.desc: Unga Bunga' Ophelia, la esposa de Chuck Rock, ha sido capturada por ese inservible de Gary Gritter. ¡Podrá Chuck abrirse paso a través de las cinco fases con retos cada vez mayores, decenas de dinosaurios trastornados, y sorpresas a lo largo de todo el camino? ¿O terminará su amor finalmente convertido en polvo?

meta.name: Cisco Heat : All American Police Car Race
meta.desc: En este juego de carreras, los jugadores conducen coches de policía en lugar de los habituales coches conducidos por locos de la velocidad (como en la serie Crazy Cars). Viola la ley en lugar de hacerla cumplir mientras corres por las calles de San Francisco. Recorre el puente Golden Gate, China Town y Twin Peaks, y evita colisionar con tranvías, otros coches (conducidos por molestos ciudadanos), edificios y controles, ¡todo ello mientras intentas llegar al siguiente punto de control antes de que se agote el tiempo! Utiliza el claxon para alertar de tu presencia a los demás usuarios de la carretera.

meta.name: The Colonel's Bequest
meta.desc: A murder mystery, taking place at a spooky plantation in the 1920's. College student Laura Bow is invited by her friend Lillian to come along to what has to be the most dysfunctional family gathering ever. The only problem is, various members of the family begin to mysteriously disappear! Done in the traditional Sierra adventure game style.

meta.name: Colorado
meta.desc: A survival game in which you must well, survive despite the constant threats of Indians and wildlife. The plot involves a search for a Cheyenne goldmine. The game also has many unconventional objects.

meta.name: Combo Racer
meta.desc:
This racing game has novelty value if nothing else - instead of the more conventional vehicles, it sets you riding a sidecar in a game with realistic and arcade elements. The circuits are based on real ones, although the opposition (of which there are 9) are known simply by first names such as David and Paul.
The display appears to use real 3D, with some fairly terrifying directional changes, although it doesn't tilt as you turn. A full map of your position relative to your rivals is presented at the top of the screen. Crashes cause gradual engine damage, reducing your initial 140mph top speed by a slight amount each time - you'll also lose time as you rejoin. Before each race you must set a qualifying lap, which allows you multiple attempts.

meta.name: Conflict : Europe
meta.desc:
At long last, the threat of nuclear nightmare diplomacy seems to be receding. The balance of terror that has entrapped humanity is loosening its grip. In CONFLICT: EUROPE we examine the "what if" scenarios that have dominated world affairs for the lost forty years.
Taking the player through seven different conflict situations, the simulation examines the shifting balance that exists between nuclear and conventional forces, between NATO and the Warsaw Pact. Allowing for full examination of the consequences of European conflict, CONFLICT: EUROPE shows why the nightmare must never become reality.
FEATURES:
- SIMULATION OF POSSIBLE WAR IN EUROPE NOW OR IN FUTURE
- SEVERAL DIFFERENT SCENARIOS ALLOW FOR DIFFERENT DISARMAMENT TREATIES
- GROUND, AIR ANO NAVAL FORCES INCLUDED
- FULL RANGE OF NUCLEAR AND CHEMICAL FIRE PLANS
- SPECIAL FORCES RAIDS
- AWACS AND SATELLITE RECONNAISSANCE
- COMPLEX FSM BASED STRATEGY SYSTEM

meta.name: Conflict : Europe
meta.desc:
At long last, the threat of nuclear nightmare diplomacy seems to be receding. The balance of terror that has entrapped humanity is loosening its grip. In CONFLICT: EUROPE we examine the "what if" scenarios that have dominated world affairs for the lost forty years.
Taking the player through seven different conflict situations, the simulation examines the shifting balance that exists between nuclear and conventional forces, between NATO and the Warsaw Pact. Allowing for full examination of the consequences of European conflict, CONFLICT: EUROPE shows why the nightmare must never become reality.
FEATURES:
- SIMULATION OF POSSIBLE WAR IN EUROPE NOW OR IN FUTURE
- SEVERAL DIFFERENT SCENARIOS ALLOW FOR DIFFERENT DISARMAMENT TREATIES
- GROUND, AIR ANO NAVAL FORCES INCLUDED
- FULL RANGE OF NUCLEAR AND CHEMICAL FIRE PLANS
- SPECIAL FORCES RAIDS
- AWACS AND SATELLITE RECONNAISSANCE
- COMPLEX FSM BASED STRATEGY SYSTEM

meta.name: Conqueror
meta.desc:
Conqueror is a polygonal isometric-view tank action/strategy game with an elaborate control system (emulating "real" tank controls on normal joysticks) and two-player possibilities by switching the controls to use one joystick each for gunner and driver.
The goal of the game is generally to destroy all enemy tanks on the map using a preset squad of tanks of your own. The tanks on the player's side that aren't controlled by the player act on AI, but the player-controlled tank can be switched at will via an in-game map. Alternately, the player can use that map to direct tanks to other places - but even when planning troop movements on the map, the game goes on.
To top things off, there is also a limited amount of resources allocated to the player and can be gained by destroying enemies; these resources can then be used to buy new tanks before the start of the next mission..

meta.name: Corporation
meta.desc: A first person shooter that requires you to think things through rather than just attack anything that moves.  This game preceded Wolfenstein 3D by a number of years, and while the walls were not ray cast, but solid fill polygons, it was still one of the earliest simulations to tackle a human viewpoint with complete, 360 degree freedom of movement.

meta.name: Crazy Cars II
meta.desc: Has descubierto pruebas de que un grupo deshonesto de policías está involucrado en un robo de autos. Para evitar que se beneficien de sus dudosas acciones, debes cruzar Estados Unidos lo más rápido posible. Esto se hace un poco más fácil por el hecho de que tu Ferrari F40 turbo puede ponerse a más de 300 Km/h.

meta.name: Creatures
meta.desc: Held in devilish torture chambers, an entire village of Fuzzy Wuzzies - the cutest but most mischievious characters ever - need your help! Control the only free Fuzzy, Clyde Radcliff, on a mission that takes him through theEFunted Black Forest of Gateau, to a land full of craze creatures, scuba diving in piranha ponds and into the lethal torture chambers themselves. You need quick reactions, a sharp brain and a crazy sense of humour to complete the cartoon game of the year - Creatures!

meta.name: Crime City
meta.desc: Crime City is a classical point-and-click adventure. You play Mr. White, a poor chap who writes detective stories but wants nothing more than to be a real private investigator. It's a pretty classical story: One day, he can't really write a thing, but then, a mysterious blonde stands before his door, telling him his Father, Henry White, was arrested for murder. It's up to you to prove the police wrong. A difference to the classical adventure exists: you need money to travel, get information or training. To get money, you can trade at the stock market. What's also different is that the time of the day really matters and that the protagonist becomes sleepy after staying up too long.

p: Curse of Ra, The (1990)(Rainbow Arts)[cr Empire].st
n: Curse of Ra, The (1990)(Rainbow Arts)[cr Empire]

meta.name: The Curse Of Ra
meta.desc: "The Curse of Ra" es un juego de puzzle en el que el jugador (Scarab) debe escapar de una pirámide resolviendo acertijos. El jugador debe eliminar todas las piedras de un tablero encontrando sus equivalentes. Sólo se pueden eliminar dos piedras con el mismo símbolo a la vez y deben estar en línea recta, horizontal o verticalmente. No todas las piedras se pueden mover, y hay teletransportadores, obstáculos y desvíos que dificultan el juego. También hay trampas, como el hielo que obliga a Scarab a moverse en una sola dirección.

meta.name: Cybercon III
meta.desc:
The world is in chaos, due to a computer system which was built to look after the world, but inevitably went wrong and started killing people. Only a few people remain, of which you are one, and your mission is to locate and destroy the Cybercon III computer.
The gameplay involves lots of exploration and puzzling, as you try to enter the complex and destroy or disable the hardware. Getting into the system is made easier by the presence of a secret entrance the computer doesn't know about. The computer has all manner of defences in place, which you can shoot out.

p: Cybernoid II (1989)(Hewson)[cr Neil of Cor Blimey][t].st
n: Cybernoid II (1989)(Hewson)[cr Neil of Cor Blimey][t]

meta.name: Cybernoid II : The Revenge
meta.desc:
Al mando de la mortífera nave Cybernoid, tu misión es rescatar la carga que ha sido robada por una oleada de barcos piratas.
El uso correcto de la gama de sistemas de armas es, una vez más, un factor clave. Entre ellas se incluyen cañones de puntería lateral, bombas que rebotan, bombas "buscadoras" inteligentes, bombas que se mueven por el borde de la pantalla antes de encontrar un objetivo y bombas de tiempo que explotan segundos después de que las lances. Los barcos piratas derribados sueltan cargamento, y tienes que recoger el suficiente a través de numerosas pantallas. Tienes que escapar lo más rápido posible, ya que algunas pantallas son más peligrosas que otras, y no todos los alienígenas de cada pantalla actúan igual.

meta.name: Dangimere II : The Dungeon
meta.desc: One for Dungeonmaster fans. This is a one level demo of a great game. Explore the dungeon and discover what lurks around each corner. Contains some very detailed somewhat atmospheric graphics.
meta.genre: Juego de Rol / RPG de Mazmorras

meta.name: Dark Castle
meta.desc:
The Black Knight has brought misery to the land, and the end way to end this is to enter his haunted house to slay him. You are the brave adventurer taking on this quest through 14 increasingly-tough zones.
The bulk of the game is side-viewed, involving single screens to pass through, which incorporate ropes, cages and trapdoor. There are enemies walking, flying and hovering through this, and many of them respawn. Unusually your weapon to take them on (rocks) can be thrown through 360 degrees, which aims to make the gameplay more realistic and methodical. The screens were linked by hub screens, which the player passes through simply by clicking on a door.

meta.name: Darkman
meta.desc: Darkman en Atari ST es un juego de acción y plataformas basado en la película del mismo nombre. Juegas como Peyton Westlake, que regresa de entre los muertos como los muchos que se enfrentaron a "Darkman", buscando venganza contra el mafioso Robert G.Durant. Vive todos los momentos destacados de la película: la impresionante secuencia de la pelea en helicóptero, el tiroteo en el rascacielos, los dados con la muerte mientras te adentras en el tráfico de la autopista colgando de un helicóptero. En cada nivel, nuestro amigo deberá vencer al jefe final para acceder al siguiente nivel.

meta.name: Day Of The Viper
meta.desc:
The Sun League has been trying to fight back against the corrupted and oppressive Gar computer for many years. Now they have attacked a defense base. The only hope is for a Viper V droid to be sent in under your control to reactivate the planet's defenses.
To do this, you must find floppy disks that are everywhere in the station to reboot that evil computer! To complete this task, you must fight 33 types of little robots who attack you. The action is viewed in first-person 3D, with directional arrows on screen for movement and rotation.
There are 25 levels, each of which is automatically mapped as you explore it. Use turbolifts to get to them. Each object is managed by the game, and a notepad feature is provided to allow you to keep track of vital information.

meta.name: Barbarian : The Ultimate Warrior
meta.desc: ?... Y he aquí que un poderoso guerrero aparecerá, procedente de los helados eriales del Norte, y se alzará solo contra las fuerzas del mal...? (El libro de la Muerte)

meta.name: Death Trap
meta.desc: Death Trap is a sidescrolling platform game and as such it involves both action and adventure, even if the adventuring don't go further than finding levers to get through to the next part of the map. The theme of the game is medieval fantasy and it takes place in a castle (divide into five levels) which is where the trap in the title comes from. The trap has been set up by the magician king Shankriya and has involved inviolated for five centuries. It's the players job to make things right again. The game has a wide variety of enemies from ghosts to fireball throwing magicians. Defeating some enemies gives the player the player a flask with some liquid that can be converted into spells and such.

meta.name: Defender Of The Crown
meta.desc:
En Defender of the Crown juegas como uno de los cuatro caballeros sajones de la Inglaterra medieval, en un momento en que el país está sumido en la confusión porque el rey ha muerto y le han robado la corona. Sajones y normandos se culpan mutuamente y luchan por el control de Inglaterra.
Tras una breve introducción del propio Robin de Locksley, comienzas el juego con un único castillo y 10 soldados a tus órdenes. Luego tendrás que construir tu ejército, tomar el control de más territorios y luchar contra los tres señores normandos, pero también a veces contra tus amigos sajones.
El juego tiene varios estilos diferentes: Puedes participar en una justa en la que tienes que derribar a tu oponente del caballo con una lanza, puedes ir a saquear un castillo en busca de botín o puedes atacar otro territorio/castillo.

meta.name: Deflektor
meta.desc:
En este juego hay que pensar mucho, en ambos sentidos de la palabra. Este juego de rompecabezas estratégico consiste en utilizar espejos para dirigir un haz de luz hacia una sucesión de 60 pantallas. Cada espejo puede ajustarse en 16 ángulos diferentes, cada uno de los cuales envía el haz de luz alrededor de la pantalla de distintas maneras.
Antes de activar la salida, hay que eliminar las minas que haya en una pantalla pasando el rayo por encima de ellas. Otras características integradas en los niveles incluyen teletransportadores y cambiadores de ángulo aleatorios, así como peligros que hay que evitar (hacen que el rayo se sobrecaliente) y droides que se mueven para cambiar la dirección de los espejos.

meta.name: Devious Designs
meta.desc:
A scientist obsessed with Picasso's cubist paintings develops a weapon that turns everything to cubes. The United Kingdom sends a secret agent to revert the affected objects and monuments back to their original state.
Devious Designs is a puzzle game where geometric shapes have to be assembled. The player controls a 007-style secret agent that has the ability to walk on the walls, lift heavy objects and shoot. Using these, he must drag and drop the geometric pieces scattered on the screen (by standing next to them and holding the fire button) on translucent slots. Each level is a screen with a timer on the top. When the counter runs out, the level is reset and the player looses one life. Like in Bubble Bobble, various objects fall from the screen that can be collected for points, along with more useful power-ups like explosives, extra-time, extra-lives and a special block than fills a slot (it can be shot if it's not needed). Also, if the player takes too long to solve the level a random enemy appears, but it can be killed by the agent's gun.
The game starts with 6 lives and has a password system.

meta.name: Dick Tracy
meta.desc: Dick Tracy es un juego de acción basado en la película del mismo nombre. El jugador asume el papel de Dick Tracy, un detective cuya vida da un vuelco el día en que su suegro es asesinado por un gángster llamado Big Boy Caprice. Dick Tracy sumerge al jugador en un mundo oscuro en el que cada encuentro acaba en un baño de sangre. Avanzas con la pistola en la mano mientras los gángsters te disparan desde la calle o desde las ventanas de los edificios. Puedes luchar con tus puños, una pistola o una ametralladora.

meta.name: Die Hard 2
meta.desc:
They said lightning never strikes twice...they were wrong.
You play the part of John Mc Lane in the arcade action game based on the n°1 UK and US cinema hit, set over 5 explosive levels.

meta.name: Diosa de Cozumel, La
meta.desc:
Yucatán... tierra de misterios, leyendas y magia.
Península selvática y pantanosa donde refulgió la civilización más impenetrable de América: Los Mayas.
Corría el año 1920. Tras haberse aprovisionado en la isla de Cuba, Doc Monro se dirige a esta enigmática tierra, pero un mal golpe del destino le hace naufragar en pleno Mar Caribe...

meta.name: Doodle Bug
meta.desc: Doodle Bug is a side-scrolling platform sequel to the programmer's earlier shooter Bug Bash in a very colourful cartoony style. Your aim as the Doodle Bug is to make your way through five different levels (with 3 sub-levels each), killing baddies by jumping on their heads until you eventually make it to the final baddie. The most unique thing about this game is the novel theme at its centre: You can choose between five different coloured pencils to throw at your baddies (presuming you've picked some up). If the pencil's flight path is uninterrupted then they'll draw a useful item for you: Either an Umbrella (for long falls), Ball (to be able to jump onto higher platforms), a Potion (invincibility), a Clock (stops time) and an Eraser (kills everything on screen).
meta.genre: Plataformas / Corre y Salta con desplazamiento

meta.name: Double Dragon
meta.desc:
Set in a post-apocalyptic New York, Double Dragon is the story of Billy and Jimmy Lee, twin brothers trained in the fighting style of Sou-Setsu-Ken. Together, they manage a small martial arts training school, teaching their students in self-defense. One day, Billy's girlfriend, Marian, is kidnapped off the street by the "Black Warriors", a savage street gang led by a man named Willy. The Black Warriors demand the Lee brothers disclose their martial arts secrets in exchange for Marian's freedom. The Lee brothers set out on a rescue mission to crush the Black Warriors and save Marian.
Using whatever techniques they have at their disposal, from the basic punches and kicks to the invulnerable elbow strike, as well any weapon that comes into their hands, the Lee brothers must pursue the gang through the city slum, industrial area and the forest before reaching their hideout to confront the big boss, Willy.
The NES version of this game also has an additional VS. fighting mode for one or two players. Players choose from a field of six different characters (Billy and 5 of the enemy characters) and enter into a one-on-one fighting match. Players have to punch, kick, jumpkick, and even use a weapon against their opponents until someone's health bar is fully drained. The winner is the last one standing.

p: Double Dragon II - The Revenge (1989)(Tradewest)(Disk 1 of 2).stx
n: Double Dragon II - The Revenge (1989)(Tradewest)(Disk 1 of 2)

meta.name: Double Dragon II : The Revenge
meta.desc: The lovely Marian was rescued from the clutches of the Black Warriors gang by Billy & Jimmy Lee in the first Double Dragon game, but now the gang has killed her in retaliation of their early defeat. The Dragons must now embark on a mission to avenge her d

meta.name: Dragonflight
meta.desc:
Dragonflight is a role playing fantasy game in which the player is seeking the immortality of the Dragon's Vale. A King can grant it if he is safely taken to the temple. 
The game is viewed from above. There are 10 dungeons to explore, encompassing 12 different cities and villages, all full of NPCs to interact with. Fights with hostile creatures occur regularly, with a tactical structure to encounters. Killing enemies boosts the victor's strength. Keep an eye on your hit points and magic. Over 150 items are featured, including some complex spells.

meta.name: Dragons Breath
meta.desc:
Immortality. 
Legend has it that the secret is hidden in the Throne Room of the Great Castle atop Dwarf Mountain at the centre of the land of Anrea.
Breed a fighting force of dragons and conquer the villages of Anrea. Collect taxes and buy magic ingredients from passing traders to cast spells. Finally, complete the Talisman that guides you to your ultimate goal.
Dragons Breath, a Fantasy Strategy game for up to three people.

meta.name: Dragons Of Flame
meta.desc: Situado entre los juegos de acción AD&D Dragonlance de SSI, Heroes of the Lance y Shadow Sorcerer. Este juego sigue la tradición de Heroes of the Lance con una vista orientada hacia la acción y el desplazamiento lateral, una ruptura de los juegos de rol estándar de GoldBox. Por lo que respecta a la trama, también se lleva a cabo entre esos dos juegos, siguiendo de cerca los módulos de novelas / juegos escritos por Weiss / Hickman. Usted toma el control de un personaje a la vez, y cada héroe tiene habilidades diferentes.

meta.name: Drakkhen
meta.desc:
ANHAK DRAKKHEN AGHNAHIR HURTHD!
The prophecy has been fulfilled. The world shall be ruled by the dragons. On an island far away, their lords prepare for the conquest of the lands. There is only one hope for mankind. The emperor sends out 4 heroes - warriors and magicians - to solve the Puzzle of Tears and prevent the invasion of the Drakkhen.
Drakkhen is a role-playing game with several ingenious features for its time. The eye-catcher is a mix of fast 3D landscapes and 2D interiors. The player's team will travel overland on a flat terrain made up of vectors with zoomed 2D objects (The same type of engine was later used in Eternam).
The player will encounter monsters and fight them in real-time combat and discover the palaces of the dragon lords. Indoors, the player has to find a way through the maze of chambers, solving puzzles and defeating the minions of the Drakkhen. Team members are depicted in 4 status window, thus allowing to see their current status and equipment at once.

meta.name: Drakkhen
meta.desc:
ANHAK DRAKKHEN AGHNAHIR HURTHD!
The prophecy has been fulfilled. The world shall be ruled by the dragons. On an island far away, their lords prepare for the conquest of the lands. There is only one hope for mankind. The emperor sends out 4 heroes - warriors and magicians - to solve the Puzzle of Tears and prevent the invasion of the Drakkhen.
Drakkhen is a role-playing game with several ingenious features for its time. The eye-catcher is a mix of fast 3D landscapes and 2D interiors. The player's team will travel overland on a flat terrain made up of vectors with zoomed 2D objects (The same type of engine was later used in Eternam).
The player will encounter monsters and fight them in real-time combat and discover the palaces of the dragon lords. Indoors, the player has to find a way through the maze of chambers, solving puzzles and defeating the minions of the Drakkhen. Team members are depicted in 4 status window, thus allowing to see their current status and equipment at once.

The player will encounter monsters and fight them in real-time combat and discover the palaces of the dragon lords. Indoors, the player has to find a way through the maze of chambers, solving puzzles and defeating the minions of the Drakkhen. Team members are depicted in 4 status window, thus allowing to see their current status and equipment at once.

meta.name: Driller
meta.desc:
El planeta Evath tiene dos lunas, Mitral y Triscupid. Mitral ha sido brutalmente explotada por unos forajidos, los Ketar, que han huido de la luna. En el subsuelo de Mitral se han formado grandes bolsas de gas, y si Mitral explota, miles de evathianos serán aniquilados al salir Evath de su órbita y la congelación acabará con toda la población del planeta. Los científicos han descubierto que un meteorito se aproxima y chocará contra Mitral en pocas horas, una auténtica catástrofe.
Tu misión es asegurar cada uno de los 18 sectores de Mitral colocando un equipo de perforación sobre las bolsas de gas que existen en cada sector antes de que el meteorito impacte contra el planeta.

meta.name: Drivin' Force
meta.desc:
Great racers from all around the world compete in the Power Drift style racing game. You can choose your nationality and gender, and use joystick or mouse control.
The perspective turns with the cars for a pseudo-3D effect, aiming to convey the speed of racing in a realistic and terrifying way. Formula 1 cars, buggies and trucks are among the six different vehicle types, each of which reacts to the varied terrain in different ways. Knockout and league competitions are included, with Mini modes in which you can immediately choose your vehicle.

meta.name: Dungeon Master
meta.desc:
Select your 4 adventurers and descend into the depths of the dungeon.  
Dungeon Master was a significant enhancement to the 3D dungeon crawl type of role-playing adventure game started by Wizardry and The Bard's Tale.  The addition of a mouse-based (real-time) combat and inventory system in Dungeon Master has been repeated by the Eye of the Beholder Trilogy, Lands of Lore series, and other late-classic-era RPG games.
meta.genre: Juego de Rol / RPG de Mazmorras

p: Dungeon Master 2 - Legend of Skulldeep (19xx)(FTL)[cr Atarilegend].st
n: Dungeon Master 2 - Legend of Skulldeep (19xx)(FTL)[cr Atarilegend]

meta.name: Dungeon Master
meta.desc:
Select your 4 adventurers and descend into the depths of the dungeon.  
Dungeon Master was a significant enhancement to the 3D dungeon crawl type of role-playing adventure game started by Wizardry and The Bard's Tale.  The addition of a mouse-based (real-time) combat and inventory system in Dungeon Master has been repeated by the Eye of the Beholder Trilogy, Lands of Lore series, and other late-classic-era RPG games.
meta.genre: Juego de Rol / RPG de Mazmorras

meta.name: E-Motion
meta.desc: This strategic action puzzle game features original gameplay. You control a spacecraft situated on a globe which you can rotate and move around the screen. You must knock globes into others of the same colour, to rid the screen of all the globes. The screen has no borders, so globes can be pushed off the side of the screen, increasing your tactical range. Knocking globes of different colors into each other produces smaller pods which need to be picked up quickly, giving you energy, or they will turn into globes and you will have to get rid of them too. Many of the globes are linked to other globes (or the ship) via string, and the level layouts include barriers as obstacles (and ricochet points), making the Newtonian physics more complex.

meta.name: Edd The Duck!
meta.desc:
On childrens TV in the early 90s, Edd the Duck and Wilson the arm were the familiar puppets helping with the link sections. Like most child-oriented licenses of the day, his first computer outing was a platform game, scrolling vertically and resembling Rainbow Islands, although much simplified.
Edd must progress up the levels within the time limit (water will come up to drown him - presumably polluted water through which a duck can't swim), while collecting every star. Bad guys can be stunned by shooting them, which makes them safe to touch, although nothing other than Edd actually dies. The levels are all themed around particular areas of the BBC offices, including a sci-fi set and the weather room.

meta.name: Elite
meta.desc:
Pilota tu nave espacial Cobra en un fantástico viaje de descubrimientos y aventuras, una prueba suprema de tus habilidades de combate, navegación y emprendimiento.
La mayor parte del juego consiste en viajar a diferentes sistemas estelares, comerciar con sus habitantes, ganar dinero y reputación. También se puede ganar dinero mediante misiones militares, caza de recompensas, minería de asteroides, ..... Cuando el personaje del jugador gana dinero, puede mejorar sus naves con mejores armas, escudos, mayor capacidad de carga, sistema de acoplamiento automático, etc.
Independientemente de cómo gane el dinero, por las buenas o por las malas, tendrá que correr por el espacio luchando contra naves piratas y alienígenas hostiles.

meta.name: Emlyn Hughes International Soccer
meta.desc:
Emlyn Hughes International Soccer offers realistic arcade action and football management combined into one game. The wide range of facilities and control options have between designed in such a way that you can sit down and play without hours spent studying the manual, and getting to grips with the controls.
One or two can play, whether against each other, or against the computer. You can even watch two computer teams playing each other! Player skill levels and fitness levels vary, so picking the right team is just as important as the way you control your players during the game.
Fixture lists, results, and league tables may be displayed at any time during the season, and if you have a Commodore or compatible printer you can even print them out as a permanent record.

meta.name: Enchanted Land
meta.desc:
In “Enchanted Land” you become Kurgan; you have to negotiate 500 screens of arcade action on six levels with over 600 KB of graphics that scroll perfectly smooth at 50 Hz in ALL directions (also on the Atari ST). 
A task that is by no means easy. On your way to Traskor, the capital of Damiran, you will meet every warped creature evil Plogthor can possibly send at you — who will all want to prevent you from achieving your ultimate goal: Restoring the Heart of Lore. 
Thalion. Well... what's left to say?

meta.name: Exolon
meta.desc:
Durante días y días tu viaje ha comenzado, desesperas de poder aterrizar tu nave espacial cuando, de repente, ves el final del viaje... El comité de bienvenida está en la cita. Tienes dos armas: la pistola o las granadas, estas últimas tienen la ventaja de atravesar también los muros gruesos o las paredes rocosas... Sin embargo, si los enemigos resultan ser numerosos, poderosos e indestructibles, no dudes en utilizar tu armadura hiperblindada: el exoesqueleto te protege mejor y te permite volar.
Exolon presenta unos gráficos compuestos por muchas pantallas de colores con una animación bastante buena. La progresión es lineal y puedes llenarte de energía y granadas por el camino.

p: F-15 Strike Eagle 2 (1991)(MicroProse)(Disk 1 of 2)[cr Superior][f Elite][b].st
n: F-15 Strike Eagle 2 (1991)(MicroProse)(Disk 1 of 2)[cr Superior][f Elite][b]

meta.name: F-15 Strike Eagle II
meta.desc:
La segunda parte de la serie incluye campañas en Libia, el Golfo Pérsico, Oriente Próximo y Vietnam: un total de 250.000 millas de acción y peligro potenciales. En cada uno de estos terrenos, deberás destruir objetivos aéreos, así como objetivos terrestres primarios y secundarios. Vas armado con un cañón, un misil aire-aire de largo alcance AMRAAM, un misil aire-aire de corto alcance Sidewinder y un misil aire-tierra Maverick.
Hay 11 ángulos de cámara, incluidas vistas internas y externas del avión. Para ayudar a los nuevos jugadores, hay un modo de entrenamiento, con opciones para desactivar los choques y automatizar el despegue y el aterrizaje. La IA enemiga es reactiva, pero la puntería asistida te ayuda a eliminarlos.

meta.name: F-15 Strike Eagle II
meta.desc:
La segunda parte de la serie incluye campañas en Libia, el Golfo Pérsico, Oriente Próximo y Vietnam: un total de 250.000 millas de acción y peligro potenciales. En cada uno de estos terrenos, deberás destruir objetivos aéreos, así como objetivos terrestres primarios y secundarios. Vas armado con un cañón, un misil aire-aire de largo alcance AMRAAM, un misil aire-aire de corto alcance Sidewinder y un misil aire-tierra Maverick.
Hay 11 ángulos de cámara, incluidas vistas internas y externas del avión. Para ayudar a los nuevos jugadores, hay un modo de entrenamiento, con opciones para desactivar los choques y automatizar el despegue y el aterrizaje. La IA enemiga es reactiva, pero la puntería asistida te ayuda a eliminarlos.

meta.name: F-16 Combat Pilot
meta.desc:
Ha amanecido. Te reúnes con los demás pilotos en el cuartel general para discutir los objetivos del día. Tácticas, maniobras de combate... todo un mundo minuciosamente recreado en F-16 COMBAT PILOT. Durante el briefing previo al vuelo, das tus instrucciones a los armeros y planeas tu ataque...
En el punto álgido de tu entrenamiento, dominas el arte de llevar a cabo las misiones que puede realizar el F-16, desde la interceptación aire-aire hasta las misiones de reconocimiento.
Pero ahora está a punto de estallar el conflicto que esperabas que nunca llegara a producirse. La fuerza aérea, el ejército y toda la infraestructura estratégica están amenazados...
Nunca te habías enfrentado a un peligro semejante.

meta.name: F-19 Stealth Fighter
meta.desc:
Rule the night! Take the pride of American Stealth technology and take on the best the Warsaw pact technology can offer! Dodge between radars, sneak under enemy fighters, and take out your primary objectives and secondary objectives with your limited weapons onboard, then make your way home. Can you survive all the way to general and win the Congressional Medal of Honor?
F-19 Stealth Fighter was based around Sid Meier's closest estimate of the stealth fighter based on the data available at the time. You get full 3D graphics, 3D enemies, random objectives and enemy dispositions (so each mission will be different), dynamic radar effectiveness that depends on your position and radar cross section, enemies that search you out if you do "tickle" their defenses, even civilian aircrafts in the air, and ability to play in cold war, moderate war, or all-out war, with very different rules of engagement.

meta.name: F29 Retaliator
meta.desc:
This flight simulator puts you in the cockpit of either the F-22 or the fictional F-29.
Choose from four campaigns with increasing difficulty: a training campaign in Arizona plus real war campaigns in the Pacific, the Middle East and in Europe.
Each campaign includes a variety of missions involving both dogfights and air-to-ground attacks.

meta.name: Face-Off
meta.desc:
The action in this ice hockey game is viewed from a side-scrolling perspective with a semi-3D effect. The puck loosely sticks to the player as he skates, and the netminders are CPU-controlled. Fights and penalties can be turned on or off, and the length of the match can be varied. 
As well as individual one or two player modes, a full managerial mode is included. This sees you take control of an international team and guide them through a full schedule of matches, including developing their skills and team-work.

p: Falcon Mission Disk Volume I v1.1 (1989)(Sphere Inc.)[!].stx
n: Falcon Mission Disk Volume I v1.1 (1989)(Sphere Inc.)[!]

meta.path: ./Falcon Mission Disk Volume I v1.1 (1989)(Sphere Inc.)[!].stx
meta.name: Falcon
meta.desc: The long Falcon simulation legacy of hardcore simulations of the F-16 fighter plane begins here. The plane's electronic displays and radars are simulated fully, with 4 styles of HUD. Not only can your plane barrel-roll and scissor, the enemy planes can too, with Artificial Intelligence recreating the moves of a real pilot. This was one of the earliest games to offer head-to-head play by linking two machines. It comes with a massive manual, detailing all those functions.
