meta.name: Lethal Weapon
meta.desc:
In this game, based on the movie series, you can play as Martin Riggs or Roger Murtaugh to complete four main missions, before taking on a final bonus one. For each mission you can choose the appropriate character. Walking around, jumping and swimming, kicking or shooting the opponents you have to stop the crimes in your beloved L.A.
Firstly, you have to stop drug dealers who want to transport their money from the dock, where you infiltrate. Secondly, you have to stop suicidal terrorists, who entered the subway. Thirdly, you have to defuse a bomb, planted by another terrorist group in the mall. Fourthly, you have to sneak into an office complex to free a hostage, Leo Getz. And finally, you have to find out and stop an ex-police sergeant, who is supplying armor-piercing bullets to local criminals.

meta.name: 007 - Licence To Kill
meta.desc: Licence to Kill es un juego multinivel y multirol donde encarnarás al mítico Agente 007: controlas helicópteros, barcos y camiones, realizas acrobacias mortales con paracaídas y te lanzas al mar para practicar esquí acuático. Acción desenfrenada que requiere puntería firme para superar los niveles con éxito y eliminar a todos los enemigos. Experimente la acción y las aventuras del agente más famoso del mundo, en la película más nueva y brillante hasta el momento: James Bond en LICENCIA PARA MATAR.

meta.name: Lords Of Chaos
meta.desc: 'Lords of Chaos' is a fantasy strategy game for one to four players. Each player takes control of a wizard and uses his magical abilities to fulfil his objectives. The main objective in each scenario is to survive until a portal appears and then escape through the portal to 'Limbo'. There are three scenarios provided with 'Lords of Chaos' which represent different worlds.

meta.name: Lotus Esprit Turbo Challenge
meta.desc:
The first in a series of 3 racing games endorsed by the legendary car company.
The game features a total of 32 racetracks from around the world, split into 3 difficulty levels. There are 19 computer opponents (15 on the 8-bit versions) and you have to finish in the top 10 (top 8 on the 8-bits) to progress. The higher you finish in one race, the lower down the grid you start for the next race.
The opposition drivers have pun names based on the F1 drivers of the day like Ricardo Pastry or Crashhard Banger. You can choose between sound effects or one of a variety of music pieces.
The game features a simultaneous 2-player mode, but the 1-player mode only uses half the screen, a simple animation filling the other half. In most races you will have to make a pitstop for fuel in order to reach the finish.
The tracks include features such as oil slicks, roadworks, boulders and rivers Contact with these (or the other cars) will slow you but there is no car damage model.

meta.name: Lotus III : The Ultimate Challenge
meta.desc:
Lotus III: The Ultimate Challenge presentaba 2 modos de juego: en un modo compites contra 19 rivales (con nombres tan ingeniosos como Alain Phosphate y Crash-Hard Banger), y en el otro modo te enfrentas contra-reloj.
Hay 13 tipos diferentes de carreras, que van desde autopistas, carreras nocturnas o carreteras en obras, y algunas se basan en dar vueltas al circuito y otras son simplemente un trayecto del punto A al punto B. El juego tiene modo 2 jugadores en modo de pantalla dividida.
La gloria suprema del juego, sin embargo, fue el editor RECS, que te permitía crear tus propios pistas con posibilidades casi ilimitadas.

meta.name: Lotus Turbo Challenge 2
meta.desc: This sequel to Lotus Esprit Turbo Challenge is again a behind-the-car viewed racing game. It takes in eight distinct circuits, adding surface and weather effects such as desert and snow. Later in the game, you must race through two-way motorways with oncoming traffic, (incorporating civilian cars and trucks), and face tough levels aided by speed and time boost pick-ups. You are no longer racing directly against other cars or over laps; instead, racing is on time as you have limited time to reach each checkpoint. Reaching each of these extends your time, and any remaining time is turned into bonus points if you successfully complete the track. You have two cars at your disposal, which the game chooses automatically for each level, hence the loss of the word 'Esprit' from the title. The Lotus Esprit form the original is joined by a Lotus Elan convertible, which is slower but has better grip. You can play through the set of tracks either full-screen or in split-screen mode with another player. On Amiga and ST the game allows you to link two machines, each of which can have two human players. If one player successfully completes one of the 8 courses, all players can continue onto the next one.

meta.name: M1 Tank Platoon
meta.desc: A very encompassing game that allowed players to issue orders to Tanks, AA units, Aircraft, Artillery and Infantry in a campaign against Warsaw Pact units in Europe, while specifically controlling a platoon of 4 M1 tanks. The player could jump into the position of the driver, gunner or commander of any of the tanks to view the world from a 1st person perspective, or work from a tactical map to command all his forces. Characters in the M1 platoon actually increased in skill as they survived battles.

meta.name: Magic Boy
meta.desc:
Little Hewlett is top of his class at Sorcery School. One evening he stays behind to finish some work and accidently lets the Grand Wizards collection of crazy pets out of the basement. Can you help Hewlett get  them all back before his master returns in the morning?
Good luck, it's going to be a long night.

meta.name: Magic Fly
meta.desc:
Your enemy have designed a new fighter craft, the Moth. The only prototype is held in a network of caves within an asteroid, heavily protected by 30 different types of craft. As a pilot of the T2 'Magic Fly' craft, it is your job to find and destroy the Moth.
You fly through a set of tunnels presented in a mixture of vectors and solid 3D, with arrows guiding you as to which way to go. The ship's damage is split into ten areas, and the auto-repair feature can be set to prioritise these. Energy resources are limited, and must be allocated across different areas of the ship.
Accurate steering and shooting are not enough – puzzles protect the route, and these will take some pondering. You are armed with multiple weapons (types of lasers, mines, a rear-gunning-droid and various guiding missiles), each of which has its own use. You also have an on-board map and radar, as well as a turbo facility.

meta.name: Magic Lines
meta.desc:
In this puzzle game you should fill all empty vials with magical red substance resembling the blood. To do this you should move the tiles and combine the pipe system, manipulating the free cell of tiles mosaic like it is done in famous "Fifteen puzzle". Some tiles become immovable with the increase of level number. Some vials may change the direction of substance movement. Filling the vials will give increase your score. The time is running, and you should do your job quickly.
Three difficulty levels are available. Best scores will be written in Highscore table.

meta.name: Dizzy IV : Magicland Dizzy
meta.desc: Dizzy, the egg protagonist, is back in his fourth installment: Magicland Dizzy. The land has been corrupted by an evil wizard, and it's Dizzy's job to set everything right. To do this, he must walk, jump and flip through a large number of screens, pick up and use various items, and talk to people.

meta.name: Major Motion
meta.desc: In Major Motion, The Draconian League have taken over the roads and made them dangerous for ordinary road users. You are in control of a car, driving up a vertically scrolling road with occasional forks in it, making the game similar to. The car is mounted with guns, and so are many enemy cars, but cars can be rammed off the road as well as shot. Watch out for other enemy vehicles such as helicopters though; be sure to avoid their bullets. You can drive into the back of open lorries to gain upgraded weapons. Weapons are activated via keyboard presses, which makes the game more difficult than it would otherwise be. Sound and music sampled from suitably action-packed films aims to add to the atmosphere.

meta.name: Manhattan Dealers
meta.desc: You're Dirty Harry and you need to find and beat up dealers to get drugs and burn them outside the town, which will regain your energy. This is the Silmarils' first game. In 9 screens, you can fight with ninjas, amazons, punks and other thugs and low-lives, and you've only your hands and feets for that !

meta.name: Manhunter : New York
meta.desc: La Tierra ha sido invadida por la Alianza Orb y se ha introducido un régimen muy estricto para los humanos que quedan. La única vestimenta permitida es la túnica marrón de monje, hablar es un delito capital y a todos los humanos se les ha instalado un chip que registra todos sus movimientos. Para localizar a los criminales, los Orbs reclutan "cazadores de hombres", humanos con acceso a tecnología avanzada que han sido seleccionados para ser policías y cazarrecompensas. El jugador controla a uno de estos cazadores. Descubre una conspiración que se está gestando en las ruinas de Nueva York y un misterioso asesino en serie que anda suelto...

meta.name: Manhunter 2 : San Francisco
meta.desc:
Inmediatamente después del primer episodio, el jugador aterriza su nave robada en San Francisco tras intentar sin éxito localizar al enigmático asesino en serie Phil. Sin otra opción, el jugador asume la identidad de un Manhunter local y resuelve más crímenes en nombre de los Orbs alienígenas mientras busca a Phil y trabaja para la resistencia humana local.
Manhunter 2 presenta la misma decadencia urbana y el mismo régimen opresivo de invasores alienígenas que el juego original, esta vez utilizando las calles y lugares emblemáticos de la Bay Area. El puente Golden Gate, la torre Coit, la prisión de Alcatraz y la pirámide TransAmerica han sido transformados por los alienígenas. Nuevos rompecabezas, nuevos personajes y nuevas investigaciones esperan al jugador mientras sigue la pista de Phil a través de su serie de cadáveres estrangulados.

meta.name: Maniac Mansion
meta.desc:
La Mansión Edison siempre ha sido una vieja y espeluznante casa en las afueras de la ciudad. Hay rumores de experimentos extraños y criaturas extrañas que viven entre la familia Edison. Incluso se cuenta que un meteorito se estrelló cerca de la casa hace casi 20 años. Más recientemente, una chica llamada Sandy ha desaparecido del instituto local y su novio Dave jura que vio al Dr. Fred llevársela. Dave sabe que no puede hacerlo solo y que necesitará la ayuda de otros dos estudiantes si quiere tener alguna esperanza de infiltrarse en la mansión y salvar a Sandy.
nnLos jugadores comienzan eligiendo a dos estudiantes para acompañar a Dave a la mansión Edison, y luego pueden cambiar entre los dos personajes a voluntad. La mayoría de las acciones se realizan seleccionando verbos en la pantalla y aplicándolos a un objeto. Cada personaje conserva una personalidad distinta y puede tener una forma de resolver un problema diferente a la de sus compañeros.

meta.name: Manix
meta.desc: It's a world gone mad! Bombs drop from the sky, playing havoc with the natural order of fat Filbert's verdant land. Filbert's got to see to it that every square foot is set back to normal - that's a lot of work for our rotund hero. The trouble is, bombs keep on coming, spikes, acid ond ninja bolls keep interfering and there's not much time left to get the job done. Fear not Filbert! Throw the tin cans, pick up the potions, drink the tea and you may just manage to dear up the situation. And don't forget, if the going gets too tough you can enlist the help of a friend ond work os a team - just try not to gel in each other's way!

meta.name: Masterblazer
meta.desc:
Masterblazer es tanto un remake como una secuela del clásico juego de Lucasfilm Games Ballblazer
Ballblazer es un juego de deporte futurista llamado "Rotofolls". El campo de juego es un gran rectángulo hecho a partir de cuadrados. El objetivo del juego es introducir la pelota llamada "Plasmorb" dentro de la portería, la cual se mueve a lo largo de los bordes del terreno de juego. Las reglas son simples: "¡Tres minutos, dos jugadores, un vencedor!".
El juego es en primera persona con pantalla dividida y que puede ser jugado tanto con uno como con dos jugadores.
Adicionalmente al juego original Ballblazer, Masterblazer ofrece dos nuevas opciones de juego: Modo Torneo y Carrera Rotofoll

meta.name: Matrix Marauders
meta.desc: Matrix Marauders is a racing game set in the future. The player takes part in the ultimate racing championship and, well, races against other cars and tries to be the first at the goal. All cars are equipped with weapons which can be used to destroy the opposition. Other things to keep in mind are holes on the track which need to be jumped over and power ups which offer advantages when picked up, e.g. more speed. Permission to start at the next race is only given if the player finishes the race among the first three. Between races the car and its weapon system can be upgraded.

meta.name: Maupiti Island
meta.desc:
Maupiti Island is a nonlinear police investigation with graphics in 2D and is the sequel to Mortville Manor. 
Whilst famous detective Jerome Lange is at sea, a cyclone (Harry) approaches and obliges his ship to put in at Maupiti Island until the weather calms. Then, as if things were not bad enough already, a woman called Marie disappears from the island!  Lange gives up on his holiday to investigate, and discovers many hidden secrets lurking beneath the surface of Maupiti Island.

meta.name: Mayday Squad
meta.desc:
Mayday Squad Heroes is probably the most exciting and challenging hostage rescue game ever written. Split second decisions to direct your team in each situation build tension and excitement in this thrilling action-packed combat game. Outstanding graphics and addictive gameplay make this game a must for your collection.
- Squad Selection 
- Choice of weapons 
- Variable skill levels 
- Multiple play modes

meta.name: Mega Phoenix
meta.desc: Mega Phoenix trae el concepto del juego arcade anterior Phoenix a los años 90, hasta el punto de que Gaelco hizo más tarde una versión coin-op. El juego es un shoot 'em up de pantalla única en el que el jugador se mueve de izquierda a derecha mientras dispara a varias oleadas. Hay una función de escudo disponible, que dura un corto período de tiempo (después de lo cual debe recargarse para ser utilizada de nuevo) y que paraliza la nave mientras está activa.

meta.name: Mega Twins
meta.desc: El juego presenta a dos gemelos que intentan recuperar el control de su tierra, Alurea, tras el inesperado ataque de un monstruo que destruye todo a su paso. Los habitantes de Alurea han vivido en paz durante mil años y han olvidado cómo luchar. Los únicos supervivientes del país, los hijos gemelos del rey, deben enfrentarse al desafío y devolver a su reino su antigua gloria. Los dos gemelos, de unos 15 años en la época del juego, se aventuran en busca de una piedra legendaria conocida como el "Dragon Blue Eyes", de la que se dice que puede volver a poner todo en orden.

meta.name: Metal Mutant
meta.desc:
Metal Mutant is an action game, where you control the eponymous machine, sent to the planet Kronox to find and destroy the insane computer AROD 7. Each level is not side-scrolling fluidly, but is divided into separate screens; upon getting to the edge of one screen you move to the next one. 
The Metal Mutant has the ability to transform into 3 different forms: humanoid, dinosaur and tank. Each form has different capabilities. For instance, the humanoid form can jump and the tank can shoot missiles. You'll need to change form often depending on the situation, as most obstacles and enemies can be only beaten by a specific form. 
Throughout the game, apart from fighting enemies (and bosses), jumping, climbing and so on, you will find additional upgrades which will give you more abilities. You'll also encounter recharge station where you can regain health.

meta.name: Metro-Cross
meta.desc:
Un sencillo juego de desplazamiento lateral en el que encarnas a un patinador que debe superar una serie de obstáculos para llegar al final del nivel.
Puedes patinar hacia arriba o hacia abajo por la pantalla, o incluso saltar, para protegerte de las tuberías que encuentres por el camino. A medida que avanza el juego, los obstáculos son más frecuentes y más difíciles, pero la esencia sigue siendo la misma. La sincronización lo es todo en este juego.

meta.name: MicroProse Soccer
meta.desc:
TACKLE WORLD CLASS SOCCER
Go football crazy, football mad. MicroProse Soccer is fun and exciting to play, bringing you the chance to compete at world class level in the World Cup, International Challenge, or in the indoor league.
Ingeniously, the game features an overhead perspective of the pitch, making it easy to play. You can either challenge the computer or an opponent, choosing from 29 different teams.
The graphics and sound effects capture the atmosphere and action of a real match, and once you've kicked off, winning depends on your skill - players can perform a whole variety of movements, including overhead and banana kicks.
MicroProse Soccer has a unique action-replay facility so moments of glory can be seen again. Easy to play, but difficult to master, this simulation will keep you on the pitch day after day.

meta.name: Midnight Resistance
meta.desc: The Midnight Resistance fighters are up against the awesome powers of mad scientist King Crimson and his Crimson Corps. Crimson has kidnapped your scientist grandfather and five more of your relatives, and aims to put his advanced plans to evil use. Take control of a Resistance fighter in this scrolling shoot 'em up consisting of nine platform-based levels, each ending with a Boss to defeat. Your enemies appear on foot and in vehicles, and Crimson has also planted machine gun bays en route. Killed enemies release keys, which can be traded in at shop points for weapons. These weapons include machine guns and flamethrowers, for which ammunition must be bought - weapons are discarded when you have no suitable ammo. The control system is unusual - you can shoot in different directions and crawl along low ledges.

meta.name: Midwinter II : Flames Of Freedom
meta.desc: Segunda parte de Midwinter, aquí la historia continúa unos años después del final del primero, una vez concluido el invierno nuclear. Eres miembro de una organización conocida como COBRA que trabaja para liberar una serie de 40 islas tropicales del opresivo Imperio Sahariano, que controla el continente africano. Para ello deberás reclutar a diversos líderes de la resistencia, recurrir al asesinato sin contemplaciones o quizá sabotear instalaciones del mencionado imperio para granjearte el apoyo de la gente y que se unan a tu causa.

meta.name: Mighty Bomb Jack
meta.desc: Mighty Bomb Jack, la secuela del Bomb Jack original, aporta el desplazamiento lateral a la serie y lo acerca más a un juego de plataformas que al aspecto arcade/puzzle del primer juego. Una vez más, juegas como el superhéroe con capa hambriento de bombas. Recoge bombas para ganar puntos y evita que te golpeen los numerosos monstruos que surgen de las cajas y demás. El juego presenta ahora nuevos fondos, como nubes y bosques, además de los habituales fondos de esfinge y pirámide del título original.

p: Mine Sweeper - The Directors Cut (1994)(Top Notch).st
n: Mine Sweeper - The Directors Cut (1994)(Top Notch)

meta.name: Mine Sweeper : The Directors Cut
meta.desc:
The game works exactly like any other version of minesweeper.
Left Mousekey: Pressing the left mousekey will reveal a block. If there is a mine under this block then you are	dead. If there is no mine, a number will be revealed, this is how many mines are in the surrounding 8 squares. If there are no mines near then the square is blank and the 8 square around it are tested.
Right Mousekey: Pressing this key will either set down a flag or take on away if one is already present.
By revealing blocks and seeing how many mines are near, you should be able to work out where the mines are by a process of logical deduction. When you think you have found all of the mines, press the SPACEBAR.  If you are correct then you win.

meta.name: Monster Business
meta.desc:
Monster Business is influenced by vintage platformers such as Mr. Do and Dig Dug. Bob owns a zoo, but the creatures (monkeys, snakes and all the rest) have gone on the rampage and must be stopped.
Its levels contain ledges, ramps, and similar, and scroll vertically. Bob must aim his short range gun at them for long enough to cause them to explode, then release to send them up the screen, and ideally hit them again, to release as many bonus fruits as possible. This must all be done within a time limit – complete it before being told to hurry up and you get a time bonus.

meta.name: Moon Patrol
meta.desc: La luna está siendo atacada por una horda de alienígenas, y debes detenerlos en tu buggy armado. Conduce a lo largo de la superficie disparando a los alienígenas y evitando sus balas. La superficie no es plana; hay cráteres y rocas que evitar, y minas terrestres en la superficie. Los platillos voladores crean nuevos cráteres cuando se estrellan. Los 25 puntos de reinicio están codificados por letras.

meta.name: Moonwalker
meta.desc: Moonwalker is splitted in 4 levels. The first level has you walking around avoiding fans trying to find parts of a rabbit costume needed to disguise yourself from your fans. You then need to find the waiting motorbike to escape to level 2 - Michaelsville. Here you need to find orbs which transform your bike into the glittering Stratus car able to leap barriers. If you get far enough you escape via a jetski. Level 3 has you defending yourself in Club 30 against Mr Big's task force. And the final level has you in an arena fighting Mr Big's Storm Troopers and plasma cannon as Moonwalker himself - survive and save the children.

meta.name: Murder!
meta.desc: Después de personalizar a tu personaje, ingresas al juego donde todos son sospechosos. El asesinato ha ocurrido y quienquiera que lo haya hecho está bien camuflado dentro de la multitud del partido en la casa. Sin embargo, el momento es crucial, ya que tiene un tiempo limitado (2 horas más o menos) para resolver el misterio y realizar un arresto. Con las habilidades a su disposición, podrá tomar huellas dactilares de casi cualquier cosa, escribir en su cuaderno de detectives sobre conversaciones que le resulten intrigantes, y de forma lenta pero segura, delinear su sospechoso. ¡Ay, muchos amores, tramas, intrigas y todo lo que no entre otros personajes puede descubrirse en tus investigaciones, pero eso no debe nublar tu juicio sobre por qué estás aquí, para resolver el Asesinato!

meta.name: Murders In Venice
meta.desc:
Terrorists plotting against the city of Venice have set a five-hour deadline - as a private detective, it is your job to stop them in that time frame.
Motion in this mouse-controlled adventure is achieved by clicking on directional arrows, but pay attention to everything you see. You carry an organiser with which you take notes, make illustrations and store information. Your camera can be used to photograph suspicious clues and persons so you can show them to other suspects as evidence later. 
The game plays out in real time so timing and patience are everything, as there are points where you have to wait for certain characters to appear at a certain place at a certain time.

meta.name: Mystical
meta.desc: Acquiring the title of Supreme Magician, you should travel from the Marsh of Eternal Stench to the Garden of Eden, facing danger and humour, and trying to survive the deluge of monsters, thoroughly determined to stop you! In this vertical scrolling action you should avoid the contact with enemies and their attacks, or eliminate them. You may move on the screen in four directions, collect the items, drink potions and read the scrolls to acquire the certain magical powers. The powers such as firebolts or genie assistant varies as well as your enemies such as monks, doctors, and walking trees, and everything was made with a certain sense of humor. The best scores will be written in High Scores table.

meta.name: Narco Police
meta.desc:
n el siglo XXI, el mundo está prácticamente gobernado por los barones de la droga. Tu misión es equipar a tres equipos de policías de élite y posicionarlos en la frontera para guiarlos a través de la red de túneles del enemigo. Una vez dentro, debes destruir la fábrica con explosivos.
El equipo y las posiciones de inicio están predefinidos, pero puedes cambiar el equipo y elegir entre dos tipos de munición, tres tipos de misiles, explosivos, kits de primeros auxilios, transportes y armaduras.
El juego se desarrolla como un shooter estratégico en tercera persona. Controlas al comandante del equipo actual y puedes cambiar entre los tres. Además, hay terminales de computadora repartidos por todas partes, con los que puedes desactivar algunas de las instalaciones defensivas automáticas y las cámaras.

meta.name: Navy Seals
meta.desc:
Como muchos de los juegos de Ocean, este obtuvo la licencia de una película. Controlas una serie de combatientes de élite de EE. UU. con el objetivo de destruir misiles en poder de terroristas. Debes destruir los misiles colocando bombas junto a ellos y luego huyendo del lugar.
Por supuesto, conocerás a muchos más luchadores a lo largo del nivel y recogerás armas mejoradas a medida que avance el juego (ninguna de las cuales encaja con la película ni con la lógica de la vida real). La jugabilidad es principalmente de desplazamiento lateral, pero los niveles son más altos que la pantalla.

meta.name: Nebulus
meta.desc:
Nebulus (también conocido como Tower Toppler) parece un simple juego de plataformas, pero es todo un logro para la época de su primer lanzamiento (1987). La técnica de representación del juego es relativamente revolucionaria, ya que utiliza gráficos de "desplazamiento giratorio". Esto significa que la cámara permanece en el personaje mientras se mueve por la columna. 
El objetivo del juego es escalar torres en el tiempo dado para destruirlas. Por supuesto, una serie de enemigos y trampas bloquearán el camino del personaje. Prepárate para encontrar una dificultad bastante alta en el primer nivel. Cuando el personaje es golpeado, no muere pero baja un piso. Sólo muere si cae al agua.

meta.name: Nécromancien, Le
meta.desc: As the mercenary Kothar, You must find your friend, Balthar the Red, who has gotten himself into trouble. You travel to the town of Stragla to aid him, only to learn that the place is being terrorized by a necromancer.

meta.name: The NewZealand Story
meta.desc: The goal of each level is to safely get Tiki through the level, avoiding enemy fire and spikes, and rescue one of his kiwi friends at the end. The weaponry starts out as arrows, but pickups can change these into bombs, lasers, or bouncing fireballs. These act a little differently and what is useful depends upon the player's location. A distinctive feature of this game is the ability to ride a variety of flying vehicles, including balloons, blimps, and UFOs. Vehicles can be found ready for use or can be stolen from an enemy.

meta.name: Night Shift
meta.desc:
Night Shift es un extraño juego de plataformas y puzles.
Una exitosa empresa de juguetes busca un empleado enérgico para manejar una máquina poco convencional. Te esperan generosas recompensas... ¡si aceptas el reto!
Domina a la BESTIA para producir figuras de acción de Star Wars, Indiana Jones y tus juegos favoritos de LucasArts. Tienes que alcanzar tu cuota cada noche para conseguir un aumento, y tu cuota irá en aumento. Tendrás que abrirte camino desde la cadena de montaje hasta la mansión de la colina, esquivando desagradables abogados y plagas peludas. Si fracasas, ¡te despedirán!
El juego se divide en 6 tipos de equipo diferentes, cada uno con sus propias misiones (suministrar energía, utilizar una llave inglesa para apretar tornillos, etc.).

meta.name: Ninja Mission
meta.desc: En Ninja Mission juegas como un maestro ninja. Tu misión, si la aceptas, será recuperar las siete estatuillas de jade de la aldea de Tambo Machi que fueron robadas por el bandido Akuma. Debes dirigirte a su fortaleza y subir los quince pisos para recoger las estatuillas y derrotar al terrible Akuma. También estás equipado con una daga y un shuriken que puedes arrojar a tus enemigos.

meta.name: The Ninja Warriors
meta.desc:
Two player side scrolling beat-em-up converted from the Taito coin-op that featured three monitor screens side by side. The Amiga version was developed in letterbox format in order to show as much of the wide screen background graphics as possible. 
The player(s) controlled robot Ninjas, which battled their way through the levels using Shuriken and knives. As the Ninja's took damage their classic Ninja garb was torn away to reveal robotic limbs, torso or head. When the damage reached critical the Ninja Robot would explode, scattering mechanical body parts.
As with The Sales Curve's later title SWIV, The Ninja Warriors used the company's Dynamic Loading System to load sprites, sound and background graphics from disk on the fly.

meta.name: No Second Prize
meta.desc:
There is indeed no second prize in this race between 6 of the world’s toughest riders. First prize is the one remaining model of the greatest motorbike the world has ever seen, incidentally.
The graphics are polygon based, with lots of roadside detail, and leaning into corners to maximise turn-in leads to the graphics to tilt appropriately. The control is mouse-based, allowing for slight adjustments to be made and ensuring that the controls are realistic but not impossible. As well as your five rivals, there are lots of Sunday riders on the roads, distinguished by having brown bikes, so make sure to avoid these.
This was one of the first games to feature video-style replays, allowing you to find the exact moment you want to replay, from any part of the race, and view it at normal speed, double-speed, or freeze-frame. The camera angles on offer here include one that follows the bike, one that views the track from the side, and a TV-style chase view.

meta.name: North & South
meta.desc:
Con los famosos héroes de comics de "LES TUNIQUES BLEUES" (Las Chaquetas Azules), creados por LAMBIL y diseñados por CAUVIN, revive con cierto realismo histórico y mucho humor la Guerra Civil americana.
Tu objetivo es destruir a todos los ejércitos enemigos y asegurar así la victoria de tu bando (Norte o Sur). Controlarás a tus ejércitos por todas las zonas de combate de la Guerra Civil. Puedes o no respetar la historia, eso depende de ti.

meta.name: Obliterator
meta.desc: Juegas como Drak, el último de los Obliterators (máquinas genéticamente mejoradas diseñadas para llevar a cabo misiones imposibles). Tu misión es salvar a la Federación de una nave espacial alienígena. Obliterator es un juego de acción y plataformas de estilo arcade. Las pantallas del juego son estáticas y a veces pueden parecer un laberinto, con muchos lugares en los que buscar. Armado con una variedad de armas, debes abordar la nave espacial alienígena, desactivar sus armas, motores de plasma y escudos, y luego escapar.

meta.name: Onslaught
meta.desc:
As a highly respected warrior, you are attempting to conquer as many regions as possible. This is a three-stage task, as first you must fight through hordes of fighters simply to reach the castle, and then you have to climb the various sections of the castle, before battling with its existing inhabitant.
The bulk of the game is side-scrolling platform hack 'n' slash action, with mines to avoid on the route. You can collect a number of spells, and select them using the function keys. Your physical and mental energy are measured separately throughout the game, and must both be kept high.

meta.name: James Bond - The Stealth Affair
meta.desc:
Operation Stealth, también conocido como James Bond 007: The Stealth Affair en los Estados Unidos, es un juego de aventuras de Delphine Software International, lanzado en 1990. El juego es principalmente el trabajo de Paul Cuisset (programación) y Jean Baudlot (sonido). 
El juego fue lanzado con la licencia de Bond en los Estados Unidos, aunque esto provocó algunas inconsistencias ya que el agente del MI6 parecía estar recibiendo sus órdenes de la CIA.

meta.name: Operation Thunderbolt
meta.desc: ROY ADAMS IS BACK! The Hi-jack report came from a DC10 leaving Paris for Boston - Arab Guerillas were in control of flight 102 and had turned the aircraft towards Africa ... The plane lands in hostile territory and the terrorists begin their demands A rescue operation is called for and there is only one man to head it up, Roy Adams. Weary from his Operation Wolf mission, he is persuaded to put his crack team into a new sortie to free the hostages. Bringing you enhanced shoot-em-up action for one or two players, Thunderbolt not only reproduces the horizontally-scrolling gameplay of Wolf but brings 3D action to the scenario, pitting you against swooping jets, helicopters, tanks and many more awesome adversaries! Get the laser sight, or the bulletproof vest, but watch out for those air-to-ground missiles! GOOD LUCK IN YOUR MISSION.

meta.name: Operation Wolf
meta.desc:
Has sido reclutado para la "Operation Wolf", un intento desesperado de rescatar prisioneros del enemigo. A lo largo de una serie de misiones, te enfrentarás a una gran variedad de enemigos, desde soldados a ninjas, pasando por coches patrulla y helicópteros, entre otros.
Operation Wolf es una conversión del juego arcade de Taito. Se trata esencialmente de un "rail shooter", en el que disparas a casi cualquier cosa que se mueva. Disparas munición, granadas y objetos curativos para "recogerlos". Tu ametralladora principal puede matar cualquier cosa si le das lo suficientemente fuerte, pero también puedes usar el lanzagranadas para objetivos realmente mortíferos como helicópteros o vehículos blindados. Como extra, puedes recoger una ametralladora superpotente que te permitirá disparar más rápido durante unos segundos.

meta.name: Manhattan Dealers
meta.desc: You're Dirty Harry and you need to find and beat up dealers to get drugs and burn them outside the town, which will regain your energy. This is the Silmarils' first game. In 9 screens, you can fight with ninjas, amazons, punks and other thugs and low-lives, and you've only your hands and feets for that !

meta.name: Oriental Games
meta.desc:
The Oriental Games offer skilled martial artists the chance to prove themselves in Kung Fu, Kendo and the relatively brutal Kyo-Kus-Hin-Kai., using “courage, skill and flare” (sic) according to the packaging. It makes for a series of one-on-one fights viewed from the side.
Kendo involves using a stick as your weapon, whereas Kung Fu various punches and kicks and Kyo-Kus-Hin-Kai involves head butts and flying attacks. You can jump over opponents; a quick tap of the fire button turns you around. You have an energy bar with 5 blocks of gradually decreasing colours, which drops when you are hit and increases as you pass time without being hit. Impressive moves earn you bonus Merit Awards.
On the 16-bit versions, there are 3 skill levels (Novice, Professional and Master), digitised sound, and an editor to set up joystick moves. The 8-bit versions lack these niceties, but include an extra discipline, Sumo; these are played in sequence rather than by choice.

meta.name: Out Run
meta.desc:
Race across varied terrain in this conversion of one of the most famous arcade racing games. Your Ferrari is at the ready, complete with female passenger, over a series of short tracks.
Gameplay is viewed form just above and behind the car, so you can see it. The roads are full of sharp bends and hazards, contact with which can cause the car to roll and lose you time. On each section of track there is a fork in the road, allowing you to choose which direction you go in. You have to complete 5 track sections in total, out of the 15 in the game.

meta.name: Outlands
meta.desc:
Outlands is a rather straightforward vertical shoot 'em up. It does not feature any elaborated background story. The basic statement in the manual just claims: "Kill everything".
The game can be played with two players simultaneously. Several extra weapons can be gathered on shooting enemy ships: shields, extra lives, double fire which double your shooting power, weapons that fire to the side and many more.

meta.name: Outzone
meta.desc:
Outzone es un juego arcade/de estrategia que comprende 28 misiones de dificultad creciente.
¡A bordo de su nave espacial, unos turistas intergalácticos se han perdido en la Zona Prohibida fuera de los mapas estelares! Tu tarea es liderar una unidad de seguridad altamente capacitada, equipada con lo último en tecnología espacial para hacer frente a las condiciones más hostiles del espacio, rescatar las naves extraviadas y guíalas de regreso a las zonas seguras. Sin embargo, prepárate para los males que encontrarás en tu camino, no será nada fácil cumplir con éxito la misión.

meta.name: Overlander
meta.desc:
Overlander sees Elite attempt a Roadblasters style driving game with shooting overtones, with the action viewed from behind your armour-plated well-armed car. It all takes place in a post-apocalyptic universe in which a lot of money can be earned by transporting goods form place to place, but the large gangs of Overlanders who already do this are keen to stop you.
Two missions are on offer at a time, one tougher but more lucrative than the other, with half the money paid upfront and the other half on successful completion. Before setting off, you can buy upgrades such as turbo chargers, armour and enhanced weapons, each of which has a limited lifespan. Attacks from other vehicles can come either from guns or attempting ramming, and the roads are poorly-maintained and hazardous, so be careful, or better yet be violent first.

meta.name: Pac-Land
meta.desc:
Pac-Land es un plataformas lateral para 1 o 2 jugadores con un rollo muy de dibujos animados. Ahora con brazos, cara y piernas, Pac-Man tiene que acompañar a un hada hasta su casa en Fairy Land. La cosa no será nada fácil porque Inky, Blinky, Pinky, Clyde y Sue le irán a la yugular por todo Pac-Land. Cuando por fin la deja en casa, la hada le regala unas botas mágicas que le ayudan a volver a la suya, donde le esperan Ms. Pac-Man, Baby Pac-Man, Chomp Chomp y Sourpuss.
Hay 16 rondas (cuatro viajes por trayecto). En cada una puedes pillar una pastilla de poder para que los fantasmas se pongan azules y zamparte a los fantasmas por puntos, además de frutas que van apareciendo (cerezas, fresas…) para sumar más. En algunas pantallas hay que usar un trampolín para saltar lagos. Y atención: llega al final antes de que se acabe el tiempo, que si no un fantasma te perseguirá como loco.

meta.name: Pandora
meta.desc: The generation ship Pandora has been set to infect the Earth with a nasty spore of deadly flowers. You have to stop this ship with the help of all the people on board that are still alive. The only person that can stop the ship is you. When you arrive, you have to get ID from the entry officer, or else you get frazzled by a roof lazer. The time limit to destroy this ship before it begins infesting the Earth with spores is 999 seconds.

meta.name: Pang
meta.desc: El jugador controla a un personaje confinado en un tablero del tamaño de una pantalla en el que rebotan bolas gigantes que amenazan al personaje. El personaje sólo puede moverse a izquierda y derecha y lanzar garfios hacia arriba en ángulo recto para reventar las bolas. Cuando se golpea una bola grande, ésta se divide en otras dos de tamaño intermedio, que a su vez se dividen en dos bolas más pequeñas, que pueden destruirse definitivamente. Cuanto más pequeña sea la bola, menor será el rebote y más ajustada la sincronización para pasar por debajo de la bola. El objetivo del juego es destruir las bolas antes de que se agote el tiempo sin ser golpeado.

meta.name: Panza Kick Boxing
meta.desc:
Endorsed by André Panza, this game brings Thai kick boxing to the PC, and gives you nice graphics and smooth animations along with over 35 moves.
Use the training gym to build up your character's abilities until you feel ready to take on an opponent. You also have the ability to customize your attacks.
When you are ready, go to the ring to take on various opponents as you try to become the best kick boxer in the game. Punch, kick, block... can you survive the fight and emerge as the winner?

meta.name: Paradroid 90
meta.desc:
Paradroid 90 is a remake of Paradroid (released in 1985 for the Commodore 64) for the 16bit platforms Amiga and Atari ST.
A fleet of space freighters carry a cargo of battle and security robots to help in the defence of Basmyth. Alien ships were bombarding the freighters with disorienting beams which drove the robots crazy. The crew was wiped out, leaving the ships open for occupation by alien forces. At this point the players mission starts.
You control a cybernetic influence device (ID) which has been teleported aboard the first freighter to eliminate all the droids and robots. 2 ways are possible to clean the ship decks representing the action part and the more strategy part of the game: Shooting (action) to destroy the robots or connecting itself into an other robot's brain (strategy) and take temporarily control of it.
It's possible to play the game as a simple shoot-em-up game, but the main fun of Paradroid 90 is the transfer game to take control of other droids.

meta.name: Passing Shot
meta.desc: This is a conversion of the SEGA coin-op game of the same name, playing lawn tennis around the world. The player travels from France, to Australia, to the US and end up in England and get to listen to the national anthem of each country. There are four difficulty levels to select the skill of the computer controlled player. One or two players may play but always against the computer. In a two player game, both players play as a doubles team. The game starts off looking behind the player as the style of serve is chosen (top spin, curve, etc) and then it switches to a top down view for the rally.

meta.name: Pegasus
meta.desc:
An evil demon called Satan has spread chaos in the world, and someone has to stop him. This is where you come in. Playing as the hero Perseus, you have to go to 5 different worlds, each with its own theme, and kill Satan's guardians (end of level bosses). A friendly wizard has also given you a magical flying horse called Pegasus to help you in your quest.
Each world has 10 levels with half of them played flying on Pegasus back (like a Shoot'em up), and the other half walking without your magical horse (like a platformer). But you can rely on your mighty sword.
You can buy weapon upgrades and other bonuses, if you collect enough diamonds. They are spread out all over the levels, and fallen enemies drop them sometimes as well. If your health drops too low, you can also heal yourself by spending some diamonds. After every world, you get a password, letting you continue from the same place the next time you play. That's fortunate, because this game takes a long time to complete.

meta.name: Personal Nightmare
meta.desc:
Algo muy extraño está ocurriendo. Es como vivir tu peor pesadilla y no poder despertar.
¿Por qué Jimmy Blandford ha empezado a beber? ¿Es víctima de poderosas fuerzas oscuras?
¿Por qué su padre, el fiel vicario local, ha abandonado su parroquia sin motivo aparente?
¿Por qué su madre le ha invitado a pasar el fin de semana y luego ha desaparecido sin decir palabra?
¿Qué horrores indescriptibles te aguardan tras las puertas cerradas de la vieja mansión incendiada?
¿Estás preparado para conocer a un vampiro y luchar contra un perro rabioso enviado directamente desde el infierno?
¿Preparado para sentir un terror inimaginable?

meta.name: Phantasie II
meta.desc:
Phantasie II is the sequel to the role-playing game Phantasie. Nothing has changed substantially: the gameplay and the graphics are identical to Phantasie. The adventuring party travels from town to town using a overview map of the countryside. There are many dungeons to explore and many different monsters to battle.
Again the Dark Lord Nikademus is the players' evil opponent, having fashioned an evil orb and cast a curse on the beautiful island of Ferronrah, enslaving its people. The players' mission is to find and destroy the evil orb.

p: Phantasie III - The Wrath of Nikademus (1987)(SSI).st
n: Phantasie III - The Wrath of Nikademus (1987)(SSI)

meta.name: Phantasie III : The Wrath of Nikademus
meta.desc: Phantasie III: The Wrath of Nikademus is the third chapter of the Phantasie trilogy. This time, the Dark Lord Nikademus has set his evil sights on conquering - not only an island - but the entire world. He must be stopped, and you've chosen to undertake this difficult and dangerous quest. The basic gameplay in this game is quite similar to the system implemented in part one and part two, with several additions and enhancements. Some weapons and spells have been added. During combat, you can move each character to the front, middle, or back of the party. It's also possible to aim your spells at different ranks of the enemy. Wounds are specified by body location and extent of injury.

meta.name: Pick'n Pile
meta.desc:
- A multitude of colored symbols are falling from the sky, and it's your job to make them disappear. That's the aim of this crazy game.
- Watch out for the devils!
- Work against the clock!
- Enjoy the excellent playability, superb graphics and sound effects in this hair-pulling, teeth-grinding, excitingly wonderful reflex game!
- Say adieu to your sanity ....

meta.name: Pink Panther
meta.desc:
The goal of the game is to help Pink Panther guide his sleepwalking employer through his house without waking him up. To help you in this, Panther can use various items, such as a little bell, which he can use to attract the sleeping man.
The game is a sidescrolling adventure and takes mostly place in the house of the employer. Pink Panther can himself move freely in the house, but at the same time, he needs to keep his eye on the sleepwalker, so that he can prevent him from stumbling on various objects, such as rugs and tables.
Before each level, you can purchase different kinds of objects from a store. These items can be used to gently lure the sleeping man into the right path.

meta.name: Plan 9 From Outer Space
meta.desc: The movie; Plan 9.....the critics hated it. But, the producer of the film has noticed that it's been stolen by Bela Lugosi's double. Find him. Track him. For God's sake - just keep a straight head when you enter this part of the movie lot and town. Some of the most misguided people roam here! Most important.....get the film back!

meta.name: Platoon
meta.desc: The film Platoon featured a squad of 5 soldiers on their mission for the US Army in Vietnam. In this action game based around the film, you take control of these five guys in turn, with the chance to switch between them as they each take one of the 3 hits that would kill them. The game recreates each of the sections of the film, starting with a side-scrolling journey through the jungle, with paths to cross both horizontally and vertically, and the ability to jump or duck hazards. You will need to blow up a bridge and then locate a village, which contains a torch, a map and a trap-door. The enemy has booby-trapped the area and are launching airstrikes, so the danger is not all from enemy ground soldiers.

meta.name: Plutos
meta.desc:
Plutos is a vertically-scrolling shoot 'em up featuring a succession of waves, containing what's reputed to be the first simultaneous 2-player mode on the ST or Amiga. Many of the enemies you face are waves of laser fodder with movement patterns taking them around the screen, with gun turrets and firing enemies as well, to fight or avoid. You start with 4 lives, and get an extra one (and a 5000 point bonus) after every level.
In many similar shoot 'em ups, you have unlimited fuel but must pick up ammunition recharges or increased powerups. Plutos lacks weapon upgrades, but rather inventively forces you to refuel, by shooting at posts which contain fuel (there are also bays for 500 bonus points marked out). Each level finishes with an enemy with eyes shooting at you, and from level 3 there are teeth mounted in front which fire at you.

meta.name: Police Quest II : The Vengeance
meta.desc:
Little time has passed since the events of Police Quest, when Sonny climbed the ranks of the Lytton police department and became the key element in the arrest of Jesse Baines, the notorious Drug Lord. After the trial, Sonny's application to the Homicide division was accepted and proposed to Marie, who had her prostitution charges dropped and started a new life away from the streets. Life was good... until Baines escaped, taking advantage of a low-security prison and an inexperienced correctional officer. Sonny is now in danger from a vengeful Baines and is saddled with his new chain-smoker partner Keith. Sonny goes to the field again to capture Baines, but things are about to get awfully personal...
Using Sierra's new SCI engine, the graphics are more vibrant than in the first game, but gameplay remains basically the same, with the player ordering Sonny to move to a place in the scene (either using the directional keys or the new mouse interface) and a parser interface to interact with the gameworld. Game sequences are more varied, and include a shooting range, an underwater search or searching the inside of an escape vehicle. The driving sequences are gone, and the player can relax while reading the chatter between Sonny and Keith as they move from location to location. The approach to the game, however, is radically different. While the first (for a large part) is based on street police work, this sequel is oriented into forensics field work such as collecting evidences that link Baines into the happenings of the game.

meta.name: Populous
meta.desc:
Juegas con un dios, jugando contra otros dioses en un juego celestial de conquista. Para ganar, debes ayudar a tu pueblo elegido a conquistar el mundo y eliminar a los bichos que adoran a ese otro dios.
Cada dios comienza con un solo humano, arrojado al medio del desierto. A veces hay tierra habitable a la vista, a veces no. Para tener la oportunidad de ganar, debes cambiar el paisaje, creando un terreno plano para que tus seguidores puedan construir. Cuantos más seguidores tengas, más poderoso serás, así que cuídalos. Construye tan rápido como puedas, porque el otro dios está haciendo lo mismo.
Cuando tienes suficientes seguidores, puedes convertir al líder de tu gente en un héroe. Luego recorrerá la tierra que has construido, tomando literalmente la fuerza de la gente en sí mismo y avanzando hacia el enemigo. Cuando llegue allí, participará en una guerra santa contra el pueblo de tu enemigo. El arderá; Él matará. Y no se detendrá hasta que todos estén muertos.

p: Populous _ Populous - The promised Lands (1989)(Bullfrog)[m Delight].st
n: Populous _ Populous - The promised Lands (1989)(Bullfrog)[m Delight]

meta.name: ZZZ(notgame):#NONGAME
meta.desc:
Fish!
Guild Of Thieves, The
Corruption
meta.image: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Mercenary - Escape from Targ & The Second City (Europe) (Compilation - Premier Collection II).zip-image.jpg
meta.marquee: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Mercenary - Escape from Targ & The Second City (Europe) (Compilation - Premier Collection II).zip-marquee.png

meta.name: Powerdrome
meta.desc:
The Powerdrome racing series is now into its 24th year of high-speed high-octane action. Why race on flat 2D circuits when you can charge through a multi-textured half-pipe in small aircraft? Typhoon Racing have taken up the challenge, and entered you in their machine.
There are 6 different circuits, with hazards including chicanes, tunnels and crusher gates. Shading to the sections marks out whether a corner or dive is coming up. There are 5 computer opponents to race against in one player mode, while a data link cable allows 2-player games.
Each planet has its own atmosphere, and your machine's filters will need to be set to take account of this. Rain on some circuits necessitates a pitstop for a changeover. You are armed with afterburners, which can provide a speed use in open air but should not be overused. The Amiga version allows you to adjust the sensitivity of the controls - either way, joystick is easier to use but mouse is seen as ultimately being faster.

meta.name: PowerMonger
meta.desc:
Powermonger takes the basic design and concepts of Bullfrog's previous game Populous, and places it in a war context. The game cast the player as a dispossessed warlord plundering his way through 195 territories on the way to world conquest. Several other leaders have the same goal.
The gameworld is now made up of polygons, so the view can be rotated and moved with greater freedom than Populous. Trade, diplomacy, inventions, and scorched earth invasions all play a key role in how the player progressed through the game.  Two-player games via modem links are available on computer versions.

meta.name: Predator
meta.desc:
Predator es un plataformas lateral que usa imágenes y personajes de la película clásica de Arnie. No es fiel: tu unidad ya está muerta al empezar; luchas contra escorpiones, soldados enemigos y obstáculos antes de enfrentar varias veces al Predator.
Run-jump-shoot estándar, pero sin armas iniciales: recógelas sobre la marcha.

meta.name: A Prehistoric Tale
meta.desc:
A game written by Atari ST democrew The Lost Boys
The game is actually a spiced up version of the old 8-Bit classic "Dino Eggs" with a few extras

meta.name: Prince Of Persia
meta.desc: Prince of Persia es un juego de plataformas ambientado en Oriente Medio. El jugador controla al Príncipe de Persia, que puede andar, correr, agacharse, saltar, agarrarse y luchar con espadas. El objetivo es completar todos los niveles para liberar a la princesa en el tiempo límite de una hora. Cada nivel consiste en una mazmorra cada vez más grande con muchas trampas (precipicios, losas que ceden bajo los pies, pinchos que sobresalen del suelo).

meta.name: Pro Boxing Simulator
meta.desc: The game can be played either as a 2-player versus game or single-player against the computer. The objective of the 1 player game is to attempt to become the World Champion by defeating 6 opponents. The opponents become progressively more difficult to beat. The player can then continue to defend their title against difficult opponents. The game features a wide range of moves including fair moves (punches, jabs, uppercuts) and foul moves (kicks, knees, head butts, groin punches) as well as blocks and dodging moves. Foul moves can be made when the referee is not looking but lead to a loss of  Chance (or life) if seen. Indicators let the player know when the referee is likely to notice foul moves. Successful hits reduce the opponent's energy bar. When the energy bar reaches 0, the player is knocked out and the round ends. The player with the lowest energy at the end loses a Chance. As the game is played, members of the audience make comments which are shown on screen as speech bubbles.

meta.name: Prohibition
meta.desc: Prohibition es un shoot'em up ambientado en el Nueva York de 1930. La ciudad está invadida por gánsteres y la policía te ha contratado para librarte de ellos. El modo de juego es sencillo: te enfrentas a una hilera de edificios, aparece un gángster y tienes que dispararle antes de que se agote el temporizador en pantalla y te dispare él primero. Puedes esconderte hasta que el temporizador se reinicie, pero esto también es limitado. Al final de cada etapa hay una ronda de bonificación en la que tienes que disparar a los gángsters en una habitación, sin posibilidad de esconderse y con un temporizador más rápido. A medida que avanzas en cada etapa, el juego se vuelve más rápido y los enemigos más difíciles de encontrar y golpear. Por supuesto, tu objetivo es llegar al final del juego con la mayor puntuación posible.

meta.name: Projectyle
meta.desc:
Projectyle is a single or multiplayer (1 to 3 players) hockey-type sports game of the future. A total of 5 goal rooms, arranged in the shape of a cross, are connected with tunnels. The camera smoothly follows the puck/ball (the "projectyle") and scrolls to the adjacent rooms when entering one of the connecting tunnels.
Each player, human or computer-controlled, has a room by his own (their Defense zone.) A fourth room -- The Frantic Zone -- contains a goalmouth for each player, while the central room, where action begins, allows access to the 4 other rooms. The object of the game is for each player to protect their own goal while trying to bring the puck/ball into the other players' rooms to score a goal. Bonuses appear randomly in the rooms like freezing the other players for a few seconds, gaining extra stamina, or sealing exits.
The game supports up to 3 player simultaneous quick action single game play, and can support up to 8 players in leagues of varying lengths.

p: Prophecy I - The Viking Child (1990)(Wired)(Disk 1 of 3).stx
n: Prophecy I - The Viking Child (1990)(Wired)(Disk 1 of 3)

meta.name: Prophecy I : The Viking Child
meta.desc:
Un "cartoon side-scroller" en el que encarnas, como sugiere el título, a un niño vikingo, en su búsqueda para liberar a sus amigos y familiares, retenidos por el malvado dios Loki en los grandes salones del Valhalla.
Lucha a través de 16 niveles de escenarios variados, que incluyen castillos medievales y montañas. Los niveles están salpicados de tiendas donde podrás comprar pociones y otros objetos mágicos que te ayudarán a avanzar. Antes de enfrentarte al Señor Oscuro Loki, deberás derrotar a los 8 Aprendices Oscuros. En general, se trata de un excelente híbrido de plataformas y puzles que debería gustar a todos los fans del género, especialmente por la longitud de los niveles que tendrás que atravesar.

meta.name: Protector
meta.desc:
'It aint only the US Navy that has a top pilots training school..
Assigned to Fort Rucker, the US Army Helipcopter Training School based in the Nevada desert, your aim is to become the best chopper pilot this side of the Iron Curtain. A real Protector!
Your mission consists of a strategic battle of wits between yourself and either another pilot, or, a computer controlled by RPV (Remote Pilotless Vehicle).
Your mission objective is to collect all the supplies that are scattered around the desert landscape and return them to your cave base. When all the supply cases have been collected, the parts contained within build a bomb. Take this bomb and drop it on your opponents base.
Simple? Not quite.

meta.name: Purple Saturn Day
meta.desc: Cada cuatro años, atletas alienígenas de todos los planetas habitados de la galaxia se reúnen para competir en los juegos del "Purple Saturn Day". Cuatro pruebas interplanetarias esperan al jugador: pilotar una nave a través del tiempo y el espacio, correr alrededor de los anillos de Saturno, resolver un trepidante rompecabezas electrónico y completar una carrera de obstáculos futurista.

meta.name: Puzznic
meta.desc:
El reto en cada nivel de Puzznic consiste en maniobrar una selección de bloques hasta colocarlos en su posición para despejarlos todos, haciendo contacto con bloques del mismo estilo. Controlas una cruz direccional que puede mover un bloque a izquierda o derecha, haciendo que caiga si no hay ningún bloque debajo del espacio que ocuparía.
Resolver los niveles presenta una serie de complicaciones. Las plataformas móviles hacen que tengas que mover un bloque en un momento determinado, o en un orden concreto, para evitar que se bloqueen.

meta.name: Rampage
meta.desc:
George, Lizzy y Ralph eran estadounidenses normales, hasta que un experimento salió mal, convirtiéndolos en un gorila, un lagarto y un hombre lobo respectivamente. Después de esto, los tres planean ir destruyendo edificios, y hasta 3 jugadores pueden participar.
Romper los bordes de los edificios el tiempo suficiente los hará colapsar. La policía y el ejército te persiguen y te dispararán, así que intenta destruirlos. Necesitarás comer regularmente, con cosas como las plantas que se te ofrecen, para evitar volver a ser humano.

meta.name: Red Heat
meta.desc: Red Heat se basa en la película de Walter Hill del mismo nombre (Danko: Calor rojo en España), protagonizada por Arnold Schwarzenegger y James Belushi. Tomas el control del detective soviético Ivan Danko (interpretado por Schwarzenegger), quien viaja a Chicago en busca del temible narcotraficante georgiano Victor Rosta.

meta.name: Red Storm Rising
meta.desc:
La Unión Soviética, sometida a una fuerte presión tras la destrucción de una de sus mayores refinerías de petróleo, necesita asegurarse una nueva fuente de petróleo, y para ello necesita dejar fuera de juego a Occidente... lo que significa invadir Europa y luchar contra la OTAN hasta la paralización..... Y la única forma que tiene la OTAN de impedirlo es reforzar sus fuerzas con convoyes de Estados Unidos y otros países.
Usted está al mando de uno de los submarinos de ataque americanos. Debes controlar el océano contra la armada soviética a toda costa, o la batalla terrestre se pondrá fea. En parte simulador de submarinos, en parte campaña dinámica y en parte simulación de la Tercera Guerra Mundial, Red Storm Rising es una asombrosa visión de la guerra moderna.

meta.name: Outcast
meta.desc:
Running away from the Hive seems like a good idea - until they catch up with you. Outcasts are not well thought of by the collective Mind. To stay alive now you'll have to defend your few bases as best you can so that the larvae within can hatch and you can start your own Hive. Then you can take on the Mind on your own terms.
Right now, however, with the sky full of Swarmers, Seekers and Seigers the future does not look all that bright. Take up your flight and SURVIVE.

meta.name: Resolution 101
meta.desc:
When they locked you up they threw away the key. Now, with the passing of Resolution 101 you are offered the chance to regain your freedom. You must become a bounty hunter, earning your liberty by the assassination of the evil criminals who now threaten to overrun the city. You'll need total reflex, iron nerve, the courage of the true hunter - all too soon it becomes your personal battle to purge the city.
- Vector graphics and 3D sprites combined, for a totally realistic game scenario.
- Large map surface with a huge variety of landscape features.
- Responsive, intelligent enemies who'll try to outsmart your every move!
- Garage shops: Buy extra fittings and equipment for your vehicle, including faster engines, more powerful weapons, navigation systems, napalm mines, decoy flares and more
- Video-comms link: Actually see your victims sneer and grimace as you close in deadly combat.

meta.name: Return To Genesis
meta.desc:
Return to Genesis takes place in the Zephyr system where twelve scientists work on secret projects. Of course every bit of help is appreciated and so every scientist is cloned 50 times for a better productivity. Unfortunately the evil Mechanauts have invaded and the player has the mission to save the scientists and drive the Mechanauts off.
This game is a side-scrolling shooter in which the player's main task is to shoot everything in sight - except the scientists of course, which should be picked up. They also can be shot to win the level, but then the player misses out on extra weapons: every scientist (along with his/her clones) has his own piece of equipment which can be activated at any time as long as the scientist is on board. In contrast to many other games of the genre, contact with the environment does no harm but causes the ship to reverse the flying direction at full speed. All in all there are 50 levels with twelve scientists each.

meta.name: Rick Dangerous
meta.desc:
Rick, un intrépido aventurero, parte hacia el Amazonas en busca de la tribu Goolu. Por desgracia, su avión se estrella sobre la peligrosa selva amazónica. ¡Ayuda a Rick a salir de este lío! nnRick tendrá que progresar a través de varias localizaciones (cueva, pirámide egipcia, castillo medieval ocupado por nazis...) cuyas trampas deberá evitar. Los controles son sencillos: la dirección hacia arriba te permite saltar o trepar, la dirección hacia abajo te permite agacharte y la dirección diagonal hacia abajo te permite arrastrarte. Rick también cuenta con un pequeño arsenal de una pistola, bombas y un palo para aturdir a sus enemigos durante un breve periodo de tiempo.
El juego es efectivo pero muy difícil ("try and die"), tendrás que memorizar las trampas y repetir cada paso muchas veces para progresar.

meta.name: Rick Dangerous 2
meta.desc:
Es Londres en 1945. Rick Dangerous ha vuelto a casa después de frustrar los planes del ruin "Fat Man" de destruir la capital del Reino Unido. Pero Londres vuelve a estar amenazada. Una flota de platillos volantes aparece en el cielo de Londres. Decidido a llegar al fondo del asunto, Rick cambia su ropa de aventurero por la de un superhéroe y se dirige a Hyde Park, donde acaban de aterrizar los platillos.
nnEl viaje se desarrolla en Hyde Park, las cuevas de hielo, el bosque y las minas atómicas. Al igual que en el primer juego, se desbloquea un quinto nivel tras completar los cuatro niveles estándar.
nnRick puede subir escaleras y arrastrarse por espacios reducidos. Está equipado con una pistola láser y seis pequeñas bombas, pero también puede golpear.

meta.name: Rings Of Medusa
meta.desc: Rings of Medusa is a mixture of strategy, role-playing and business-simulation game. Located in a medieval setting, you take over the part of the son of the former king of this kingdom. Unfortunately an evil sorceress, called Medusa, has taken control of the country and is now dominating the people. Your task is to find five magical rings that will give you the power to overthrow the sorceress and claim back your heritage. In the beginning you'll try to earn money by doing trade between different towns or try your luck at bounty hunting or at treasure hunts. Once you've earned enough money to maintain a larger army, you'll send forth your men to search for the rings which are in the possession of large soldier of fortune armies rallying the lands. Sometimes you'll take part in small arcade sequences like sword fighting, sea fights or control your army on the battle field.

meta.name: Robocop
meta.desc:
El agente Alex Murphy fue asesinado en las calles de Detroit. La corporación OCP vio la oportunidad de vender un nuevo policía a la ciudad en crisis: tomaron los restos de Murphy, los blindaron en titanio, borraron su memoria y crearon a RoboCop. Ahora, limpia las calles y elimina a Clarence Boddicker, su asesino... aunque quizá no sea el verdadero jefe.
Basado en la película de 1987, controla a RoboCop en un side-scroller: golpea desarmados, dispara armados. Mueve izquierda/derecha/agáchate (sin saltar). Recoge armas de enemigos, power-ups para salud/energía. Tras niveles: identifica caras y bonus shooter en primera persona.

meta.name: Robozone
meta.desc: A nearby planet is emitting a dangerous level of pollution, so you must go in destroy the source. The game is split into three levels, all of which are shoot 'em up based but in different ways. The first level has multi-directional scrolling and a maze aspect. The second is an into the screen 3D section requiring fast reactions. Finally you come to a horizontally scrolling, time-limited side-viewed section as you close in on destroying the emitter.

meta.name: Rocket Ranger
meta.desc:
In the 1940s, the Nazis built a base on the moon and plan to use a mysterious substance called Lunarium to reduce people's intelligence. However, in the 21st Century time travel has been mastered, as have jet-propulsion backpacks, plus some cataclysmic weaponry and advanced code-breaking equipment. Thus, you are sent back in time to change the result of the war using this technology to find their five rocket factories and destroy the moon base.
The game fits the Cinemaware template closely, with a string of action sequences linked by cinematic animation sequences to set the scene. There's also a strategic element, as you move your spies around to gain information and avoid detection, and decide how much Lunarium to use at each stage of the game. Action sequences include hand-to-hand combat with a Nazi guard, and flying through the air shooting either hordes of enemy planes or the Zeppelin itself.

meta.name: Rockford
meta.desc:
Congratulations! You are just about to buy the most addictive piece of games software ever released. “ROCKFORD” is based on BOULDER DASH but it is not just another version of BOULDER DASH. ROCKFORD has been developed by ARCADIA SYSTEMS for their Coin-op Arcade cabinets. This version brings all that arcade action and quality into your Home!
There are four levels on each of five different worlds with four screens on each level. It all adds up to eighty totally different playing screens. Take up the challenge as you guide ROCKFORD through the puzzles and take on the role of cowboy, spaceman, doctor, chef and hunter.
We have also packed in digitized sound effects and music, as well as special animated sequences depicting your success, failure and demise. All this detail, and the fiendishness of the brand new puzzles, really does make ROCKFORD the ultimate challenge for your computer.

meta.name: Rod Land
meta.desc:
El juego consta de 40 niveles donde tienes que eliminar a todos los enemigos más una pantalla de jefe de fase. Los enemigos se matan agarrándolos con un palo y girándolos de lado a lado para infligir daño. Por cada oponente eliminado recibes una bonificación que usas para matar a otros enemigos con movimientos especiales.
El juego nos presenta la historia de dos hadas llamadas Tam y Rit, cuya misión es rescatar a su madre que ha sido capturada y llevada a un castillo.

meta.name: Rogue
meta.desc:
Rogue is a turn-based dungeon crawler in which the player controls an adventurer who must explore the dangerous Dungeon of Doom in order to retrieve the precious Amulet of Yendor and make it out alive. The player character starts on the upper-most level and slowly makes his way downwards. There are 26 different types of monsters. Monsters have different abilities and modes of attack.
The dungeon and the items in it are randomly generated each time the player begins a new game. Each dungeon level contains a grid of 3 by 3 rooms and dead ends. Levels get progressively more complex and maze-like, and monsters grow in strength the deeper the hero ventures into the dungeon. The player character can acquire better weapons and armor, gain experience points and level up. Should the protagonist perish in the dungeon, the player must restart the game anew.

meta.name: Rotor
meta.desc:
You control a battle tank (the Rotor) which hovers in a 2D-labyrinth. Gravity pulls heavily on the Rotor, making it fall towards the ground. Any contact with walls or enemies is deadly so your main task is to rotate your tank freely and accelerate via an afterburner, thus manoeuvring through the corridors. Imagine a mix of Asteroids and Lunar Lander to get an idea. Scattered throughout the 18 different fortresses are boxes. Shoot these open to find either
- Fuel: Refuel your tank which is drained by shooting and accelerating.
- Sun crystals: Collect all to finish the mission.
- Bombs. They will explode in random times. Avoid that by leaving the screen quickly or by picking the bomb up. This earns you major credits, but your ship drops much faster due to increased weight.
- Pearls. Collecting these advance the upgrade counter. Activate the current upgrade at any time will improve your specs. Boxes are emptied by carefully flying very close to them and activating a tractor field.

meta.name: The Running Man
meta.desc:
Eres un ex policía sospechoso de asesinar a varios civiles. Un día te escapas de la cárcel y te diriges al aeropuerto para huir. Por desgracia, vuelves a ser capturado, pero no por la policía. Esta vez tu captor es el responsable de la serie de televisión Running Man.
El programa es el pasatiempo más popular del futuro, y la gente apuesta enormes sumas de dinero sobre su resultado. Te persiguen asesinos profesionales, y tienes que correr y mantenerte con vida para ganar dinero. A lo largo de cuatro niveles, deberás luchar contra los cazadores y llegar hasta el final si quieres volver a ser libre.

meta.name: RVF Honda
meta.desc:
RVF Honda puts you on board a realistically modelled RC30 motorcycle running for world championship. Initially you race at Clubman level on fictional local tracks before moving on to the UK and then the World Championship if you're good enough.
Each racing class has 8 computer opponents, with the top 7 in each of the 8 championship races scoring points, and races can be set to 5, 10, 15 or 20 laps. The game's graphics features sprite-based bikes on top of a polygonal landscape, making for very fast-paced gameplay.
The tracks feature puddles to disrupt the bike's handling, and oil, which can cause crashes. It takes a while to get the bike back up and running again (more realistic than most bike games of the time, but frustrating because you suffer more from mistakes) and after a few crashes the bike's dashboard breaks down, making competitive riding much harder.
There is a 2-player null-modem link mode, which can support an ST race against an Amiga if you have the right cable.

p: Scooby Doo and Scrappy (1991)(HiTEC Software)[cr BBC][t].st
n: Scooby Doo and Scrappy (1991)(HiTEC Software)[cr BBC][t]

meta.name: Scooby-Doo And Scrappy-Doo
meta.desc: This licensed platform games sets you as Scrappy Doo, with the aim of trekking through four levels to rescue Scooby and Shaggy. As his name suggests, Scrappy is adept at using his fists to vanquish many of these foes. The layout of the castle and the route to it features lots of ladders, ledges and gaps to negotiate. Bonus lives (via Scooby Snacks), invincibility periods and extra points (burgers) are on offer throughout the game. Many of these are in precariously-placed areas that require precise timing and considerable risk to reach.

meta.name: Seconds Out
meta.desc:
Seconds Out lets you fight five boxers on your way to being world champion.
You see your own boxer in front of you, transparent, so you can see your opponent who you have to beat. Apart from the initial opponent, each one has a special move. You use the joystick, but unleashing head and body blows. You can win due to KO or points. Between the rounds, you play the trainer trying to make your boxer fit again; through joystick-waggling he releases smelling salts and a drink of water.

p: Secret of Monkey Island, The (1991)(LucasFilm Games)(fr)(Disk 1 of 4)[protected].stx
n: Secret of Monkey Island, The (1991)(LucasFilm Games)(fr)(Disk 1 of 4)[protected]

meta.path: ./Secret of Monkey Island, The (1991)(LucasFilm Games)(fr)(Disk 1 of 4)[protected].stx
meta.name: The Secret Of Monkey Island
meta.desc: En lo profundo del Caribe se encuentra la isla de Melee, gobernada por la hermosa gobernadora Elaine Marley. El cruel pirata LeChuck está profundamente enamorado de ella, ¡tan profundamente que se niega a aceptar su propia muerte! Como fantasma, vive con su tripulación alrededor de la misteriosa isla de los Monos. Eres Guybrush Threepwood, un joven que solo quiere convertirse en un verdadero pirata. En Scumm Bar te encuentras con tres piratas que te dicen cómo llegar a ese punto. ¿Podría Elaine Marley enamorarse de ella y enfrentar la ira del temible pirata fantasma LeChuck? ¡Aquí es cuando realmente comienza la aventura de Guybrush!
