meta.name: Sensible Soccer
meta.desc:
It's here; the best football game ever!
Take charge of your favourite club or national team from all over Europe in a whole host of different cup and league competitions.
With all the atmosphere of European Soccer at its highest level, you (and your friends - up to 64 players can compete in competitions!) can take a squad of 16 players on to cup glory.
There's no other football game quite like it!

meta.name: The Sentinel
meta.desc: The title is divided into several levels representing land reliefs. You go to the bottom and try to access a statue that drains energy. Be quick and precise so that your energy is not absorbed too.

p: Seven Gates of Jambala, The (19xx)(Thalion)(STE)(Disk 1 of 2).stx
n: Seven Gates of Jambala, The (19xx)(Thalion)(STE)(Disk 1 of 2)

meta.name: The Seven Gates Of Jambala
meta.desc: The Seven Gates of Jambala is a Jump & Run game. Business with people to come continues, really tough mystery to escape from Jambala. Beware of the mystery traps, the doors behind which the player know not what. Some items will guarded and the player must destroy the big boss in order to get it.

meta.name: Shufflepuck Cafe
meta.desc:
One puck, and only two competitors. One is the computer, and the other is, of course, you. You get a chance to match your skills at this Air Hockey style game, over 'Cantina Band' inspired music. Deflect the puck around the walled area using your bat, trying to knock it into your opponent's goal.
There are several competitors, from which some of them definitely cheat, so be prepared to be laughed at. However, you can cheat as well, as you can resize your stick to fill the whole table width, or add one in the middle, and see who breaks glass first. There are single plays or the tournament where you play opponents in order of difficulty. The winner is the one who reaches 15 glassbreaks first.

meta.name: Sidewinder
meta.desc:
This vertically scrolling shoot 'em up varies from the standard for this style of game, as it also features a degree of horizontal scrolling. The screen area moves across as you reach the edge of the screen and reveals a whole new range of enemies. These include lots of static turrets as well as cannon-fodder waves of enemies.
There are 6 levels and each level starts and ends with you travelling through a tunnel, and emerging on the other side faced with a new graphical setting, be it industrial, space or woodland. After clearing the last level the tunnel leads back to the first level, so there is no real ending to the game. There are no end bosses, instead each level ends with a more difficult part with a large ground structure and increased enemies and turrets. There are 3 difficulty levels to choose from, and a 2 player mode.

meta.name: Silent Service
meta.desc: Silent Service es una simulación de submarinos. Asumes el papel de un miembro de las fuerzas submarinas americanas y estás a cargo del contraataque contra Japón. Con diferentes niveles de realismo, y por tanto de dificultad, controla parámetros como la profundidad máxima, los torpedos, etc. El juego cuenta con un modo Campaña, además de los modos Entrenamiento y Misión Individual, que te permitirán ganar experiencia mientras te mantengas con vida.

meta.name: Silicon Dreams
meta.desc:
This interactive fiction game is a trilogy of the Level 9's adventures Snowball, Return to Eden, and Worm in Paradise. These had previously been released for some systems but not all.
Silicon Dreams can be played as 3 separate games, but to obtain the maximum number of points, you must complete them in order (carrying your score from one adventure to the next). Snowball has graphics for the first time, and the other 2 games have more graphics than before, and some longer text descriptions are added to all 3 games.
Snowball: As Kim Kimberley, your mission is to safeguard the colonization ship Snowball 9 and its passengers. When you are awakened prematurely from hibernation, you know something's wrong!
Return to Eden: Your objective is to get into the new city of Enoch, and stop the Eden robots from destroying Snowball 9.
Worm in Paradise: You have to find as much information about the city as possible, obtain money, and then become a member of the governing party of Eden.

p: Simpsons, The - Bart vs the Space Mutants (1991)(Ocean)[cr Elite].st
n: Simpsons, The - Bart vs the Space Mutants (1991)(Ocean)[cr Elite]

meta.path: ./Simpsons, The - Bart vs the Space Mutants (1991)(Ocean)[cr Elite].st
meta.name: The Simpsons : Bart Vs. the Space Mutants
meta.desc:
Bart Simpson (from the TV show The Simpsons) must stop the Space Mutants from invading Springfield.
On each of the 5 levels, Bart must collect (or get rid of) the ingredients that the Space Mutants are planning to use to build their machine such as purple objects or balloons. He also has to collect enough "proof" of the aliens existence so his family members will help him when he meets a boss. But the Space Mutants are "using" human bodies as disguise. Hopefully, Bart can  use his X-ray Specs.
The ways Bart can get rid of those objects sought by the Space Mutants are numerous. In the first stage, Bart must get rid of purple objects. He can dye them red, cover them, wash them, etc. Some even involve a little puzzle solving like playing a trick on Moe to make him get out of the bar.
Bart also has some coins that can be used in many ways throughout the game, like buying things, getting devices operating, etc. Those coins are essential to solve some puzzles in the game.

meta.boxback: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Simpsons, The - Bart vs the Space Mutants (1991)(Ocean)[cr Elite]-boxback.jpg

meta.name: Simulcra
meta.desc:
The Simulcra unit was thought to be the last best hope for peace. International disputes could be battled out in a simulated environment, in a world with no real guns or bombs. Unfortunately, the system malfunctioned and began generating real weapons and tanks to attack the outside world.
You are the man charged with putting a stop to all of this. In your ground-skimming SRV, remove the power lines that keep Simulcra functional. Shoot out each of the energy projectors which block your path to clear each of the 30 matrices.
The action is viewed from immediately behind you, showing a world of pathways and gaps which rotate as you move your craft, which can also reverse. You will have to fight off guns, planes and everything else the embattled system can throw at you. Destroying these releases pods which give extras such as improved weaponry and extra energy when collected. A full map of the area is provided.

p: Sinbad and the Throne of the Falcon (1988)(Cinemaware)(Disk 1 of 3).stx
n: Sinbad and the Throne of the Falcon (1988)(Cinemaware)(Disk 1 of 3)

meta.path: ./Sinbad and the Throne of the Falcon (1988)(Cinemaware)(Disk 1 of 3).stx
meta.name: Sinbad And The Throne Of The Falcon
meta.desc:
Take to the high seas as Sinbad the sailor. You have been asked for help by the Princess to defeat the Black Prince and his minions from hell. You will fight pirates and genies, find romance and heartbreak, comedy and tragedy.
Sinbad is a more action-oriented game than other adventure/strategy releases from Cinemaware. Featuring loads of arcade sequences and limited decision making.
meta.image: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Sinbad and the Throne of the Falcon (Europe).zip-image.jpg
meta.marquee: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Sinbad and the Throne of the Falcon (Europe).zip-marquee.png
meta.thumbnail: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Sinbad and the Throne of the Falcon (Europe).zip-thumb.jpg
meta.boxback: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Sinbad and the Throne of the Falcon (Europe).zip-boxback.jpg

meta.name: Skidz
meta.desc:
In Skidz, the player moves through 5 levels with the goal to collect and dispose of all litter lying around.  However, not all litter is in easy to reach positions and has to be collected with tricky jumps. The player builds up the speed by pressing a button or pulling the joystick in a direction. If high speed is reached, another press of the button results in a jump.
The protagonist has a health gauge which decreases when he rams against the environment or citizens (some of them actively try to hurt the protagonist), drives over broken bottles or misses a jump. Power ups include health refill, bonus time and coins which are used to buy useful equipment between levels.
Bonus points can be earned by performing stunts while jumping, but failing results in a crash. The player can choose between a skateboard or a bike. Additionally to the regular playing mode, there is also a race to participate in. It involves one opponent and various obstacles which need to be jumped over.

meta.name: Skrull
meta.desc:
The world of Light is vanishing... No more glimmer, no more warmth, not even the slightest spark. Only you, Skrull the Barbarian, the incredible bastard son of the unnatural love between the Sun Woman and the Shadow Man, can free the Light again. But the gloomy world of Darkness is full of dangers...
The game represents a Barbarian clone, where you should select the available icon to allow your protagonist seen in third-person side-scrolling view perform the action. Right and left mouse buttons clicks invoke direction actions. There are 7 icons to use: Stop, Move, Run, Jump, Use Sword, Up, Down. Several items may be collected in 3 inventory slots to be used later.
The environment is labyrinth of dark, damp, and dangerous caves with many obstacles such as gaps to be jumped over and many different enemies such as tarantulas, vampire bats, or dragons. The key to world of Light's salvation lies hidden somewhere here and should be found by you finally.

meta.name: Skweek
meta.desc:
Los Skweek vivieron en armonía durante siglos, un pueblo pacífico por naturaleza, hasta la llegada de Pitark. Arruinó su tierra de color rosa brillante quitándole el color, y sólo después de su muerte tuvieron la oportunidad de limpiarla. Tu trabajo consiste en viajar por los continentes y limpiar cada uno de ellos.
Skweek puede moverse en las cuatro direcciones y va armado con una simple pistola, cuyos disparos rebotan antes de alcanzar a los enemigos: los Schnoreuls (con los que el contacto es instantáneamente mortal). Algunas casillas contienen flechas que te obligan a tomar una dirección determinada, también hay bloques que debes evitar. Los bloques bomba hacen explotar los bloques de alrededor. Los bloques de acceso directo te permiten moverte a otro bloque de tipo teletransporte.

meta.name: Skyfox
meta.desc: Los alienígenas han invadido tu amada patria y debes ayudar a salvarla. Pilotas el Skyfox, el caza de ataque más avanzado disponible en la Federación. La vista del juego es desde la cabina. Skyfox dispone de escudos deflectores, cañones láser, cinco misiles guiados y cinco misiles buscadores de calor, así como de una velocidad máxima de Mach IV. Tendrás que luchar contra tanques, aviones enemigos y el camión cisterna. Utiliza el radar para localizar vehículos enemigos y el escáner de largo alcance para asegurarte de que ninguna oleada llega a tu base antes de que puedas salir. Vigila tus escudos y niveles de combustible, también puedes atracar en la base para repostar.

meta.name: Slap Fight
meta.desc:
En el año 2059 la Alien League Of Cosmic Nations (ALCON) te ha designado como el piloto que conducirá el Slap Fighter y derrotará a los alienígenas que ocuparon el planeta Orac. 
La característica principal del juego es su sistema de recogida. Recoges estrellas de los restos humeantes de los enemigos y luego eliges qué potenciador quieres: con una estrella obtienes un escudo, con dos estrellas eliges disparo, con tres estrellas obtienes disparo lateral, con cuatro mejoras las alas, con cinco dispara una bomba, con seis disparas láser, con siete consigues misiles guiados y con ocho mejoras el escudo. El misil guiado es probablemente el arma más poderosa.

meta.name: Snoopy : The Cool Computer Game
meta.desc: Linus ha perdido su sábana favorita. Su mundo se desmorona. Linus intenta esperar mientras Snoopy investiga para encontrar la preciada sábana.

meta.name: Snoball In Hell
meta.desc:
Snoball in Hell es una variante de romper ladrillos mezclada con un shoot'em up. El jugador controla el Snoball, un vehículo similar a un tanque que puede moverse arriba y abajo por el borde izquierdo de la pantalla. El objetivo de cada uno de los 16 niveles del juego es eliminar todos los ladrillos golpeándolos con una bola que rebota, pero aquí también hay muchos enemigos que corren hacia la Snoball. Tienes que dispararles o esquivarlos porque cualquier contacto supone la pérdida de una vida. Perder la pelota también supone la pérdida de una vida y el jugador dispone de cinco vidas en total.
Además de los enemigos, el jugador puede sacar bonificaciones que ayudan y antibonificaciones que entorpecen. Las bonificaciones incluyen puntos extra, velocidad de disparo ralentizada, rebote automático, escudos, vidas extra y salto de nivel, mientras que las antibonificaciones incluyen puntos negativos, velocidad de disparo ralentizada, ...

meta.name: Shadow Of The Beast
meta.desc:
Shadow of the Beast is a side-scrolling platformer best known for the use of parallax scrolling along lush graphics, a musical score by David Whittaker, a iconic cover by Roger Dean and what many consider to be unforgiving gameplay. The player has to navigate through several areas filled with enemies and traps, collecting keys and activating triggers than open new areas or give Aarbron the means to overcome a sub-boss.
The number of moves the player has at disposal is limited: duck, jump and only 2 attacks: punch and a flying kick. While most enemies die with just one hit, the player must time each attack accurately. However, there are also traps of objects that cannot be destroyed, and these require the player to jump, duck or move according the sequence. The player has only one life with 12 hit points that can be replenished by collecting some objects hidden in the level (like an off-route location or a under a megalith), which also contributes to the difficulty level.

meta.name: Space Ace
meta.desc:
Following the successful gameplay of Dragon's Lair, Don Bluth released this second conversion of his Laserdisc games series.
You're playing Dexter, a guy fighting the evil madman Borf who has kidnapped your girlfriend Kimberly and is now threatening the world with his dreaded weapon, the "Infanto Ray" which turns adults into small children.
The game plays like a comic strip - visuals are similar to many cartoon movies. In each scene you only have to decide which direction of the keyboard has to be hit in order to avoid one of the countless death screens and to advance to the next screen...

p: Space Quest - The Serien Encounter v1.1a (1986)(Sierra)[cr Ace].st
n: Space Quest - The Serien Encounter v1.1a (1986)(Sierra)[cr Ace]

meta.path: ./Space Quest - The Serien Encounter v1.1a (1986)(Sierra)[cr Ace].st
meta.name: Space Quest : The Sarien Encounter
meta.desc:
Roger Wilco is one of the most important men on the starship Arcada: he is the janitor! Just when he was doing what he does best (dozing off in a closet), the shrill sound of an alarm penetrated the air. Arcada is attacked by the evil Sariens! Before you realize what is going on, you discover that you are the only survivor. The Sariens have killed the entire crew and stolen the valuable Star Generator. Your immediate task will be to find a way to leave Arcada, that is about to explode in fifteen minutes. And then you'll have to show the Sariens why they should never mess with brave intergalactic janitors!
Space Quest: The Sarien Encounter is a humorous sci-fi adventure game, made with Sierra's AGI engine. You move Roger around with arrow keys and interact with the game world by typing commands. There's a lot of puzzles to solve, and plenty of situations where you'll have to use your wit to save Roger from death.

p: Space Quest II - Vohaul_s Revenge (1987)(Sierra)(Disk 1 of 3)[!].stx
n: Space Quest II - Vohaul_s Revenge (1987)(Sierra)(Disk 1 of 3)[!]

meta.name: Space Quest II : Chapter II - Vohaul's Revenge
meta.desc:
So you thought you'd seen the last of Sludge Vohaul? Think again! Like every evil scientist is supposed to, Vohaul returns with an even meaner scheme. This time he intends to infest the planet Xenon with thousands of genetically engineered door-to-door life insurance salesmen. The last thing he wants is you, ace-janitor Roger Wilco, messing things up and so you are captured and brought to the planet Labion to spend the rest of your days working in Vohaul's mines. Fortunately the shuttle that takes you to the mines crashes and you're the only survivor.
Can you survive the dangers of the jungle planet Labion?nnCan you stop the evil Sludge Vohaul?
Space Quest 2: Vohaul's Revenge is the second game in Sierra's humorous Space Quest series of adventure games. It's a classic adventure game with a text-parser: you move Roger Wilco around with arrow keys, and interact with the world by typing commands. As in every Space Quest game, there are lots of ways to die.

meta.name: Space Racer
meta.desc: Space Racer es un juego de carreras de acción con temática de ciencia ficción. El jugador controla una aeromoto futurista y compite contra vehículos similares controlados por la CPU. Las carreras tienen lugar en entornos con temática del espacio exterior, que se asemejan a superficies de planetas alienígenas. El jugador debe intentar evitar colisiones con las otras bicicletas para llegar primero a la meta; una forma más violenta de resolver el mismo problema implica disparar a los oponentes. La altitud de la hoverbike depende de su velocidad: cuanto más rápido va, más lejos del suelo está y viceversa.

meta.name: Driller
meta.desc:
El planeta Evath tiene dos lunas, Mitral y Triscupid. Mitral ha sido brutalmente explotada por unos forajidos, los Ketar, que han huido de la luna. En el subsuelo de Mitral se han formado grandes bolsas de gas, y si Mitral explota, miles de evathianos serán aniquilados al salir Evath de su órbita y la congelación acabará con toda la población del planeta. Los científicos han descubierto que un meteorito se aproxima y chocará contra Mitral en pocas horas, una auténtica catástrofe.
Tu misión es asegurar cada uno de los 18 sectores de Mitral colocando un equipo de perforación sobre las bolsas de gas que existen en cada sector antes de que el meteorito impacte contra el planeta.

meta.name: Speedball
meta.desc:
The original future sport game, Speedball is played out on a small court with five players on each team, making it more frantic than the more famous sequel. The ball must be thrown into the goal at your opponent's end. Any amount of physical contact can be made, and there are no illegal ways to get the ball or the goal.
Before each match you can bribe the referee into awarding you a head-start or strengthening the abilities of your players. You compete in a simple knockout cup tournament, or in individual 2-player games.

meta.name: Space Harrier
meta.desc: Run… fly… dodge those obstacles, but return fire on wave after wave of attacking aliens. Armed with a really big gun, you have to defend yourself against the alien hordes using your wits to navigate around the screen. But watch out for those end of level bosses!

meta.name: Spherical
meta.desc:
Solomon's Key is a clear conceptual influence for this action puzzler. Our hero must guide a ball through a level to the spot marked 'In', by creating and removing blocks to alter its path. The game is prevented from being a pure clone due to the ball, which moves automatically once activated, and can be controlled by using strategically-placed blocks.
Simply reaching the ball usually involves modifying the level layout using these bricks. There are enemies moving on fixed paths which must be avoided, and bonus items to collect. Also watch for bonuses such as invincibility, gravity-alteration and teleporting. You take time to rotate, so the controls aren't truly immediate. The ball takes 20 seconds to start moving, so use this time to plan ahead.

meta.name: Spindizzy Worlds
meta.desc: Spindizzy World: Un complicado y emocionante juego de acción. Supera intrincadas trampas y toneladas de enemigos mientras controlas a GERALD (Gyroscopic Exploration Landing Device). Cerca de 100 niveles, llenos de pendientes pronunciadas y saltos. ¡Completa todos los niveles y conquista todas las estrellas!

meta.name: Star Trap
meta.desc: Year is 2189, humanity has visited numerous galaxies due to the hyper-space engines. In search of adventure and exotics of the distant lands you have signed contract for 5 years with the Intergalactic Company to work on the Space Lines. For your first trip you were appointed as technician trainee on the freighter AMPELOS. The freighter left Achernar VI in direction of Tau Ceti II. Some hours later you were in the room of piloting when suddenly all alarms start... What is that? You have only 8 hours to discover it. You start to explore the freighter AMPELOS. Robots became uncontrollable and attack you. They are surely behind the commander's death. Happily, the computer can help you to deactivate them. But your adventure is only beginning and already the cap of the dead commander (peace to his soul) reveal a number, which you remembers quickly.

p: Star Trek - The Rebel Universe (1987)(Simon _ Shuster).st
n: Star Trek - The Rebel Universe (1987)(Simon _ Shuster)

meta.name: Star Trek : The Rebel Universe
meta.desc: Starfleet Command is attempting to contain a rapidly growing Federation mutiny in the Sagittarius Arm. Every Federation starship set to discover the nature of the problem has also mutinied and joined the Klingons. To avoid the mutiny spreading to the entire Federation, Starfleet plans to wrap the entire area in a Klein Sphere, sealing it off forever. In a last attempt to find out what is happening, Starfleet sends in the Enterprise before the Sphere is set up. Its five year mission is to attempt to discover what is causing the defections, and hopefully stop them. If you fail in your mission, the Sphere will be made permanent, if you succeed the Sphere will be dropped, avoiding a potential war with the Romulans. The game is basically a graphical adventure with some real-time combat and piloting. The game progresses by flying to planets, beaming down on them, and retrieving any items you find. There are several possible solutions to the game, with clues found along the way.

meta.name: Star Wars
meta.desc: Conversion of Atari Games' first-person shoot 'em up based around the original Star Wars film. You take on the role of Luke Skywalker, aiming to destroy the Death Star - which, as any fan knows, involves attacking the 'weak spot' near the exhaust. To even get to this you have to pass swarms of TIE Fighters. Complete the game and it loops back around at ever-increasing difficulty. The game uses vector graphics, which allow lots of action at high speed on comparatively slow systems.

p: Star Wars - Return of the Jedi (1987)(LucasFilm Ltd)(Disk 1 of 3).stx
n: Star Wars - Return of the Jedi (1987)(LucasFilm Ltd)(Disk 1 of 3)

meta.path: ./Star Wars - Return of the Jedi (1987)(LucasFilm Ltd)(Disk 1 of 3).stx
meta.name: Star Wars : Return of the Jedi
meta.desc: The arcade game from Atari based on the third Star Wars movie features three action sequences inspired by the film.

meta.name: Starblade
meta.desc:
StarBlade is an epic space-opera, set in the vastness of the Orion galazy, the year 3001.
The human race has been decimated to a series of small hi-tech colonies by the ruthless, insectile Cephalhydras.
To finally wipe out humanity, Cephalhydras geneticist have produced Genolyn, a hideously mutated Queen brood-mother, who will spawn a legion of super warriors...
Your mission, to board "StarBlade", the most technically advanced starcruiser in the galaxy and to find and eliminate Genolyn before she starts to breed...

meta.name: Starglider
meta.desc:
The Planet Novenia has been attacked by the Egrons, who snuck in by disguising their craft as the protected Starglider species, which Novenia's automated defenses were programmed not to shoot.
Your task is to fight them using only an obsolete Airborne Ground Attack Vehicle. This was designed as the ultimate combat machine. It has a fully-rechargeable shield, plasma drive unit, an inbuilt scanner, a high top speed and 2 homing missiles.
The game is viewed from AGAV's cockpit, with control over speed, weapon targeting and firing. There are several control options like fixed or floating sighting and automatic centering, allowing you to balance the game between easy sighting and advanced shooting ranges. Repair depots must be visited frequently for refilling the weapon bays and repairing the ship.
Crucially, the Egron Stargliders need 3 missiles to be shot down, so at least 1 visit to a depot is required to complete this job, at which point you move up to the next, harder, level.

meta.name: StarRay
meta.desc: StarRay es un shooter de desplazamiento lateral. El objetivo es defender tus colonias de varias oleadas de alienígenas atacantes. El juego presenta pantallas de desplazamiento por capas, y nuevos diseños de fondo y enemigos para cada uno de los 7 niveles.

meta.name: Stationfall
meta.desc:
Stationfall is a text adventure game and a sequel to Planetfall, featuring the same protagonist who has been promoted from Ensign Seventh Class to Lieutenant First Class. However, the current work in the Stellar Patrol seems to be less satisfying than before, as the Lieutenant has to deal with boring paperwork.
One day the Lieutenant receives an assignment that involves accompanying a spacetruck to a space station and picking up a load of "Request for Stellar Patrol Issue Regulation Black Form Binders Request Form Forms". The Lieutenant travels to the space station with his robotic side-kick Floyd. Once they arrive, they find it deserted, with only an ostrich and an Arcturian balloon creature left untouched. The 2 must investigate the station and find out what happened.

meta.name: Stone Age
meta.desc:
Stone Age is a challenging puzzle game where you are in control of a dinosaur and you have to make him reach the exit of each cave. The dinosaur can only walk on certain blocks on the level: some are just ordinary blocks, some are movable in the direction the arrow points, some crumble after you walk on them, and some have coloured keys which are needed to get past locks of the same colour.
The game has two difficulty modes, one giving you more time to complete the levels than the other, and every time you run out of time, you lose a life. The levels are coded so you don't lose your progress when you quit, although you'll lose any score gained.
The graphics are simple and cartoony, and the levels come in a variety of scenarios. The game also includes a Jukebox, which allows you to customize the played tracks much like a playlist editor.

meta.name: Street Fighter
meta.desc:
You are Ryu, a Street Fighter. Your goal is to travel to 5 countries (Japan, USA, England, China and Thailand) and beat 2 enemies at each of them. Many of these characters, such as Adon, Gen, and Birdie, are later seen in the Street Fighter Alpha series.
After each country you will have the chance to get additional points in a little bonus round, a feature seen later in most Street Fighter games. 
The final boss in the game is Sagat, who is the second to the last boss in Street Fighter 2. The goal is to become the greatest fighter in the world. As with most tournament fighting games once you have defeated the boss the game will reset and start from the beginning with a harder difficulty level. 
It is possible to start a two player game but there will be only one fight (between the two players) which will determine who will travel the globe to fight the computer controlled opponents.

meta.name: Strider
meta.desc:
Juegas como Hiryu, miembro de la hermandad de los Striders, una especie de orden caballeresca moderna, que lucha contra el siniestro "Grand Master Meio", que desea conquistar el mundo. Diezmada su hermandad, usted es uno de los únicos Striders que siguen vivos para buscar venganza. El juego adopta la forma de un juego de plataformas. Armado con tu sable láser (Cypher), tendrás que eliminar a numerosos enemigos en varios niveles que van desde la Unión Soviética hasta la selva tropical.  También puedes colgarte de las paredes con un gancho metálico.
Ocasionalmente, las bonificaciones obtenidas al destruir cápsulas te permitirán aumentar el alcance de tu espada o ir acompañado de un pequeño robot que destruirá a tus enemigos. Apreciamos los espectaculares movimientos del personaje desenvainando su arma o girando en el aire mientras salta.

meta.name: Stryx
meta.desc: You star as half-robot operative Stryx. Dome City is under attack by KILLER CYBORG ASSASSINS! You navigate Stryx through numerous levels on foot, hovercrafts and some weird round eyeball-type flying craft. It's basic side scrolling action/arcade whackiness. This game was released for IBM PC, Amiga and Atari ST systems.

meta.name: Stormtrooper
meta.desc:
In Stormtrooper, the player takes the role of a soldier who has to kill a mad scientist. This is a traditional, horizontally scrolling action game in which the player controls the protagonist while shooting at everything which gets in his way.
In addition to shooting enemies, there are also ladders to climb, gate controls to destroy and sometimes platforms to jump. At the bottom of the screen there is a radar which tells when a fast droid is on its way which has to be jumped over.

meta.name: Stunt Car Racer
meta.desc: Stunt Car Racer se distingue de otros juegos del género por ofrecer carreras basadas en acrobacias. La competición se desarrolla en pistas estrechas y elevadas, que a veces alcanzan alturas de varias decenas de metros, sin barreras de protección que impidan las salidas de pista. Las pistas presentan grandes cambios de elevación, abismos, curvas, desniveles, badenes y partes móviles. El jugador controla un vehículo híbrido, a medio camino entre un buggy y un dragster, equipado con una cantidad limitada de turbo de nitrógeno.

meta.name: Sub Battle Simulator
meta.desc:
Sub Battle Simulator is set in World War 2, with the player on the American or German side. Six different submarines are simulated in a total of 60 missions. You will have to navigate, using five different levels of mapping, and plan attacks based on weather and surroundings, paying close attention to the radar. Watch out for torpedoes and Sonars.
This was the first submarine simulation to include aircraft as opponents. You can choose to remain on the surface and defend yourself with your guns, or dive and hope to avoid the bomb and/or strafing that'll surely follow.

meta.name: Summer Olympiad
meta.desc: 5 events are on offer in this Olympics-style sports game. These can be played individually or as part of a complete tournament, with the chance to choose your nationality first. The events are Hurdles, Triple Jump, Skeet Shooting, Diving and Fencing.nnnnEach event's control system involves rotating the joystick and pressing fire at the correct moments. The Fencing is viewed isometrically, and the skeet shooting from a 3D view positioned behind the competitor, which typify the unusual approaches taken to the events rather than filling the game with 10 or more generic by-the-numbers offerings.

meta.name: Super Cars
meta.desc: This is a top-view racing game, stylistically influenced by Super Sprint, from the company who later produced the Lotus series of games.There are 9 tracks at each of the 4 difficulty levels, which can be raced in any order (although the last track you rac

meta.name: Super Hang-On
meta.desc:
This is a conversion of Sega's popular motorcycle racing arcade game.  In this game you race a motorcycle around the world, completing each section of track within a time limit. There are other bikes on the road, but beating this is not important, so they can be thought of as moving obstacles. Each continent is a different difficulty level: Africa is beginner, Asia is junior, the Americas are senior, and Europe is expert.  
This is a very simple and straightforward game, viewed from behind the bike in 2D (so the screen does not tilt with the bike). The right/left controls are steering, and up/down are gear changes. Your cycle is always moving, and your speed strictly depends on the gear you are in, although contact or running off the road slows the bike down.

p: Superman - The Man of Steel (1990)(Tynesoft)[cr Bladerunners][t MCA].st
n: Superman - The Man of Steel (1990)(Tynesoft)[cr Bladerunners][t MCA]

meta.path: ./Superman - The Man of Steel (1990)(Tynesoft)[cr Bladerunners][t MCA].st
meta.name: Superman : The Man of Steel
meta.desc:
Juegas como Superman en su misión de salvar a Lois Lane y a toda la humanidad de los dos supervillanos, Darkseid y Lex Luthor.
El juego consta de diferentes secciones orientadas a la acción, incluyendo el vuelo en 3D, el desplazamiento aéreo vertical y el desplazamiento lateral. Las secciones están unidas por gráficos de cómic que cuentan la historia. El jugador controla a Superman en los niveles del juego y utiliza uno de sus cuatro superpoderes para derrotar a sus oponentes. La energía del poder se agota con el uso y debe regenerarse. Las colisiones con los adversarios pueden provocar una disminución de la energía vital. Las puntuaciones más altas se registrarán al final del juego.

meta.name: American Ice Hockey
meta.desc: The action in this ice hockey game is viewed from a side-scrolling perspective with a semi-3D effect. The puck loosely sticks to the player as he skates, and the netminders are CPU-controlled. Fights and penalties can be turned on or off, and the length of the match can be varied. As well as individual one or two player modes, a full managerial mode is included. This sees you take control of an international team and guide them through a full schedule of matches, including developing their skills and team-work.

meta.name: Suspicious Cargo
meta.desc:
When you need something transported in space, and you don't want inquisitive customs folk asking questions, or tiresome legal documentation, then lady Luck' is the ship, and Jonah Hayes is your man......
This time though he's bitten off more than he can chew • his cargo is alive (genetically speaking), dangerous and sought after by a rival company who'll stop at nothing to cripple his dodgy tramp freighter and take over the job.
An interactive adventure game set in the grand cyberpunk tradition with stunning action sequences, excellent animated location graphics, and a warped sense of humour thrown in for good measure.

meta.name: Switchblade
meta.desc:
El Fireblade, el símbolo sagrado del antiguo clan Switchblade, ha volado en 16 pedazos a manos del malvado Havoc. Pero se dice que un Hiro puede salvarlo, y como Hiro, debes recuperar las 16 piezas y restaurar el orgullo de tu pueblo.
El juego está basado en plataformas y escaleras, y se desarrolla tanto en interiores como en exteriores. A diferencia del resto del juego, empiezas sin armas, y éstas se ganan directamente, en lugar de recoger monedas y comerciar con ellas en tiendas.

meta.name: Switchblade II
meta.desc:
Eres Hiro, debes derrotar una vez más al señor ninja Havok. Utilizando shurikens y otras armas (cuchillo, misiles guiados, rayo láser, lanzallamas...), deberás derrotar a los secuaces de Havok para llegar hasta él.
Switchblade II es un juego de plataformas de desplazamiento lateral y cuenta con seis niveles infestados de enemigos mecanoides vestidos de metal. Un aspecto clave del juego es obtener monedas de los enemigos derrotados, que pueden canjearse en tiendas por vidas extra, energía y armas.
Los gráficos tienen un estilo manga muy japonés.

meta.name: T-Bird
meta.desc: Los jugadores controlan un Foourd T-Bird, un sistema de transporte capaz de alcanzar grandes velocidades de hasta 1346mph. Su trabajo es destruir los enjambres de alienígenas, incluidos platillos voladores, tie fighters, medusas espaciales, manchas no identificables y similares, y esquivar sus disparos. Esto se puede lograr disparándoles con el zapper estándar o usando un misil inteligente para destruir todo a la vista.

meta.name: Tau Ceti
meta.desc:
Un simulador espacial con diversos elementos de otros géneros. Tu misión es destruir a la armada robótica que controla el planeta.
Tras la colonización de Tau Ceti III y su posterior abandono a causa de una epidemia, los terrestres intentan volver al planeta con una cura. Pero las defensas automáticas siguen en funcionamiento e impiden todo aterrizaje.

meta.name: The Duel : Test Drive II
meta.desc: In the sequel to Test Drive, you can play against the time or the computer. Choose between a Ferrari F-40 and a Porsche 959, and take on your opponent, who is in the other car. There is also traffic to avoid.Each stage has a different setting, including forests and mountains, with a wide range of hazards to dodge. The game is designed to allow for scenario disks. To finish a stage, you must stop at the gas station by yourself, which allows you to refuel.

p: Teenage Mutant Hero Turtles (1990)(Image Works)[cr Empire][t].st
n: Teenage Mutant Hero Turtles (1990)(Image Works)[cr Empire][t]

meta.name: Teenage Mutant Hero Turtles
meta.desc:
Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles is an action game based on the 90s cartoon series. Play as Leonardo, Michaelangelo, Donatello and Raphael (one turtle only but the ability to swap between turtles at any time) as you save your friends and battle The Shredder and his cronies. There are no lives as such - when you lose a turtle, he becomes captured and you cannot use him again until you rescue him from a place hidden in the overworld.
Gameplay takes place in 2 perspectives: A top-down view which lets you run around and explore buildings, sewers and other places. When entering places from the top-down view, the perspective shifts to a side-scrolling view, where most of the battling takes place. In addition to each turtle's main weapon, sub-weapons (such as shuriken) can be acquired to use at foes - these have a limited use.

meta.name: Terminator 2 : Judgment Day
meta.desc: Terminator 2: Judgment Day consists of several actions parts linked together. All parts are different, each resembling typical games of the genre (for example: 1st level is like a side-view beat 'em up). Between each level a small cutscene from the movie is shown.

meta.name: Terramex
meta.desc: This multi-level action/adventure takes players back 40 years to find Professor K.K. Renegade, who predicts that a catastrophic asteroid is heading straight for earth. You're in charge of finding Professor Renegade.

meta.name: Test Drive
meta.desc: This mix of racing simulation and arcade game consists of driving a choice of 5 sports cars on a mountain strip at the fastest speed possible without getting caught by the cops.  To avoid them, use your radar detector -- or just try to outrun them if they spot you.  Manual stickshift only, so make sure you don't redline or you'll blow your engine.

meta.name: Thunder Jaws
meta.desc:
Take the plunge, dive into the deep and confront cybernetic sharks, enemy divers and all manner of evil
- the work of the devilish Madame Q.
Your mission: infiltrate her base, rescue hostages and destroy her subterranean fortress. Pick up flame throwers, defeat the hordes of henchmen and battle with armies of monstrous genetic mutants. This furious shoot out gives no respite. The action's non-stop from the start of this fantastic
multi-level extravaganza. Gulping Excitement to the very last Bite!!

meta.name: Thunderstrike
meta.desc: Thunderstrike is a 3D spaceship shooter set in the year 2238, using a non-textured polygon graphics engine. As a pilot in the "Ground Defense Games", you must make your way through several arenas built on different planets. You can choose from four different ships, each with different properties (better/worse acceleration, top speed, or turning speed). When you enter the arena, you are given several pyramids that you must defend from robotic drones sent out to collapse them. In addition to defending your pyramids, you must destroy the spawning centers that spawn not only drones, but an array of robotic fighters to hunt you down. When you destroy a fighter, sometimes it will leave behind an upgrade pod (shield, turbo, power, or twin-fire). There are also tracks that you can latch your ship onto to travel the perimeter of the arena quickly. At the end of each round, your performance is reviewed, and if you did good, your ship is upgraded and you move on to the next round.

meta.name: Time And Magik : The Trilogy
meta.desc: Three of Level 9's most acclaimed adventures come together in one package. And each has been enhanced and enlarged with more text than ever before - 60,000 mind-expanding words creating magic and mystery round every corner. There's a powerful new parser, and most disc versions include stunning digitised pictures that help to dramatically heighten the atmosphere.

meta.name: Time Bandit
meta.desc:
Time Bandit es un juego arcade estilo Gauntlet. Tu bandido es un viajero del tiempo que visita 16 mundos diferentes en distintas épocas para recolectar la mayor cantidad de botín posible y, en última instancia, salvar el universo.
Cada una de los 16 lugares (tan variados como una arena medieval, una fábrica de bombas, una nave espacial en ruinas y una ciudad fantasma) son en realidad laberintos llenos de tesoros y monstruos enemigos. Tienes que esquivarlos o derribarlos con tu arma mientras recoges llaves, abres puertas y buscas la salida. Aunque en teoría cada ubicación se compone de 16 subniveles, esto es simplemente el diseño básico invertido o reflejado, algunos elementos redistribuidos y una mayor velocidad de los monstruos. Después de completar un nivel, regresas al mapa mundial, donde puedes elegir libremente el siguiente desafío y guardar el juego.
Los veteranos de los videojuegos descubrirán una veintena de elementos y alusiones a clásicos del arcade, como Gauntlet, Pac-Man, Centipede o Bomberman.

meta.name: Time Machine
meta.desc:
In Time Machine, the player takes control over Professor Potts whose main profession is building time machines. As terrorists bomb his laboratory, he gets sucked ten million years into the past. During the course of his adventure he will visit five time zones with five screens each.
This is an adventure with action elements. Most of the game is spent manipulating objects in the different time zones which have an effect on a later zone, e.g. planting a seed in the stone age will cause a tree to appear in the later zones. He also may need to bring an object from one time to another. In each zone there is one big puzzle to solve in order to get access to the next zone (the ultimate goal is to prevent the time machine from getting destroyed), but constant traveling between the time zones is necessary.

meta.name: Time Scanner
meta.desc: Time Scanner is a pinball game. As usual, the goal is to keep the ball in the game by bouncing it back with the paddles. Hitting bumpers and other obstacles rewards points and completing a table requires mastering certain objectives which depend on the table on hand. Every table is divided into two parts with their own paddles: the game only scrolls if the ball goes down.

meta.name: Times of Lore
meta.desc:
El reino de Albereth está siendo atacado por fuerzas bárbaras. El rey Valwyn repele a los bárbaros, pero resulta herido en la batalla. En busca de un lugar donde descansar y recuperar fuerzas, abandonó la ciudad, pero nunca regresó. Ahora un nuevo héroe debe alzarse y defender su patria.
El juego consiste en mover al protagonista en tiempo real (día y noche) por distintos terrenos, como bosques, ciudades y mazmorras. El personaje recoge objetos básicos, como pociones de salud y magia, y armas cada vez más poderosas a medida que completa tareas y avanza en la trama. Las conversaciones se gestionan mediante frases clave. En las batallas intervienen varios tipos de criaturas, de las que puede haber diversas variaciones.
meta.genre: Juego de Rol / RPG de Acción

meta.name: Tintin on the Moon
meta.desc: Hergé's famous cartoon character is brought to life in this multi-stage action game, specifically based around the episode of the same name. In many details the story was similar to the real moon landings, then many years off.

meta.name: Titus the Fox : To Marrakech and Back
meta.desc:
Embark with Titus the Fox on a hilarious adventure in To Marrakech and Back. Whether on foot, on a skateboard or with your magic carpet, cross the Sahara to rescue Foxy, your beloved who has been captured!
Several enemies await you, such as Babyboon, a kid armed with a deadly bottle, and Toyo, the snake with glasses. This cult title is considered by critics to be a benchmark for platform games.
* A huge platform game: more than 900 screens across 15 levels, and 54 surprising enemies.
* Secret rooms, hidden bonuses and deadly traps.
* Unique interaction system: player - enemies - objects - scenery.
* Options: codes to select your level, ability to resume the game after losing, adjustable scrolling in 8 directions.

meta.name: Toki
meta.desc:
Las manos de Bashtar han arrancado a Moho de su amado Toki. Toki no está mejor: ha sido convertido en mono por el hechicero Vookimedlo. Ahora Toki debe salvar a su amor y encontrar la forma de volver a convertirse en un hombre.
Toki tiene varios niveles: el laberinto de cuevas, el lago Neptuno, las cuevas de fuego, el palacio de hielo, la selva oscura, el palacio de oro... El principal ataque de Toki contra sus enemigos es escupirles, pero también puede saltar sobre ellos para derrotarlos. El escupitajo normal de Toki puede transformarse en una ráfaga de fuego si encuentras el objeto adecuado. Otros objetos son un casco de fútbol que protege temporalmente a Toki, zapatillas de salto de altura, relojes que añaden tiempo, monedas que aumentan el número de vidas ...

meta.name: Total Eclipse
meta.desc:
Uses 3D system called Freescape developed by Incentive Software Ltd. 
A pyramid has been built to destroy anything that blocks the sun and now a total eclipse is about to occur.  Collect ankhs to open doors, shoot mummies, drink water and maybe then you solve the puzzle of pyramid. Controlling yourself in 3D world, you may change angle of your rotation and width of your steps to avoid some obstacles. Also you can use your gun to shoot some doors or to eliminate some foes.

meta.name: Total Recall
meta.desc:
In Total Recall, players control Quaid and battle through 7 levels on Earth and Mars. The game alternates between platforming and driving levels. In these levels, Quaid must battle guards and find the exit. The player can duck to avoid bullets and fight back with captured weapons and Schwarzenegger's powerful fists.
In the first level, the player must locate objects to open the exit while in a later level, the player alternates between Quaid and the resistance fighter Melina to solve a puzzle.
The driving levels are high-speed side-scrolling races, where the player's vehicle moves at a fixed speed. The player must dodge passing vehicles or destroy them with their weapons. If they survive to the end, they must defeat a mobile boss to complete the level. Cutscenes appear between some levels, recounting the film's plot and setting the stage for the next scene.

meta.name: Nebulus
meta.desc:
Nebulus (también conocido como Tower Toppler) parece un simple juego de plataformas, pero es todo un logro para la época de su primer lanzamiento (1987). La técnica de representación del juego es relativamente revolucionaria, ya que utiliza gráficos de "desplazamiento giratorio". Esto significa que la cámara permanece en el personaje mientras se mueve por la columna. 
El objetivo del juego es escalar torres en el tiempo dado para destruirlas. Por supuesto, una serie de enemigos y trampas bloquearán el camino del personaje. Prepárate para encontrar una dificultad bastante alta en el primer nivel. Cuando el personaje es golpeado, no muere pero baja un piso. Sólo muere si cae al agua.

meta.name: Tracksuit Manager
meta.desc:
Tracksuit Manager varied the conventional Football Manager game style in a number of ways. You take charge of an international team aiming to qualify for and then play in the European Championships and World Cup. This means there is no transfer market, just a pool of 100 eligible players from which a squad of 22 is selected. You can view reports on each player's ability and form at any stage of the squad and team selection process. You can arrange friendly matches to try out players and ensure that the squad plays together as much as possible.
The matches are presented as a running commentary, with a small graphic indicating which area of the pitch the ball is in. A wide range of tactical options are available to dictate the team's passing style, defensive approach and so on, and in another first you can give specific instructions to individual players (maybe telling a particularly pacy defender to man-mark a dangerous opposition winger instead of staying in a set position).

meta.name: Trailblazer
meta.desc:
El objeto del juego es guiar el balón por cada uno de los 21 recorridos lo más rápidamente posible, evitando caer en los agujeros y en otros obstáculos. Cada recorrido tiene su límite de tiempo. Hay dos posibles juegos:
Juega el arcade: Tiene cuatro saltos por recorrido, con un límite de tiempo en cada uno. Debes completar el máximo número posible de recorridos y conseguir la máxima puntuación.
Competición de tres recorridos: Puedes practicar tres cualesquiera de los recorridos, con un límite de 99 segundos.

meta.name: Dizzy II : Treasure Island Dizzy
meta.desc: This is Dizzy's second adventure. Dizzy is a cute little egg character who must explore the strange magic kingdom that is Treasure Island, solving problems and puzzles, and end the terror of the evil Pirates that rule the island.

meta.name: Trivial Pursuit : A New Beginning
meta.desc:
Esta secuela difiere del primer opus, que retomaba el principio original del famoso juego de tablero. Cada jugador controla ahora una nave espacial y el objetivo general es convencer a los Sabios del planeta Genus de que acepten el plan de colonización de tu pueblo.
Todos los Sabios se encuentran en diferentes partes de la galaxia y sólo se puede llegar a ellos viajando por la galaxia respondiendo correctamente a las preguntas y respondiendo a una pregunta específica una vez que se ha llegado a ellos.
Las seis categorías de preguntas son las mismas que en el juego original, y hay 50 niveles de preguntas que resolver, pero la gran diferencia es que la categoría de pregunta es aleatoria.

meta.name: Time Soldier
meta.desc: You are a Time Soldier, who is asked to rescue five warriors from different time periods: Sirius in the "Primitive Age", Laplace in the "Age of Rome", Dymos in "The World Wars", Alpha in the "Age of Rome", and Altair in "Future World". Each one of them is guarded by one of Gylend's henchmen, but to get to them, you must fight off other enemies that are specific to each time era. Some of these enemies will drop weapons that you can pick up and use. You can use several teleports scattered in each time era to travel to another.

meta.name: Turrican
meta.desc:
El demonio de tres cabezas Morgul ha estado influyendo en los sueños de las personas para crear pesadillas, pero más recientemente estas pesadillas se han convertido en realidad. Solo Turrican puede salvarlos en este juego de disparos de desplazamiento lateral de ritmo rápido. Cuenta con 5 mundos y 13 niveles de juego desafiante.
La jugabilidad es conceptualmente simple: solo salta, dispara y explora. Sin embargo, este juego pone mucho énfasis en encontrar y usar las 10 armas diferentes que Turrican puede recoger.

meta.name: Turrican II : The Final Fight
meta.desc:
Turrican II: The Final Fight es un juego de plataformas y disparos del tipo que se suele ver en las consolas, pero diseñado desde cero para ordenadores personales.
Su argumento es sencillo: un malvado mega-robot llamado "la Máquina" ataca la nave Avalon 1 de los Planetas Unidos, masacrando a todos los que se resisten. Todos excepto Bren McGuire, que consigue escapar y ponerse la armadura biónica experimental de Turrican. Como Turrican, se propone demostrar a la Máquina quién manda.
A diferencia de otros juegos de este tipo, este juego contiene tres niveles de acción de tiro horizontal. Hay seis grandes mundos para explorar, en los que eres bastante libre de ir donde quieras, ya que no hay desplazamiento automático y los niveles están llenos de vidas extra y armas ocultas. Todos estos niveles son muy diferentes: el primero, en el desierto de piedra, es muy colorido, mientras que los siguientes mundos son cada vez más oscuros.

meta.name: Tusker
meta.desc:
Finding the mysterious Elephant's Graveyard in Africa was your Father's lifelong quest. When he disappears you are determined to find out what might have happened to him, and what secrets may lie within.
This side scrolling arcade adventure is split into three stages, taking in the harsh and barren desert, an underground network of caves, and a tough tribal jungle. The natives are hostile to your presence, and weaponry must be found to fend them off, although its use does little to put the natives at ease initially. The machete to cut through the jungle is equally important. At many other points you will need to use objects you have found along the way. The backgrounds are in full 3D and can serve to obscure the character when he is behind trees or rocks.

meta.name: TV Sports Football
meta.desc: Before Electronic Arts sought to imitate television coverage of sports with their EA Sports titles, Cinemaware had the same idea, initially applying it to (American) Football. Cutscenes follow dramatic moments in the match, and each match is preceded by a TV-style introduction. The game is primarily action-based, although you also choose your plays before executing them. You then bring the passes and runs to life on the pitch itself. You can play single matches or full leagues, with any of the NFL teams of the time.

meta.name: TwinWorld
meta.desc:
After the Cariken family became complacent, the land of Gaspar ceased to be ruled as well. This left the way clear for evil men such as Maldur the druid to step in and slaughter the family, shattering their magical amulet. Only one of the family survived, and the amulet was broken into 23 pieces. 
As Ulopa, the sole survivor, you must reclaim the pieces. They are spread across 23 levels of platforming action, combining surface areas with some underground tunnels. You have 3 types of weapons with different functionality: switching between them at the right moments is vital. You can also collect upgrades from the carcasses of dead enemies. Other upgrades such as springs and a parachute can also be found.

p: Ultima IV - Quest of the Avatar (1987)(Origin)(Disk 1 of 2)[!].stx
n: Ultima IV - Quest of the Avatar (1987)(Origin)(Disk 1 of 2)[!]

meta.path: ./Ultima IV - Quest of the Avatar (1987)(Origin)(Disk 1 of 2)[!].stx
meta.name: Ultima IV : Quest Of The Avatar
meta.desc:
En una hermosa tarde, te recuestas contra un árbol y dormitas, cuando de repente aparece una especie de puerta azul no muy lejos de ti, de la que caen una cruz Ankh, un mapa de tela y dos libros, uno que describe el mundo de Britannia, el otro que habla de magia. Al levantarte, observas un campamento de nómadas, que sorprendentemente no habías visto antes, y eres conducido al carro del adivino, que te hace una serie de preguntas, tras lo cual te desmayas. Y cuando despiertas, el mundo de Britannia está ante ti. ¿Podrás demostrar tu valía y ser digno de ser el Avatar de las Virtudes?
Ultima IV es un juego de arriba abajo, con la excepción de las mazmorras, que están en una vista en primera persona. Las fases de combate son por turnos. Britannia es un vasto mundo que puedes explorar a tu antojo.

p: Ultima V - Warriors of Destiny (1988)(Origin)(Disk 1 of 3)(Boot).st
n: Ultima V - Warriors of Destiny (1988)(Origin)(Disk 1 of 3)(Boot)

meta.name: Ultima V : Warriors Of Destiny
meta.desc:
Desde la desaparición de Lord British en una expedición a los confines de la Tierra, el mal ha vuelto a manifestarse, en forma de Señores de las Sombras. Aparecen en las ciudades, sembrando el pánico y apoderándose de las mentes de la gente. También han reaparecido orcos, trolls y demonios. No todo va bien, así que tus amigos de toda la vida te han llamado a ti, el Avatar, reflejo de todas las cualidades caballerescas, para que encuentres a Lord British y lo devuelvas a su trono. Todo lo que tienes que hacer es emprender una búsqueda, reclutar compañeros, interrogar a todo el mundo, explorar las mazmorras y luego irte a los confines de la Tierra, donde te espera lo desconocido.
Aunque el juego se desarrolla en el mismo mundo que Ultima IV, ahora está más detallado. El combate se ha mejorado ligeramente. El ciclo día/noche se utiliza juiciosamente, y los personajes que conoces tienen vida propia.

p: Ultima VI - The False Prophet (1990)(Origin)(Disk 1 of 4)[cr ICS].st
n: Ultima VI - The False Prophet (1990)(Origin)(Disk 1 of 4)[cr ICS]

meta.path: ./Ultima VI - The False Prophet (1990)(Origin)(Disk 1 of 4)[cr ICS].st
meta.name: Ultima VI : The False Prophet
meta.desc:
Varios años después de devolver a Lord British su legítima posición como monarca de Britannia, el Avatar es capturado por criaturas demoníacas y colocado en un altar de sacrificios. Sus amigos Lolo, Shamino y Dupre aparecen justo a tiempo para salvarle. En el castillo de Britannia, el Avatar se entera de que sus captores eran gárgolas, una raza de enigmáticas criaturas que recientemente han invadido Britannia y ocupado los santuarios de la Virtud. El Avatar se embarca en una búsqueda para liberar Britannia.
Ultima VI es único en el sentido de que es un mundo completamente continuo. No existe un "mapamundi" en el juego, todas las localizaciones están conectadas entre sí convirtiendo el mundo del juego en un entorno abierto. En comparación con anteriores entregas de la serie, el juego se centra más en las misiones y la exploración que en el combate.

meta.boxback: Z:/Digistorage/Arley4dCloudMedia/atarist/images/Ultima VI - The False Prophet (1990)(Origin)(Disk 1 of 4)[cr ICS]-boxback.jpg

meta.name: Venus The Flytrap
meta.desc:
Después de que la humanidad destruya la Tierra por la superpoblación y la contaminación excesiva, se hace imprescindible enviar una mosca robótica para limpiarla. Toma el control de la mosca y elimina a las criaturas y plantas mutantes. Debes atravesar 8 mundos, incluyendo las Tierras Heladas, las Cavernas y el Valle de la Muerte.
La mayoría de las criaturas sensibles sueltan una bola al matarlas, dispárale para liberar una de las muchas opciones como armas mejoradas, movimiento más rápido, vida extra o características negativas como perder una vida o invertir los controles. A medida que avanza el juego, los niveles se vuelven cada vez más complejos y basados en plataformas.

meta.name: Victory Road
meta.desc:
La historia se retoma directamente al final de Ikari Warriors. Felicitados por el general Kawasaki por haberle salvado, Paul y Vince (también llamados Ralf y Clark) regresan a su patria en un avión fletado por el general. Aparece una misteriosa tormenta y son arrojados miles de años al futuro (¡o a otra dimensión!). Son recibidos por una criatura alienígena que les dice que el malvado Zang Zip (Zangelt) se ha apoderado de este mundo.
Para ayudarles a volver a casa, utiliza sus viejas armas de fuego y otras nuevas para derrotar a más y más enemigos, como hombres verdes cíclopes, bestias con cabeza de piedra y el malvado Zangelt.

meta.name: Vindicators
meta.desc:
El Imperio Tangent se está preparando para atacar la tierra con su convoy de tanques, y son ustedes los que han sido enviados para destruir las 14 estaciones espaciales que constituyen la potencial amenaza de invasión.
Hay 3 subniveles en cada emisora, que se pueden tocar en cualquier orden. La acción se desplaza en todas las direcciones, con usted guiando a su droide para que dispare a los droides de la oposición. El tanque tarda un tiempo en manejarse, lo que hace inicialmente más difícil evitar el contacto con esos enemigos. Cada nivel contiene estrellas de energía, que pueden ser canjeadas por mejoras tales como armas mejoradas y velocidad extra después de cada nivel.

meta.name: Voyager
meta.desc:
The Voyager II space probe found us some impressive images of outer space. However, it was later found by the people of Roxiz, who locate Earth and decide to invade it, by establishing bases on each of Saturn's 10 moons. As former POW Luke Snayles, you must destroy each of these fleets of 80 aliens, before they can be dispatched.
Voyager is viewed from on board the craft, and is a first person shoot 'em up using polygon graphics. You start with a laser and a few bombs, but can collect extra weaponry and the ability to fly through the mothership. Not all enemies can be killed simply by shooting them, so there is a tactical element to the slaughter.

meta.name: Vroom
meta.desc:
Vroom is a Formula 1 car racing game that can be played either in arcade or simulation mode. The main options screen allows you to select manual or automatic transmission, number of laps, and training, single race, or full season. The multiplayer option allows two players to race against each other on separate computers.
Each track, with different layouts and background graphics, includes many tight curves, steep grades and inclines, as well as tunnels and a pit stop.
The player-controlled car has working side-view mirrors, which allow you to view the actual action behind you, as well as a working speedometer and gear display.
The game features a colorful mix of 3D and 2D graphics, realistic sound effects, and blazing fast, smooth animations.

meta.name: Vroom Multi-Player
meta.desc:
Vroom Multi-Player is a racing game. 2 game modes are available: Arcade and Grand Prix. In both modes, you select the track you want to race on and complete a set number of laps (4, 8 or 12). The tracks available include San Marino, France, Great Britain, Germany, Italy, Portugal, Japan and Australia. Some tracks are easy, others are difficult.
There are slight differences between the 2 modes. Arcade allows you to select tracks in any order you like while Grand Prix only allows you to fine-tune your car before the start. You must complete the tracks in the order they appear on the selection screen but you can skip a track if you wish.
F1 is a 1- or 2-player game, which means that if you have another player on hand, you can compete against each other.

p: War in Middle Earth (19xx)(Melbourne House)(Disk 1 of 2)[disk 2 missing].st
n: War in Middle Earth (19xx)(Melbourne House)(Disk 1 of 2)[disk 2 missing]

meta.path: ./War in Middle Earth (19xx)(Melbourne House)(Disk 1 of 2)[disk 2 missing].st
meta.name: J.R.R. Tolkien's War In Middle Earth
meta.desc: War in Middle Earth is an Atari ST role-playing game obviously inspired by the work of J.R.R. Tolkien: The Lord of the Rings. You can take turns playing as the different leaders of the Middle War, each with different characteristics.

meta.name: Weird Dreams
meta.desc:
A severely ill man is on the operating table when a Daemon named Emily trapping you in your own subconscious. To escape you must find four orbs, which are trapped within a selection of esoteric mini-games set within the darkest Dali-influenced recesses of the mind.
Weird Dreams is a third-person game with action and puzzle elements. The game contains bizarre levels and unorthodox activities, including feeding a wasp cotton candy, beating up hopping totem poles with fish from the sky, and an encounter with a baked chicken in a haunted house. The game comes with a "short novel" that explains the plot in detail and serves as copy protection.

meta.name: Wild Streets
meta.desc: New-York, Year 1998. The once most prestigious city in the world, has now become a fighting zone. Half of the city is left in ruins, and it is in that part of town that the marginals and gangs are living, hunted by every law enforcement agencies. The other half of the city consists of fancy mansions, in some of which the most important drug barons reside. Unfortunately, they are the ones who run the city using the enormous profits they make from dealing drugs and weapons. They now have succeeded in endangering the country's economy.

meta.name: Winter Olympiad 88
meta.desc: This is a winter sports game that lets you compete in five Olympic events: Downhill skiing, Biathlon, Slalom, Ski Jump and Bob Sled. It is very similar to offerings like Winter Games from Epyx. In Downhill skiing, you must avoid the obstacles and make it to the bottom of the hill, by swerving left and right and adjusting your speed by pushing the joystick forward and back. The Slalom is similar, involving skiing around flags. In the ski jump, you must position the skis for a proper landing. In the bobsled event, you must carefully control the angles so your bobsled doesn't flip. The Biathlon event combines skiing to shooting ranges and shooting the targets archery-style.

meta.name: Wizball
meta.desc:
In Wizball, you are Wiz, a wizard who can transform into a green ball to defend his world from color-sucking enemies. The goal is to restore colors to the world by collecting them from defeated enemies.
There are 8 levels to complete, each requiring upgrades to progress. The player starts as a bouncy green ball that can shoot and move at different speeds. Upgrades include control over the ball, a shield and two-way fire. The player also has Catelite, a feline companion that can be summoned as a satellite to collect paint drops and aid in level completion.
There's 3 colors available (red, green and blue) and several different combinations of them must be collected to complete a level and restore it to former colorfulness. Every color combination collected will send Wiz to a bonus stage, then to his laboratory where one of the power-ups can be made permanently.
The game also features a bunch of multi-player modes like a 2-player cooperative mode amongst them.

meta.name: Wolfchild
meta.desc:
Dr. Kal Morrow, expert in genetic research and creation of human-animal hybrids, has been kidnapped and his family brutally murdered by the terrorist organization CHIMERA. His surviving son Saul takes it upon himself to avenge his family. Using his father's research, he turns into a man-wolf and sets out to find CHIMERA's base and defeat their leader Karl Draxx.
As Saul, it is your job to traverse five different areas on your way to Draxx. When Saul collects enough power-ups, he turns into his wolf form and gains a special psychic shot attack, which can be improved by collecting futher power-ups. However, if Saul loses health, he turns back into his human form and only has his fists to fight the numerous enemies.

meta.name: Wolfpack
meta.desc: In this WW2 combat simulation one or two players can take command of one of three different sets of naval vessels. German U-boats, U.S. destroyers or Allied merchant ships are there, waiting for the right commands. They operate in small groups, just as the real things did in WW2. Full status screens tell you what state your boat is in at any time. It's possible to play one of the twelve built-in scenarios or an self-created scenario. The game has no career mode.

meta.name: Super Wonder Boy in Monster Land
meta.desc:
Wonder Boy in Monster Land es un juego de plataformas de desplazamiento multidireccional con elementos de RPG, en el que el héroe del juego, Wonder Boy, ha visto cómo su hogar, el país de las maravillas, ha sido invadido por el malvado "Dragón MEKA" y su ejército de secuaces.
Al principio del juego, Wonder Boy está desarmado, pero el gobernador del país de las maravillas (como se conocía antes de la invasión) le da una espada corta para ayudarle en su búsqueda.
Wonder Boy tiene un medidor de vida representado por una serie de corazones rojos y, cada vez que recibe daño, los corazones se reducen. Cuando todos los corazones se agotan, Wonder Boy muere y el juego termina. Además del contador de vida, hay un reloj de arena en la parte superior de la pantalla; cuando se vacía, Wonder Boy pierde algo de vida. El temporizador se puede rellenar recogiendo relojes de arena o visitando hospitales o tabernas.

meta.name: Wonderland
meta.desc: Wonderland is a text adventure with graphics, based on Lewis Carroll's classic novel Alice in Wonderland. The game follows the book's general story while adding many descriptions, locations, and puzzles of its own. The interaction with the environment is done mostly by typing; however, commands may also appear in pop-up menus and can be selected by the player. Sometimes puzzles need to be solved in order to be able to advance. The game features windows with adjustable size, separating the graphical display from inventory, command interface, text descriptions, and other options.

meta.name: World Games
meta.desc:
Olympics style sports game.  Compete in several events including:
Skiing, Weight Lifting, Barrel Jumping, Sumo Wrestling, Bull Riding, Cliff Diving, Log Rolling, Caber Toss, Pole Vault, Platform Diving.

meta.name: X-Out
meta.desc:
En principio, este es otro shoot-'em-up de desplazamiento horizontal (técnicamente muy impresionante). El giro interesante sobre el escenario es que no se desarrolla en el espacio como el juego similar R-Type y la mayoría de sus clones, sino que la lucha entre el bien y el mal es bajo el agua.
A lo largo de cinco niveles, tienes que disparar a innumerables enemigos, que se completan con los obligatorios jefes de mitad de nivel y de final de nivel. La parte más innovadora de este juego llega después de un nivel, cuando puedes comprar nuevas armas: en lugar de simplemente comprar mejoras, puedes personalizar tu nave colocando tus nuevas armas en cualquier parte de ella.

meta.name: Xenon 2 : Megablast
meta.desc: Xenon 2: Megablast es un shooter espacial de desplazamiento vertical, en el que debes pasar varios niveles, lleno de oleadas de enemigos, que terminan con una criatura jefe de nivel. Cada grupo de enemigos que destruyas te otorga una recompensa en efectivo y de vez en cuando entras en Colin's Bargain Basement, donde puedes usar este efectivo para comprar mejoras para tu nave como mejores armas, mejoras de velocidad y de salud, etc. Algunas mejoras también pueden ser recogidas durante los niveles. La primera parte del juego tiene un entorno orgánico, mientras que la segunda parte del juego presenta enemigos mecánicos. Como hay algunas secciones laberínticas con callejones sin salida en el juego, tu nave espacial se desplaza hacia atrás cuando sigues presionando la tecla hacia abajo. Un juego típico de Bitmap Brothers smash, el juego también es famoso por su banda sonora del grupo británico de música electrónica Bomb The Bass.

meta.name: Xenon
meta.desc:
Xenon es el misterioso predecesor del mucho más conocido Xenon 2: Megablast. En realidad, el juego no se parece en nada a su secuela, con un esquema de control y una jugabilidad completamente diferentes. Sin embargo, la trama se superpone cuando los Xenites hacen su primer intento de controlar la galaxia.
Xenon es esencialmente un shooter vertical. La diferencia entre Xenon y su secuela es que aquí el jugador controla el movimiento del campo de juego (arriba o abajo) simplemente moviendo la nave en la dirección elegida. Para hacer esto en la secuela, los jugadores deben golpear su nave contra la parte inferior de la pantalla y tirar hacia atrás de la palanca para desplazarse hacia atrás en el campo de juego.
También cuenta con un campo de juego 3D (algunos enemigos, por ejemplo, estarán montados en una especie de colinas, donde los jugadores no podrán dispararles). Para combatirlos, el jugador puede transformar su tanque en un avión. Luego, el juego cambia al estilo de juego más familiar, como se ve en otros shooters de desplazamiento vertical. El avión tiene que volver a transformarse en un tanque para combatir a la mayoría de las unidades terrestres.

meta.name: Xenon
meta.desc:
Xenon es el misterioso predecesor del mucho más conocido Xenon 2: Megablast. En realidad, el juego no se parece en nada a su secuela, con un esquema de control y una jugabilidad completamente diferentes. Sin embargo, la trama se superpone cuando los Xenites hacen su primer intento de controlar la galaxia.
Xenon es esencialmente un shooter vertical. La diferencia entre Xenon y su secuela es que aquí el jugador controla el movimiento del campo de juego (arriba o abajo) simplemente moviendo la nave en la dirección elegida. Para hacer esto en la secuela, los jugadores deben golpear su nave contra la parte inferior de la pantalla y tirar hacia atrás de la palanca para desplazarse hacia atrás en el campo de juego.
También cuenta con un campo de juego 3D (algunos enemigos, por ejemplo, estarán montados en una especie de colinas, donde los jugadores no podrán dispararles). Para combatirlos, el jugador puede transformar su tanque en un avión. Luego, el juego cambia al estilo de juego más familiar, como se ve en otros shooters de desplazamiento vertical. El avión tiene que volver a transformarse en un tanque para combatir a la mayoría de las unidades terrestres.

meta.name: Xiphos
meta.desc:
As usual, a computer has been put in control of vast stretches of an intergalactic empire. As usual, it has failed and locked the entire area into limbo. As usual, you're the one who has to sort this mess out, by reaching the computer and destroying it.
Unfortunately, the area en route to it is vast and treacherous, with lots of obstacles to shoot out, and you will need to trade your items in order to get enough fuel to get there.
The gameplay resembles Elite, involving first-person space shooting and trading.

meta.name: Yolanda
meta.desc:
Attention game freaks! So you think you rate as a good gomes player? Well think again! You're nowhere until you try Yolanda - The fastest and most difficult platform game ever.
You take the part of Yolanda, offspring of the mighty Hercules himself, cursed by the death goddess Hera to be shunned by all mankind. Your only hope of lifting the curse is to re-enact the twelve tasks of Hercules - and that's going to take oil the speed, strength and reflexes it's possible for a mortal to summon.
- Over fifty levels of unrelenting fast action.
- Unique trainer level for beginners.
- Random level selection - you'll have to slay on your toes.
- Joystick twitching gameplay that'll keep you coming bock for more.
- Game design by the legendary Steve Bak.

meta.name: Zone Warrior
meta.desc:
In a distant future, the Earth is under attack by evil aliens known as the Geeks. Their plan is to travel into the past, disrupting the development of human technology, making conquest easy in the future. Our last hope is a lone soldier sent after the aliens who must save Earth and destroy the Geeks in different time zones.
Zone Warrior is a side-scrolling platform game with exploration and shooting elements. It consists of 5 levels. Various enemies stand in the way, fitting the respective time period. The player's blaster can be upgraded to 3 and 5-way shots by collecting power-ups.
Available are various bombs, mines and a flamethrower. Levels are large and interconnected by doors and gates. A partial level map helps the player. To complete a level, a number of hostages must be rescued and the Geek Commander destroyed.
The Commander is located behind a security door, and a key must be found. In each level, is an armory with some powerful weapons for defeating the Commander.

meta.name: Zool : Ninja of the “Nth” Dimension
meta.desc:
His name is Zool. He is a Ninja in the 2345th dimension, 6 worlds each with 3 stages. 
In this platformer, you can run, jump, climb walls and shoot the enemies. In the levels are also some power-ups for Zool. There are life-spending hearts, smart bombs, shields, more powerful jump-skill and a twin Zool. This "twin" makes all your motions a few seconds after you do.
In the options you can change the difficulty and the game-speed two times, the continues and the background music (Rock or Funk).

meta.name: Zork : The Undiscovered Underground
meta.desc: This was a free game released by Activision to celebrate and promote their newest game, at the time, Zork: Grand Inquisitor. It is a text only adventure done in the style on the original Zork games. The year in 1066. You're a private, 7th class, in the Inquisition Guard. After getting relieved of your post at the Port Foozle Inquisition Gift Kiosk, you see the Pastor of Disaster, the Minister of Sinister, the Grand Inquisitor. It looks like he has a job for you. Yes, you. After asking about other, ANY other, guards to go instead, you have your orders. Sigh. Very well. Archaeologists have unearthed a tunnel that seems to lead to a new section of the Great Underground Empire or GUE. You are to enter this tunnel and explore the Great Underground Empire. You'll be back in no time. You hope.

meta.name: Zynaps
meta.desc: This horizontally-scrolling shoot 'em up features 16 levels and 450 screens of Nemesis-inspired action. You pilot a spacecraft through the levels, shooting as many of the encroaching meanies and mounted turrets as possible. Power-up tokens are offered for shooting some, which can be used to obtain better weapons including ground-attack lasers, speed ups and multiple bullets. Extra lives are on offer as well, which you'll certainly need, especially as you have to go back a long way when losing a life.
